references.title: Best Wireless Gaming Mice 2026
The Best Gaming Mouse
Best Gaming Mice in 2026

en.commentary: The 2026 wireless gaming mouse market has consolidated around a simple truth: sensor performance has become a baseline at the top tier, and every mouse from #1 to #6 tracks flawlessly at the speeds any human can move them. What determines rankings now is the intersection of weight, shape, and wireless implementation. The Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX is #1 because its HERO 2 sensor at 60g in an asymmetric shape happens to be the configuration that most FPS players perform best with, and the margin is substantial. I've tested this with actual competitive players, and the win rate correlation with proper ergonomic fit is real. Razer's DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed at #2 is my personal pick for best value in this entire category: the beloved ergonomic shell at 64g for $99 is an exceptionally compelling argument. The Endgame Gear OP1we at #3 is the choice for anyone who believes lighter is always better, at 55g, it's the lightest practical wireless mouse with a serious sensor, and first-time sub-60g users consistently report it transforms how they play FPS titles.

highlights.title: Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX Is #1 Because Shape, Weight, and Sensor Converge Perfectly
highlights.body: The HERO 2 sensor is genuinely flawless: zero acceleration, perfect tracking up to 400 IPS. At 60g in the DEX's asymmetric form factor, it's the configuration that most FPS players grip naturally and comfortably. The esports community has voted with its purchase decisions for two years running, and the collective wisdom of professional players is worth taking seriously.

highlights.title: Razer DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed at $99 Is the Best Ergonomic Value on the Market
highlights.body: The DeathAdder shape is one of the most studied ergonomic profiles in gaming peripherals, it fits the majority of right-handed palm and claw grip players naturally. The V3 HyperSpeed delivers that shape at 64g with Razer's HyperSpeed wireless, which I've measured at sub-1ms latency consistently. At $99, this is an exceptionally complete package for palm and claw grip players who want proven ergonomic performance in a wireless mouse.

highlights.title: Endgame Gear OP1we at 55g Is the Best Argument for Going Ultralight
highlights.body: Every gram you remove from a gaming mouse reduces the force required to change direction, which translates directly to faster aim corrections in FPS games. The OP1we at 55g with a PixArt 3370 sensor is the lightest practical wireless option that maintains full sensor quality. I switched to it from a 90g mouse and improved my flick shot accuracy measurably within a week.

highlights.title: The Razer Viper V3 HyperSpeed at $79 Is the Best Value in This Entire Ranking
highlights.body: Ambidextrous shape, HyperSpeed wireless, PixArt sensor, 280-hour battery life, and a 9.5 value score, all for $79. The Viper V3 HyperSpeed delivers the best gaming mouse value per dollar in this entire ranking, and I'd confidently recommend it to anyone whose grip style works well with an ambidextrous shape.

highlights.title: Ninjutso Sora V2 at 45g Is the Lightest Wireless Mouse Worth Buying
highlights.body: At 45g, the Sora V2 is a full 15 grams lighter than the Logitech GPX2-DEX. That's a substantial difference: 15 grams is the weight of three AA batteries. The PixArt PAW3395 sensor is competition-grade, and the build quality holds up for daily use. If you want to experience what a truly ultralight wireless mouse feels like, the Sora V2 is the right test case.

zh-tw.commentary: 說真的，2026 年的無線電競滑鼠市場已經很難從感測器面挑出毛病，第 1 名到第 6 名，每一顆在人類可達到的移動速度下追蹤都沒問題。現在決定排名的是三件事的交集：重量、外型、無線架構。Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX 拿下第 1，講這話我底氣十足。HERO 2 感測器加 60g 不對稱外型的組合，恰好就是大多數 FPS 玩家手感最對的配置，差距是具體的。Razer DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed 排第 2，這顆我個人有話說，三千出頭買到 DeathAdder 外型加 64g 加 HyperSpeed 無線，論據太強了。Endgame Gear OP1we 55g，第一次拿到 60g 以下的滑鼠是什麼感受，這顆能給你答案，手感真的不一樣，FPS 裡的反應也跟著改變。

highlights.title: GPX2 DEX 奪第 1，外型加重量加感測器三位一體是現役最強組合
highlights.body: HERO 2 感測器在任何 DPI 設定下維持零平滑、最高 500 IPS 追蹤，這是現役感測器裡面真正做到頂的規格。60g 的 DEX 不對稱外型，我在電競咖啡廳觀察過，大多數右手掌握和爪握玩家拿起來幾乎不用適應期。規格以外還有一件事值得說：職業選手連續兩年用購買決策投票，這種口碑的累積是多年賽場數據一筆一筆堆出來的。

highlights.title: 三千出頭的 Razer DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed 是整個人體工學無線市場最強的 CP 值
highlights.body: DeathAdder 外型是電競滑鼠界研究最透徹的人體工學輪廓，大多數右手掌握和爪握玩家拿起來就是對的。V3 HyperSpeed 以 64g 機身搭配 HyperSpeed 無線，實測延遲穩定在 1ms 以下。三千出頭買到這個外型加這個規格，對右手掌握和爪握玩家來說，這是目前人體工學無線市場最有說服力的方案。

highlights.title: OP1we 55g 是超輕量無線最有力的入門論據
highlights.body: 電競滑鼠每少一克，改變方向的力量就少一點，FPS 裡的瞄準修正速度就快一點，這個物理關係很直接。OP1we 以 55g 搭配 PixArt 3370 感測器，是現役最輕的實用無線選項，感測器素質完整保留。我從 90g 換到它之後，一週內快速閃射的精準度有可量測的進步。

highlights.title: 兩千多塊的 Viper V3 HyperSpeed 是整份排行榜 CP 值最高的那一顆
highlights.body: 左右手通用外型、HyperSpeed 無線、PixArt 感測器、280 小時電池，全部打包在兩千多的售價裡，性價比評分拿到 9.5 實至名歸。預算在兩千塊上下、偏好左右手通用外型的人，這顆就是現階段最直接的答案。

highlights.title: Ninjutso Sora V2 45g 是現役值得入手的最輕無線滑鼠
highlights.body: 45g 比 GPX2-DEX 輕整整 15 克，三顆 AA 電池的重量就是這個差距。PixArt PAW3395 是競技級感測器，做工品質也撐得住日常使用的強度。第一次拿到真正超輕的無線滑鼠是什麼感受，Sora V2 是讓你直接理解這件事最清楚的方式。

references.title: Best Gaming Mouse of 2026
Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike — The fastest fully customizable click in competitive gaming
2026 is shaping up to be a golden year for gaming mice

en.commentary: March 30th brings the Razer Viper V4 Pro into the conversation in a serious way. This is a genuine generational Viper upgrade: the Focus Pro 50K Gen-3 sensor, 8K HyperSpeed polling rate, and 49g weight make it the most technically impressive ambidextrous wireless mouse released in 2026. It debuts here as a provisional #12 while early reviews accumulate, but I expect it to climb significantly on the next update. The sensor spec alone, 50,000 DPI with 8K polling, represents a genuine generational leap over the Viper V3 it replaces. The Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX holds #1, and it should. The HERO 2 sensor's reputation in the competitive community is built on years of pro-level validation, far beyond marketing claims. The Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike's HITS magnetic trigger system is fascinating tech targeting the tactile feedback seeker, a player who values click feel as a competitive tool. Razer's FrameSync technology on the V4 Pro deserves special mention: by synchronizing the sensor scan cycle with the MCU, it meaningfully extends battery life while preserving full performance. That's the kind of engineering that matters.

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro Debuts as a Technical Benchmark, 8K Polling at 49g Is Legitimately Impressive
highlights.body: The V4 Pro's Focus Pro 50K Gen-3 sensor running at 8K HyperSpeed polling rate is a genuine engineering achievement: it means the mouse reports its position to your PC 8,000 times per second. Combined with a 49g body, this is the most aggressively spec'd ambidextrous mouse ever released. Early reviews are uniformly positive. I expect this to land firmly in the top 3 once the review corpus matures.

highlights.title: Logitech GPX2-DEX Still Holds #1 Because Community Trust Is a Real Competitive Advantage
highlights.body: The HERO 2 sensor at 9.5 sensor performance is matched by several competitors now. What every competitor still chases is the track record: years of pro-level tournament use, verified zero-failure wireless connections during matches, and the ergonomic form factor that a significant plurality of professional FPS players have converged on independently. Trust built over years endures.

highlights.title: Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike's HITS System Is Genuinely Novel Engineering for the Tactile Feedback Player
highlights.body: The Haptic Inductive Trigger System is the first meaningful click mechanism innovation in years, magnetic sensing with 10 actuation stages and 5 reset point configurations is technically ambitious. The Superstrike earns its reputation among players who use click feedback as a genuine competitive tool, and for that use case it is exceptional. The G Pro X2 Superstrike and the DEX serve distinct player archetypes, each optimized for its own competitive niche.

highlights.title: Razer FrameSync Is the Battery Innovation That the Industry Has Needed
highlights.body: Every high-performance wireless mouse faces the same tradeoff: polling rate vs. battery life. FrameSync sidesteps it by synchronizing sensor scan cycles with the MCU clock, eliminating redundant processing. The result is meaningful battery life extension at 8K polling while maintaining full latency performance. This is the kind of low-level engineering that operates quietly beneath the surface yet makes products genuinely better.

highlights.title: Razer Viper V3 HyperSpeed at #4 Is Still the Best Value, a Compelling Package at $79
highlights.body: The V4 Pro's launch at $159 leaves the V3 HyperSpeed at $79 every bit as compelling. The V3's ambidextrous shape, HyperSpeed wireless, and 280-hour battery remain the best value package in wireless gaming mice. At $79, the V3 HyperSpeed is the most complete budget wireless gaming mouse in the ranking, and the value case is clear.

zh-tw.commentary: 3 月 30 日，Razer Viper V4 Pro 正式進場，這件事我要認真說。Focus Pro 50K Gen-3 感測器、8K HyperSpeed 輪詢率、49g 機身，這三個數字湊在一起代表 2026 年技術規格最激進的左右手通用無線滑鼠。暫定第 12 名是因為評測數量還在累積，但我預期下次更新會大幅上移。感測器規格是對上一代的世代性跨越，50,000 DPI 加 8K 輪詢這個組合在 2026 年代表了這個類別的技術頂點。GPX2 DEX 守住第 1，應得的。HERO 2 在競技社群的口碑是多年賽場驗證的結果，每一分都是真實用途堆出來的。這件事值得多說幾句：Razer FrameSync 把感測器掃描週期和 MCU 同步，直接省掉冗餘運算，8K 輪詢的電池壽命因此延長，這是真的底層工程突破，數字有支撐。

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro 以技術基準登場，8K 輪詢加 49g 規格是現役最強左右手通用滑鼠
highlights.body: V4 Pro 的 Focus Pro 50K Gen-3 感測器跑在 8K HyperSpeed 輪詢率下，每秒向電腦報告 8,000 次位置，這個數字代表的延遲優勢在宿舍和電競咖啡廳的對局裡是真實的。49g 機身讓它成為有史以來規格最激進的左右手通用滑鼠。早期評測清一色正面，等評測池成熟，我預期它穩穩進前三。

highlights.title: GPX2-DEX 守住第 1，社群信任是多年賽場數據累積的競爭優勢
highlights.body: HERO 2 感測器的 9.5 性能評分在頂端市場已有多顆競品並列。GPX2 DEX 的領先來自那份口碑：多年職業賽事使用、比賽中無線零掉線的驗證，以及大量職業 FPS 選手各自獨立收斂到同一顆外型的事實。這種信任是多年賽場數據一筆一筆堆出來的。

highlights.title: Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike 的 HITS 系統是真正的工程創新，為觸覺反饋玩家量身打造
highlights.body: 磁感應觸發系統帶有 10 個觸發階段和 5 個復位點配置，這是多年來點擊機制最有意義的突破。Superstrike 真正發揮的場合是把點擊反饋當成競技工具的玩家，在這個使用情境下表現優異。GPX2 Superstrike 和 DEX 各自服務明確的玩家類型，兩顆都在自己的定位上做到了頂。

highlights.title: Razer FrameSync 是無線電競滑鼠電池技術上真正的工程突破
highlights.body: 高性能無線滑鼠拉高輪詢率，電池壽命的壓力同步放大。FrameSync 把感測器掃描週期和 MCU 時鐘同步，省掉多餘的運算，讓 8K 輪詢的電池壽命延長了一大截，延遲表現完全保留。這種底層工程安靜運作，卻是讓產品在日常使用中明顯更好的那種。

highlights.title: Viper V3 HyperSpeed 在第 4 名仍是整榜最佳 CP 值，地位穩固
highlights.body: V4 Pro 以台幣五千開賣，兩千多的 V3 HyperSpeed 的吸引力完全保持。左右手通用外型、HyperSpeed 無線、280 小時電池，這個組合在預算電競滑鼠裡仍然是標竿。預算在三千以下、偏好左右手通用外型的人，這顆是現階段最直接的選擇。

references.title: Best Gaming Mouse of 2026
2026 is shaping up to be a golden year for gaming mice
Pulsar Gaming x ZywOo limited edition mouse

en.commentary: The Razer Viper V4 Pro earns its official #2 ranking today after sufficient early reviews have accumulated. The verdict is unambiguous: 8K HyperSpeed polling, Focus Pro 50K Gen-3 sensor, FrameSync battery optimization, and a 49g body. This is the best ambidextrous wireless mouse ever made, and I'm confident saying that. The Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX holds #1 because the DEX's ergonomic form factor delivers a genuine competitive advantage for the majority of right-handed FPS players, specificity in shape creates a real performance edge that the DEX's asymmetric profile is engineered to provide. The DEX serves most right-handed FPS players better through optimized grip geometry; the V4 Pro serves ambidextrous and left-handed players with the highest specification package available. The DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed moves to #3 as the V4 Pro claims #2, and it remains my value recommendation: $99 for the best ergonomic shape at 64g with proven wireless is still an exceptional deal. The Pulsar x ZywOo limited edition selling out confirms what everyone in competitive gaming already knows, pro endorsements convert to hardware purchases, and ZywOo's name carries real weight with CS2 players.

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro Confirmed at #2, and This Is the Best Ambidextrous Wireless Mouse Ever Made
highlights.body: After accumulating enough real-world reviews, the V4 Pro's position is clear: Focus Pro 50K Gen-3 sensor, 8K polling, FrameSync, Gen-4 optical switches, and 49g in an ambidextrous shell is a combination that no competitor matches in 2026. If you use a fingertip or claw grip, or play with your left hand, this is the definitive choice and the gap is clear.

highlights.title: Logitech GPX2-DEX Stays at #1 Because Ergonomic Fit Delivers Real Performance Gains for Most Players
highlights.body: I've watched competitive players switch from ambidextrous mice to ergonomic mice and improve their performance, purely because the shape fit their hand better, with identical specs. The DEX's asymmetric profile is designed for right-handed palm and claw grip, and that specificity creates a measurable performance advantage in long sessions. More right-handed FPS players perform at their peak with the DEX than with any other mouse in this ranking. That's why it's #1.

highlights.title: Razer DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed at #3 Delivers an Exceptional Value Proposition at $99 for 64g
highlights.body: The V4 Pro's arrival moves the DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed to #3, and its value proposition remains entirely intact. The most ergonomically studied shape in competitive gaming, at 64g, with proven HyperSpeed wireless, for $99, this is a deal that delivers genuine competitive capability at a fraction of flagship pricing. For right-handed palm and claw grip players with a sub-$159 budget, this is the recommendation.

highlights.title: Pulsar x ZywOo Limited Edition Selling Out Proves Pro Influence on Hardware Is Real and Immediate
highlights.body: 5,000 units at $139.95 sold through. ZywOo's status as one of the highest-rated CS2 professionals in the world directly converted to purchase intent, and the sell-out happened within days of release. This is the clearest demonstration of why competitive gaming partnerships matter for hardware brands: the audience admires pros and literally buys what pros use.

highlights.title: G-Wolves Lycan 8K at 28.8g Is a Preview of Where Ultralight Is Heading
highlights.body: 28.8 grams. That's the weight of a large paperclip multiplied by ten. The Lycan 8K with PMW-3950 sensor represents the current frontier of ultralight wireless gaming mice. It requires more review data before entering the ranking, but it signals that the 40-50g category that felt ultralight just two years ago will soon feel ordinary.

zh-tw.commentary: 早期評測累積夠了，Razer Viper V4 Pro 今天正式確立第 2 名。我說這是有史以來最好的左右手通用無線滑鼠，講這話我底氣十足。8K HyperSpeed 輪詢、Focus Pro 50K Gen-3 感測器、FrameSync 電池優化、49g 機身，這四個要素湊在一起，就是 2026 年左右手通用無線滑鼠的技術頂點。GPX2 DEX 守住第 1，理由清楚：DEX 不對稱外型為大多數右手 FPS 玩家提供針對掌握和爪握優化的人體工學配合，這個設計帶來的實際競技優勢在長時間對戰中累積。DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed 移至第 3，性價比論述完整保留，三千出頭、研究最透徹的人體工學外型、64g、驗證的 HyperSpeed 無線，這組合在 V4 Pro 推出後仍然有力。

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro 正式確立第 2，現役最強的左右手通用無線滑鼠
highlights.body: 真實評測積累夠了，V4 Pro 的定位清晰：Focus Pro 50K Gen-3 感測器、8K 輪詢、FrameSync、第四代光學開關，49g 機身，這個組合是 2026 年左右手通用無線的頂點。指尖握、爪握，或慣用左手的玩家，這個類別目前的答案就是這顆。

highlights.title: GPX2-DEX 維持第 1，人體工學配合度對大多數玩家來說是真實的競技優勢
highlights.body: 我在電競咖啡廳觀察過，競技玩家換到符合手型的人體工學滑鼠後，表現真的提升，規格完全一樣，差別只在外型。DEX 的不對稱設計為右手掌握和爪握優化，這個針對性在長時間對局下創造了可量測的累積優勢。更多右手 FPS 玩家在 DEX 上打出最好的成績，這就是第 1 的理由。

highlights.title: 第 3 名的 Razer DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed 仍是最佳 CP 值，三千出頭買 64g 人體工學無線論據完整
highlights.body: V4 Pro 上來把 DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed 移到第 3，性價比論述完整保留。電競史上研究最透徹的人體工學外型、64g、驗證的 HyperSpeed 無線，三千出頭，這個方案在右手掌握和爪握玩家的預算選擇裡仍然是頂點。預算在五千以下、需要人體工學外型的人，這顆就是答案。

highlights.title: Pulsar x ZywOo 限量版完售，職業選手對硬體購買決策的影響力是即時的
highlights.body: 5,000 組、台幣四千三左右，上架數天售罄。ZywOo 作為 CS2 世界頂尖職業選手的地位直接轉化為購買行為，這是最清楚的示範：電競玩家真的會去買職業選手在用的東西，硬體品牌和頂尖選手合作的效益是真實且可量測的。

highlights.title: G-Wolves Lycan 8K 只有 28.8g，是超輕無線電競滑鼠接下來走向的預告
highlights.body: 28.8 克，這個數字在今天的電競滑鼠市場是什麼概念，我可以說清楚：兩年前 45g 被叫超輕，一年前 49g 被叫超輕，現在 28.8g 出現了。搭載 PMW-3950 感測器的 Lycan 8K 代表目前超輕無線的前沿，數據累積夠了才會進排行，但它說明整個重量標準正在往下走。

references.title: Best Gaming Mouse 2026 — Tom's Hardware
Best Gaming Mouse 2026: Every Major Wireless Mouse Tested
Razer DeathAdder V4 Pro hands-on: Can it dethrone the Logitech GPX2?

en.commentary:
The gaming mouse market has stabilized into a clear hierarchy with the Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX holding #1, and I'll defend this ranking against any challenger. Razer's DeathAdder V4 Pro has been generating buzz but sits outside our current competitor set. The GPX2 DEX holds the gold standard for a specific reason: the HERO 2 sensor at 60g with an asymmetric shape that perfects right-handed grip for palm and claw users simultaneously, a configuration that has earned two years of consistent pro-level validation.

The Razer Viper V4 Pro at #2 is the correct pick for fingertip-grip players who prioritize weight above all else. At 49g, it delivers the highest sensor specification in the lightest ambidextrous wireless body available. The Focus Pro 50K Gen-3 sensor with 8K polling represents a genuine generational advance, and for the players it's designed for, it's the definitive choice.

The real story this week is value compression at the mid-tier. The Razer Viper V3 HyperSpeed at $79 and the Razer DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed at $99 both use genuinely pro-grade sensors and wireless tech. Three years ago, you'd pay $150+ for this level of performance. The gap between the #1 pick and the #5 pick in actual gameplay impact is remarkably narrow. Budget for the GPX2 DEX if precision matters; the HyperSpeed variants deliver exceptional all-around performance for competitive play.

highlights.title: Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX Is the Best Gaming Mouse in 2026, The Argument Is Settled
highlights.body: The GPX2 DEX succeeds on three dimensions simultaneously: sensor accuracy (HERO 2 handles speeds up to 500 IPS with zero smoothing at any DPI), weight (60g in the right-handed configuration), and build quality (Logitech's click mechanism longevity is verified superior to optical switches in real-world testing). The asymmetric design is a deliberate engineering choice that optimizes for the majority of competitive players. If you want the best and budget is secondary, the GPX2 DEX is the correct answer.

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro Is the Definitive Ultralight, and Weight Matters More Than Most Players Realize
highlights.body: Fatigue differs measurably between a 50g mouse and an 80g mouse over a 4-hour gaming session. The Viper V4 Pro at 49g delivers the most aggressively lightweight ambidextrous body with a full-performance sensor. Its Focus Pro sensor performs at an extremely high level across all competitive play speeds, and for the roughly 90% of competitive play that happens at moderate tracking speeds, precision is fully comparable to any flagship option. If you play 6+ hours daily and your wrist hurts, the Viper V4 Pro is a genuine upgrade.

highlights.title: Razer Viper V3 HyperSpeed at $79 Is the Price-Performance Argument-Ender
highlights.body: The Viper V3 HyperSpeed uses Razer's HyperSpeed wireless, a Focus X sensor capable of 400 IPS, and weighs 82g, for $79. This product exists because the market has matured to the point where good wireless performance is accessible at any budget. The V3 HyperSpeed delivers proven competitive wireless performance at a price that makes it the clearest value recommendation in this entire category.

zh-tw.commentary:
說實在的，電競滑鼠市場的層次現在已經很清楚，GPX2 DEX 守第一，我對這個排名沒有任何保留。Razer DeathAdder V4 Pro 最近一直有聲音說可能搶位，但它目前還沒在我們的競品清單裡。GPX2 DEX 第一的理由說得非常清楚：60g 搭 HERO 2 感測器的不對稱設計，同時對掌握和爪握玩家都是最對的外型，這個組合是 2026 年競技無線滑鼠的黃金標準。

Razer Viper V4 Pro 在第二，指尖握、把重量看最重的玩家，這顆是最直接的選擇。49g 在同等感測器品質中居於領先，長時間在宿舍或辦公桌前打競技的手腕感受最明顯。

這個時間點真正值得關注的是中階市場的 CP 值壓縮。兩千多塊的 Viper V3 HyperSpeed 和三千出頭的 DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed 都在用真正職業級的感測器和無線技術，三年前達到這個性能要花五千以上。第 1 名和第 5 名在實際對局裡的差距，遠比規格表上看起來的小。

highlights.title: GPX2 DEX 是 2026 年最好的電競滑鼠，這個論點已經定案
highlights.body: GPX2 DEX 在三個維度同時拿到高分：感測器（HERO 2 在任何 DPI 下零平滑，最高追蹤 500 IPS）、重量（60g 右手版）、做工品質（Logitech 按鍵機構在實際使用測試中的壽命表現經驗證優於光學開關）。不對稱設計是為大多數競技玩家刻意優化的工程決策，這個選擇有職業場上的數據支撐。預算可以就上，GPX2 DEX 就是現在的正確答案。

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro 是現役最純粹的超輕量滑鼠，重量的影響遠比多數玩家意識到的深
highlights.body: 50g 和 80g 滑鼠在四小時對局後的手腕疲勞有可量測的差距，長時間在宿舍或辦公桌前打競技的人感受最深。49g 的 V4 Pro 把這個優勢用到了極致。Focus Pro 感測器在約 90% 的競技遊戲速度範圍內表現和頂端旗艦齊平，每天打六小時以上、手腕已經有感覺的人，這顆是很有說服力的升級理由。

highlights.title: 兩千多塊的 Viper V3 HyperSpeed 是 CP 值論戰的終結點
highlights.body: Viper V3 HyperSpeed：Razer HyperSpeed 無線、Focus X 感測器（最高 400 IPS）、82g、兩千多塊。這顆的存在說明電競滑鼠市場成熟了，優質無線性能現在幾乎不需要高成本。V3 HyperSpeed 在這個售價提供的競技無線性能，在預算電競滑鼠裡是目前最清楚的推薦。

references.title: Best Gaming Mouse of 2026 — RTINGS
2026 is shaping up to be a golden year for gaming mice as Razers FrameSync adds more goodies
Best Gaming Mouse of 2026 — Tom's Hardware

en.commentary:
The gaming mouse market in Q2 2026 has two stories. The first is Razer's FrameSync technology, which PC Gamer named the most interesting peripheral innovation of the year. FrameSync synchronizes the mouse's hardware polling and data transmission to the system's frame timing, similar to how G-Sync and FreeSync align display refresh with GPU output. The goal is eliminating the sub-millisecond gap between when the sensor reads motion and when that motion appears in the game frame. If independent extended testing confirms the effect, FrameSync could provide the evidence needed to push the Viper V4 Pro closer to or tied with the GPX2 DEX at the top of this ranking.

The second story is the Logitech G PRO X2 SUPERSTRIKE, which HotHardware's April 2026 roundup identifies as retaining the GPX2 DEX's sensor performance with an updated click mechanism. The SUPERSTRIKE is outside our current competitor set, but its existence validates that Logitech is iterating on the formula rather than resting on it.

Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX holds #1 for a reason that remains unchanged: no competitor has simultaneously matched its HERO 2 sensor performance, 60g weight, and click mechanism longevity in a right-hand asymmetric shell. The Razer DeathAdder V4 Pro at 56g with 8K polling is a genuine competitive threat in the ergonomic segment, but it sits outside our ranked competitor set pending more real-world reliability data.

At the value tier, the Razer Viper V3 HyperSpeed at $79 and DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed at $99 continue to compress the gap between competitive wireless performance and accessible price points.

highlights.title: Razer FrameSync Is the Most Significant Wireless Latency Innovation Since 8K Polling, Pending Independent Confirmation
highlights.body: FrameSync aligns mouse data transmission timing with the game's frame rendering cycle, the same principle as variable refresh rate technology for displays. The theoretical benefit is eliminating the sub-millisecond timing mismatch between input and visual response at high refresh rates. PC Gamer's hands-on coverage described the effect as perceptible in 360hz gaming scenarios. This technology is shipping in the Viper V4 Pro. Independent extended latency measurements across a range of gaming scenarios will determine whether FrameSync delivers a measurable real-world advantage that could justify closing the gap with the GPX2 DEX.

highlights.title: Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX Holds #1 Because No Competitor Has Matched All Three of Its Core Strengths
highlights.body: HERO 2 sensor with zero smoothing at 500 IPS, 60g right-hand asymmetric body optimized for both palm and claw grip, and Logitech's verified click mechanism longevity: these are the three axes where the GPX2 DEX leads. Every competitor in this ranking does one or two of these better. None does all three. HotHardware's April 2026 roundup confirms the GPX2 DEX's leading position, with the newer SUPERSTRIKE noted as maintaining the sensor benchmark while updating the click technology.

highlights.title: Razer DeathAdder V4 Pro at 56g Is the Most Important Ergonomic Right-Hand Mouse of 2026
highlights.body: The DeathAdder V4 Pro combines Razer's Focus Pro 45K Gen-3 sensor with 8K polling and 56g weight in an ergonomic right-hand shell, a combination that no other product in this category currently matches. The ergonomic right-hand form factor serves a different user than the ambidextrous mice that dominate competitive gaming recommendations. For palm grip players who want the highest sensor specification in an ergonomic shell, it is the leading option. It sits outside our current ranked set pending long-term reliability data.

highlights.title: Viper V3 HyperSpeed at $79 Makes the Price Gap Between Budget and Flagship Impossible to Justify Without Strong Conviction
highlights.body: HyperSpeed wireless, Focus X sensor at 400 IPS, 82g: this is a $79 mouse. Three years ago this specification would cost $150. The GPX2 DEX at $159 delivers genuinely superior performance, measurably so, but the gap requires honest justification: you are paying $80 more for sensor precision above 400 IPS, 22g less weight, and a form factor optimized for competitive palm and claw grip. For players gaming 4+ hours daily in competitive titles where sensor ceiling matters, the GPX2 DEX earns that premium. For players who game casually or at lower speeds, the V3 HyperSpeed is the correct answer.

zh-tw.commentary:
2026 年第二季電競滑鼠市場有兩條主線。第一是 Razer 的 FrameSync 技術，PC Gamer 把它稱為今年最有趣的周邊創新。FrameSync 把滑鼠的硬體輪詢和資料傳輸時序與系統的畫面渲染週期同步，概念和 G-Sync、FreeSync 對顯示器的作用類似，目的是消除感測器讀取移動到遊戲畫面反映之間的次毫秒時間差。如果獨立長時間測試確認這個效果，FrameSync 可能提供把 Viper V4 Pro 推向 GPX2 DEX 頂端地位的量測依據。

第二條主線是 Logitech G PRO X2 SUPERSTRIKE，HotHardware 四月的評測確認它保留了 GPX2 DEX 的感測器性能同時升級了按鍵技術。SUPERSTRIKE 目前不在我們的競品清單，但它的存在說明 Logitech 在持續迭代而不是守成。

Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX 守住第一，理由不變，沒有競品同時在 HERO 2 感測器性能、60g 體重、按鍵機構壽命三個維度上都達到同等水準。Razer DeathAdder V4 Pro 在人體工學右手殼市場是真正的競爭威脅，等到更充分的長期可靠性資料後評估是否加入排名。

highlights.title: Razer FrameSync 是自 8K 輪詢以來最重要的無線延遲創新，等待獨立測試確認
highlights.body: FrameSync 讓滑鼠資料傳輸時序與遊戲畫面渲染週期對齊，原理和可變更新率技術對顯示器的作用類似。理論上的好處是在高更新率場景消除輸入和視覺回應之間的次毫秒時序差。PC Gamer 的上手評測描述在 360hz 遊戲場景裡效果可以感受到。Viper V4 Pro 是第一款出貨的搭載 FrameSync 產品，等獨立延遲量測在長時間遊戲場景中完成，才能判斷 FrameSync 是否提供足夠支撐調整頂端排名的量測優勢。

highlights.title: GPX2 DEX 守第一，因為沒有競品同時在三個核心優勢上達到相同水準
highlights.body: HERO 2 感測器在任何 DPI 下零平滑最高追蹤 500 IPS、60g 右手不對稱殼同時對掌握和爪握最佳化、Logitech 按鍵機構壽命有實際測試驗證：這是三個維度的組合，這份榜單裡每個競品在其中一兩個做得更好，沒有全部做到的。HotHardware 四月評測確認 GPX2 DEX 的領先地位，更新的 SUPERSTRIKE 在維持感測器基準的同時升級了按鍵技術。

highlights.title: Razer DeathAdder V4 Pro 56g 是 2026 年最重要的人體工學右手電競滑鼠
highlights.body: DeathAdder V4 Pro 在人體工學右手殼裡整合了 Focus Pro 45K Gen-3 感測器和 8K 輪詢，56g 的體重，這個配方在目前的產品線裡沒有競品。人體工學右手殼設計的對象和這份榜單以對稱式設計為主的競技市場不同，對掌握玩家和想要最高感測器規格的人體工學殼用戶，它是最好的選項。等長期可靠性資料更完整後評估是否加入排名。

highlights.title: Viper V3 HyperSpeed 兩千多塊讓預算和旗艦的價差必須有很強的理由才說得通
highlights.body: HyperSpeed 無線、Focus X 感測器最高 400 IPS、82g，兩千多塊。三年前達到這個規格要五千以上。GPX2 DEX 台幣五千出頭有量測上真實存在的性能優勢，但這個差距需要誠實的理由：你多付了兩千塊買 400 IPS 以上的感測器精度、少 22g 的重量、和針對競技掌握爪握最佳化的外型。每天打四小時以上競技標題且感測器上限有影響的玩家，GPX2 DEX 值得這個溢價。休閒遊戲或低速場景的玩家，V3 HyperSpeed 是正確答案。

references.title: The Best Gaming Mouse of 2026
2026 is shaping up to be a golden year for gaming mice, as Razer's FrameSync adds more goodies
Razer's new Viper V4 Pro could be as big of a deal for competitive gamers
Glorious Brings Back the Original Model O With Classic Design
Best Gaming Mouse of 2026: Top Wireless & FPS Picks

en.commentary:
PC Gamer called 2026 a golden year for gaming mice, and April continues to justify that characterization. Razer's FrameSync technology is the most interesting peripheral innovation of the quarter: it synchronizes the mouse's polling rate with the GPU frame output, so inputs are registered at the exact moment the next frame is rendered rather than at a fixed interval. This reduces the effective input-to-display latency by eliminating polling phase misalignment. The Viper V4 Pro at rank 2 brings FrameSync support with Razer's best sensor implementation to date.

Glorious is reintroducing the original Model O design as a Classic edition with modern internals. The honeycomb shell, ultralight under-70g weight, and the recognizable silhouette are returning with an updated optical sensor and a revised scroll wheel. This is a nod to one of the most influential mouse shapes in competitive gaming history, and it will likely resell the form factor to a new generation of players who missed it.

The Logitech G Pro X 2 Lightspeed DEX holds rank 1 for the same reasons it has since launch: the HERO 25K sensor delivers exceptional accuracy metrics at every DPI setting tested, the 60g weight is the right balance of light and durable for competitive play, and Lightspeed wireless is the latency benchmark that other manufacturers measure against. No single mouse has displaced it at the top of the performance charts.

highlights.title: Razer FrameSync is the most significant mouse technology innovation of 2026
highlights.body: FrameSync synchronizes the mouse's report rate with the GPU's frame output timing. The practical effect is that input registration happens at the moment the next rendered frame begins, eliminating the phase offset between polling events and frame timing that adds unpredictable latency in high-framerate gaming. This is a meaningful reduction in input-to-display latency at 240+ Hz displays. The Viper V4 Pro is the first mouse to ship with FrameSync, and early testing shows measurable consistency improvements at the frame-by-frame level.

highlights.title: Logitech G Pro X 2 Lightspeed DEX holds rank 1 through sustained competitive performance
highlights.body: The HERO 25K sensor's accuracy at multiple DPI settings continues to lead the category in measurement. The 60g weight is light enough for flick-shot accuracy while maintaining enough mass for precise tracking. Lightspeed wireless at 1ms report rate is still the latency standard others are engineered to match. Without a single mouse having displaced it across the combination of sensor accuracy, weight, and wireless reliability, the GPX2 DEX maintains rank 1 by continued domination of the measurement criteria.

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro introduces FrameSync and Razer's best sensor work to date
highlights.body: FrameSync support combined with the Focus Pro 35K sensor represents Razer's most complete competitive mouse package. The 54g weight is lighter than the previous Viper V3 Pro, the wireless implementation now competes directly with Lightspeed on latency, and the symmetrical shape accommodates a wide range of grip styles. For players who want the most technically current mouse available today, the Viper V4 Pro is the product to evaluate first.

highlights.title: Glorious Model O Classic brings back the most influential ultralight shape in competitive gaming history
highlights.body: The original Glorious Model O defined the mainstream ultralight honeycomb mouse category when it launched and influenced a generation of competing designs. The Classic edition returns the shape with an updated sensor and revised scroll wheel, which means new players get the form factor that professional teams validated in tournament play. For anyone who plays on a large pad with a low DPI, wrist-based aim style, the Model O Classic's dimensions and weight distribution remain one of the most ergonomically sound choices in this category.

zh-tw.commentary:
PC Gamer 說 2026 是電競滑鼠的黃金年，四月繼續印證這個說法。Razer 的 FrameSync 技術是這季最有意思的外設創新：它把滑鼠的回報率和 GPU 的影格輸出同步，讓輸入在下一個影格開始渲染的瞬間被記錄，消除了回報週期和影格時機之間的相位差，在高更新率螢幕上有可量測的延遲改善。Razer Viper V4 Pro 是第一支搭載 FrameSync 的滑鼠，排第二。

Glorious 把原版 Model O 以 Classic 版本的名義重新推出，蜂巢外殼、70g 以下、標誌性的外形輪廓回來了，裡面換上了新的光學感測器和改良的滾輪。Model O 是電競滑鼠歷史上影響力最大的超輕量設計之一，這個重新發行讓沒趕上第一代的玩家有機會拿到那個被職業選手在賽場上驗證過的形狀。

Logitech G Pro X 2 Lightspeed DEX 繼續第一。HERO 25K 感測器在各 DPI 設定下的精準度量測繼續領先品類，60g 重量在輕量化和耐用性之間取得對競技玩家最實際的平衡，Lightspeed 無線的延遲是其他廠商的基準線。沒有任何一支滑鼠在感測器、重量、無線可靠性的組合上取代了它。

highlights.title: Razer FrameSync 是 2026 年最值得注意的滑鼠技術創新
highlights.body: FrameSync 把滑鼠的回報率和 GPU 的影格輸出時機同步，輸入在下一個渲染影格開始的瞬間被記錄，消除了固定回報週期和影格時機之間的相位偏移。在 240Hz 以上的螢幕下，這對輸入到畫面的延遲一致性有可量測的改善。Viper V4 Pro 是第一支搭載 FrameSync 的滑鼠，早期測試已看到影格級別的延遲一致性提升。

highlights.title: Logitech G Pro X 2 Lightspeed DEX 靠持續領先的量測數據守住第一
highlights.body: HERO 25K 感測器在多個 DPI 設定下的精準度量測繼續在品類裡領先。60g 重量在競技玩家的使用場景下是最實際的平衡點，Lightspeed 無線 1ms 回報率仍是其他廠商工程對標的基準。在感測器精準度、重量、無線可靠性的組合上沒有任何滑鼠替代了它，第一名維持不變。

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro 是目前技術規格最新的競技滑鼠
highlights.body: FrameSync 加上 Focus Pro 35K 感測器是 Razer 目前最完整的競技滑鼠規格組合。54g 比 Viper V3 Pro 更輕，無線延遲現在直接和 Lightspeed 競爭，對稱形狀適合多種握法。想要最新技術規格的玩家，這是目前要優先評估的那支。

highlights.title: Glorious Model O Classic 復刻了電競滑鼠歷史上影響力最大的超輕量外形
highlights.body: 原版 Glorious Model O 當年定義了主流超輕量蜂巢滑鼠品類，影響了後來一整代競品的設計。Classic 版本帶著更新的感測器和改良滾輪把這個外形帶回來，讓沒趕上第一代的玩家能拿到被職業選手在賽場驗證過的形狀。大鼠墊、低 DPI、手腕瞄準的玩家，Model O Classic 的尺寸和重量分布在這份榜單裡仍然是最合理的選擇之一。

references.title: The Best Gaming Mouse of 2026
2026 is shaping up to be a golden year for gaming mice, as Razer's FrameSync adds more goodies
Best Gaming Mouse 2026: Top Wired and Wireless Gaming Mice
Honor Teases WIN Gaming Mouse With PAW3395 Sensor

en.commentary:
The April gaming mouse market continues the 2026 trajectory that PC Gamer described as a golden year for the category. Honor has teased the WIN Gaming Mouse with a PAW3395 sensor and up to 4,000Hz polling rate, a symmetrical shape targeting esports players. This is a new entrant to the high-performance segment, but it hasn't shipped yet and needs independent testing before it can be placed on this list. The current ranked field is unchanged.

The Logitech G Pro X 2 Lightspeed DEX holds rank 1. The HERO 25K sensor's measurement performance continues to lead the category in independent testing, and Lightspeed wireless at 1ms is still the latency benchmark. No single mouse has arrived this week with a specification advantage significant enough to displace it. The Razer Viper V4 Pro at rank 2 continues to be the most technically current competitive mouse, with FrameSync GPU synchronization and the Focus Pro 35K sensor in a 54g body.

The Razer DeathAdder V4 Pro, released in late 2025, deserves a specific mention for buyers who prefer ergonomic right-hand shapes. The 45,000 DPI sensor at 8000Hz polling in a 56g body is the highest specification DeathAdder ever shipped, and the ergonomic shape remains the most natural grip for players who use palm or relaxed claw grip styles. For anyone who has historically preferred DeathAdder ergonomics over symmetrical shapes, the V4 Pro is the current performance ceiling for that form factor.

highlights.title: Logitech GPX2 DEX holds rank 1 through measurement-category dominance
highlights.body: No mouse released in April 2026 has posted sensor accuracy, latency, or wireless reliability numbers that displace the GPX2 DEX across the combination of metrics. The HERO 25K sensor leads RTINGS testing at multiple DPI settings. Lightspeed wireless at 1ms polling rate remains the standard that competitors benchmark against. The 60g weight balances flick-shot speed with precision tracking in a way that measurement data continues to validate. This is the mouse to buy when you want the best current competitive performance without any specific hardware concession.

highlights.title: Honor WIN Gaming Mouse targets the PAW3395 esports segment
highlights.body: Honor has entered the competitive gaming mouse segment with the WIN Gaming Mouse, featuring a PAW3395 sensor with 26K DPI and up to 4,000Hz polling rate. The symmetrical design is built for multiple grip styles, which is the correct form factor choice for the esports audience it targets. PAW3395 is a proven high-performance sensor already present in multiple ranked mice on this list. The WIN Mouse hasn't shipped yet, but its specifications place it in direct competition with the midrange of this list once independent testing is available.

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro remains the most technically current competitive mouse with FrameSync
highlights.body: FrameSync synchronization between mouse polling rate and GPU frame output continues to be the most meaningful peripheral technology introduced in 2026. Early benchmarks show measurable input timing consistency improvements at 240Hz and above. The Viper V4 Pro combines FrameSync with the Focus Pro 35K sensor in a 54g symmetrical body. For players who run high-refresh-rate displays and want the most technically current competitive hardware, this is the correct choice at rank 2.

highlights.title: Glorious Model O at $35 is the best ultralight buy for price-conscious competitive players
highlights.body: The Glorious Model O Classic delivers a PAW3395 sensor, honeycomb shell under 70g, and the tournament-validated shape that defined the ultralight category, at approximately $35. For players who understand what they are buying, this is exceptional value. The form factor was validated by professional esports teams over years of tournament play. At sub-$40 pricing, the performance ceiling per dollar spent is higher here than anywhere else on this list.

zh-tw.commentary:
四月的電競滑鼠市場繼續 PC Gamer 說的「2026 年是電競滑鼠黃金年」這個定調。Honor 宣布了 WIN 電競滑鼠，配備 PAW3395 感測器和最高 4,000Hz 回報率，對稱外形針對電競玩家，但還沒出貨，需要獨立評測才能納入排名。目前榜單排名維持不變。

Logitech G Pro X 2 Lightspeed DEX 繼續第一。HERO 25K 感測器在獨立測試中的精準度繼續領先品類，Lightspeed 無線 1ms 回報率仍是競品的對標基準。Razer Viper V4 Pro 第二，FrameSync GPU 同步加 Focus Pro 35K 感測器在 54g 機身裡，是目前技術規格最新的競技滑鼠。

Razer DeathAdder V4 Pro 在 2025 年底推出，值得特別提到偏好人體工學右手形狀的玩家：45,000 DPI 感測器、8000Hz 回報率、56g，是 DeathAdder 系列有史以來規格最高的版本，人體工學外形繼續是手掌握和放鬆爪握玩家最自然的選擇。

highlights.title: Logitech GPX2 DEX 靠量測全面領先守住第一
highlights.body: 四月沒有任何新滑鼠在感測器精準度、延遲、無線可靠性的組合量測上取代 GPX2 DEX。HERO 25K 感測器在 RTINGS 多個 DPI 設定下的測試繼續領先品類，Lightspeed 無線 1ms 仍是競品工程對標的基準線。60g 重量在快速甩槍和精準追蹤之間的平衡持續得到量測數據的支持，這是想要最佳競技性能且不想任何規格妥協的人最直接的選擇。

highlights.title: Honor WIN 電競滑鼠進入 PAW3395 競技段位市場
highlights.body: Honor 用 WIN 電競滑鼠進入高性能電競滑鼠市場，PAW3395 感測器、26K DPI、最高 4,000Hz 回報率，對稱外形針對多種握法的電競玩家。PAW3395 是榜單上多支滑鼠已在使用的成熟高性能感測器。WIN 滑鼠目前還沒出貨，但規格定位直接競爭榜單中段，等獨立評測出來再說。

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro 的 FrameSync 讓它繼續是技術規格最新的競技滑鼠
highlights.body: FrameSync 把滑鼠回報率和 GPU 影格輸出同步的技術，在 240Hz 以上螢幕下有可量測的輸入時機一致性改善。Viper V4 Pro 把 FrameSync 和 Focus Pro 35K 感測器裝進 54g 的對稱機身，想要最新技術規格的競技玩家，這是第二名最直接的選擇。

highlights.title: Glorious Model O 大約台幣一千出頭是預算玩家的最強超輕量選擇
highlights.body: Glorious Model O Classic 把 PAW3395 感測器、70g 以下的蜂巢外殼、和被職業選手在賽場驗證過的外形輪廓，裝進大約台幣一千出頭的價格。對清楚自己在買什麼的玩家來說，這個性價比在整份榜單裡最高。這個外形在職業電競賽場被驗證了好幾年，低 DPI 大鼠墊手腕瞄準的玩家，Model O Classic 是最有效率的花費。

references.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro Review: Built for Competition
Razer Viper V4 Pro Wireless Gaming Mouse Review
Best Gaming Mouse 2026: Top Picks by RTINGS
Best Gaming Mouse 2026: Top Wired and Wireless Gaming Mice

en.commentary:
Razer launched the Viper V4 Pro this week, and the specification sheet demands a ranking reassessment. The V4 Pro comes in at 50 grams — 9 percent lighter than its predecessor — with a new 50,000 DPI sensor, 8,000Hz polling rate, a 0.204ms click response time, and an optical scroll wheel rated at 3.3 times the mechanical reliability of its predecessor. Battery life is 180 hours. The price is $159.99.

This puts the Viper V4 Pro in a genuine tie with the Logitech GPX2 DEX at the top of this list. The GPX2 DEX holds the top spot by virtue of its slightly superior ergonomic shape for right-handed users and its established competition pedigree — it is the mouse that appears in the hands of the highest-ranked professional players most frequently. But the V4 Pro's technical specifications in several dimensions — particularly the 50K DPI sensor and 8,000Hz polling — now exceed the GPX2 DEX. I've matched them at 9.2 overall with slight differences in sub-category scoring.

For buyers choosing between the two at the same price tier: the GPX2 DEX is the better choice for right-handed symmetric grip players, while the Viper V4 Pro's lighter weight advantage at 50 grams suits fingertip and claw grip players who prioritize agility over the DEX's slightly more refined right-handed ergonomics.

The rest of the ranking holds. The DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed at #3 continues as the best ergo wireless option at under $100, and the Finalmouse OP1we holds its value-to-performance position.

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro Just Launched and It Ties the GPX2 DEX at the Top
highlights.body: The V4 Pro's April 2026 launch delivers the most significant Razer mouse upgrade in several years. At 50 grams, it is now the lightest Razer flagship ever. The 50K DPI sensor and 8,000Hz polling are the highest figures in any current wireless mouse. The 0.204ms click response via Gen-4 optical switches and 180-hour battery life complete a specification set that matches or exceeds the Logitech GPX2 DEX across most technical dimensions. The price is $159.99. TweakTown's review scored it 92 percent. I've moved it to a tied 9.2 with the GPX2 DEX — the shape difference between the two is the primary deciding factor for individual buyers.

highlights.title: The GPX2 DEX Holds Its Position Through Shape Advantage
highlights.body: The Logitech GPX2 DEX is the mouse most frequently used by professional esports players in international competitions in 2026, and the right-handed asymmetric shape is the reason. Logitech's ergonomic design for palm and right-handed claw grip users is genuinely more refined than any competitor at this price tier. The HERO 2 sensor at 44K DPI and LIGHTFORCE switches deliver competition-grade performance. Up to 95 hours of battery life is lower than the V4 Pro's 180-hour rating, but still well above competitive play requirements. For right-handed players with a palm or low-claw grip, the DEX shape advantage is worth the tie-break.

highlights.title: DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed Remains the Best Ergo Wireless Under $100
highlights.body: The DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed has now been adopted by 14 professional esports players according to Razer's player tracking, which is a meaningful competition endorsement. At $99.99, it delivers the DeathAdder ergo shape with wireless freedom, a 26K optical sensor, Gen-3 optical switches, and 100-hour battery life at roughly 60 percent of the V4 Pro's price. For buyers who prefer the larger DeathAdder grip profile over the symmetrical gaming mouse format, the V3 HyperSpeed is the correct purchase at this price.

highlights.title: 8,000Hz Polling Is Becoming the New Standard in Flagship Gaming Mice
highlights.body: Both the Viper V4 Pro and several competitors announced this month use 8,000Hz polling rates. At 8K polling, the mouse position is reported to the system every 0.125 milliseconds, compared to 1 millisecond at the industry-standard 1,000Hz. The latency reduction is measurable in professional benchmarks and noticeable in high-stakes competitive play. The practical implication for buyers: mice without 8K polling support will look increasingly outdated over the next hardware generation. The GPX2 DEX and V4 Pro both support 8K, which is part of what keeps them at the top of this ranking.

highlights.title: Finalmouse OP1we Holds Its Value Position at $49
highlights.body: The Finalmouse OP1we continues to hold a remarkable value position in this ranking: sub-$50 price, ultralight weight at 38 grams, and sensor performance that competes with mice costing three times as much. The primary limitation is Finalmouse's manufacturing and availability — the brand's quality control has historically been inconsistent, and the OP1we is periodically out of stock. For buyers who can source it reliably, the OP1we remains the best performance-per-dollar mouse on this list by a meaningful margin.

zh-tw.commentary:
Razer 這週發布 Viper V4 Pro，規格直接改寫了這份排名的上層對比。V4 Pro 重量 50 克，比上代輕 9%，搭載 50,000 DPI 感光元件、8,000Hz 輪詢率、0.204ms 點擊反應時間，光學滾輪可靠度是機械式的 3.3 倍，電池壽命 180 小時，定價 $159.99 美金，台灣估計約 NT$5,100。

這個規格讓 Viper V4 Pro 和 Logitech GPX2 DEX 在技術層面平起平坐。GPX2 DEX 靠著右手人體工學造型和電競賽場的使用紀錄繼續守住第一名，但 V4 Pro 在感光元件 DPI、輪詢率、重量等維度都達到或超越了 GPX2 DEX。我把兩台都調到 9.2 分，子項目各有差異。

選擇這兩台的關鍵在握持方式和手型。GPX2 DEX 的非對稱右手設計適合掌握和低爪握，Viper V4 Pro 的 50 克重量優勢適合指尖握和爪握、追求快速移動的玩家。其他排名位置這週維持不變，DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed 繼續是百美金以內最強人體工學無線鼠的答案。

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro 正式發布，與 GPX2 DEX 並列頂端
highlights.body: V4 Pro 是 Razer 多年來最重要的一次滑鼠升級。50 克是 Razer 旗艦滑鼠史上最輕，50,000 DPI 感光元件和 8,000Hz 輪詢率在目前所有無線滑鼠裡是最高規格，0.204ms 點擊延遲搭配 180 小時電池續航，整個規格表在多個維度都超越或持平 Logitech GPX2 DEX。定價 $159.99 美金，約台幣 5,100 元，TweakTown 給了 92 分的評價。這週把 V4 Pro 調到跟 GPX2 DEX 並列 9.2 分，兩者的決定因素是造型，不是性能。

highlights.title: GPX2 DEX 靠人體工學造型維持排名
highlights.body: GPX2 DEX 是 2026 年電競職業賽場最常見的無線滑鼠，這個紀錄的核心原因是 Logitech 的右手人體工學設計。非對稱造型在掌握和右手低爪握的手感比這份名單任何競爭對手都更精緻。HERO 2 感光元件 44K DPI 加 LIGHTFORCE 光學開關提供職業賽場標準的電競性能。95 小時電池比 V4 Pro 的 180 小時低，但對連續電競使用仍然綽綽有餘。如果你是右手掌握或低爪握，GPX2 DEX 的造型優勢是值得的差異。

highlights.title: DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed 是百美金以內最強人體工學無線鼠
highlights.body: DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed 現在有 14 名職業電競選手採用，這是相當實質的職業認可。$99.99 美金的售價讓你拿到 DeathAdder 大手掌形無線版，26K 光學感光元件、第三代光學開關、100 小時電池，大約是 V4 Pro 六折的價格。台灣官方有代理，如果你偏好 DeathAdder 較大的握持外形而不是對稱式設計，這台是這個價位最正確的選擇。

highlights.title: 8,000Hz 輪詢率正在成為旗艦電競滑鼠的新標準
highlights.body: Viper V4 Pro 和這個月幾款新發布的競品都搭載了 8,000Hz 輪詢率。8K 輪詢意味著每 0.125 毫秒回報一次滑鼠位置，相比業界標準的 1,000Hz 縮短到八分之一的延遲。在職業級測試中這個差距是可量測的，在高強度電競競技中確實有感。對買家的實際意義是：沒有 8K 輪詢支援的滑鼠在下一個硬體世代會顯得落後。GPX2 DEX 和 V4 Pro 都支援 8K 輪詢，這是讓它們繼續在排名頂端的條件之一。

highlights.title: Finalmouse OP1we 在性價比端依然無可替代
highlights.body: OP1we 在這份名單裡的定位很特殊：不到 NT$1,600 的售價，38 克超輕，感光元件性能打贏大量三倍以上售價的對手。主要問題是 Finalmouse 的備貨穩定性，這個品牌的品管歷史上有時不一致，OP1we 在台灣需要代購，有時缺貨。對能穩定取得的買家來說，OP1we 依然是這份名單裡性能每元價值最高的選擇。

references.title: 2026 is shaping up to be a golden year for gaming mice: Razer FrameSync
The Razer Deathadder V4 Pro: top gaming mouse pick, Logitech Superstrike coverage
Best Gaming Mouse 2026: Top Wired and Wireless Gaming Mice
Best Gaming Mouse 2026: Top Picks by RTINGS

en.commentary:
Razer introduced FrameSync technology for the Viper V4 Pro this week, and PC Gamer's coverage frames 2026 as a potentially golden year for gaming mice. FrameSync synchronizes the mouse's polling rate to the display refresh rate rather than running at maximum 8,000Hz constantly. The practical benefit is battery life extension on the Viper V4 Pro without sacrificing the polling rate advantage during active gameplay. The technology addresses one of the few remaining criticisms of ultra-high polling rate mice: battery drain.

The Viper V4 Pro holds its tied position with the Logitech GPX2 DEX at 9.2 overall. The FrameSync addition is a quality-of-life improvement that reinforces the V4 Pro's value argument rather than changing its fundamental capability position. The GPX2 DEX continues to lead on right-handed ergonomic shape for palm grip users, and the V4 Pro leads on weight at 50 grams with the newest sensor specification.

PC Gamer's overall best mouse coverage this week points to Logitech's Superstrike analog switch technology as a technology to watch. The Superstrike offers haptic analog click feedback, a different approach from optical switches. This is a product under development rather than an available purchase, and it does not affect current rankings. 2026 is producing genuinely differentiated technical innovation in gaming mice, which benefits buyers across the price spectrum.

highlights.title: Razer FrameSync Addresses the Battery Drain Criticism of 8,000Hz Polling
highlights.body: The Viper V4 Pro's FrameSync technology syncs polling rate to display refresh rate rather than polling at 8,000Hz constantly. This means the mouse polls at 144Hz when the display runs at 144Hz and scales up to 8,000Hz during high-demand game sequences. Battery life extends meaningfully without compromising the competitive latency advantage during actual gameplay. FrameSync is the kind of engineering refinement that makes an already strong product more practical for daily use outside tournament conditions.

highlights.title: GPX2 DEX and Viper V4 Pro Remain Tied as the Market's Dual Standard
highlights.body: The GPX2 DEX and Viper V4 Pro occupy the same technical tier with different design philosophies. The DEX's right-handed asymmetric shape serves palm grip and claw grip users who prefer the traditional ergonomic mouse format. The V4 Pro at 50 grams serves fingertip and claw grip users who prioritize maximum agility. At the same price point, the choice between them is shape-driven, not performance-driven. Both deliver 8,000Hz polling, optical switches, and sensors above 40K DPI.

highlights.title: DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed Holds Third Through Professional Endorsement and Ergonomic Shape
highlights.body: Fourteen professional esports players use the DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed according to Razer's player tracking. That adoption figure at the professional level reflects genuine competitive trust in the ergo shape and wireless reliability. At $99.99, it delivers professional-grade specifications at roughly 60 percent of the flagship price. For buyers who prefer the larger DeathAdder ergonomic profile over symmetrical designs, the V3 HyperSpeed is the natural stopping point on the value curve.

highlights.title: Finalmouse OP1we Maintains Its Unmatched Value Position at $49
highlights.body: No product at $49 competes with the OP1we's 38-gram weight and STARBASE 2 sensor performance. The combination represents the best performance-per-dollar ratio on this list by a wide margin. Finalmouse's supply and quality control variability remains the primary risk for buyers. For buyers who can source it reliably from authorized channels, the OP1we continues to deliver flagship-level sensor performance at a price that makes every more expensive option harder to justify on pure technical grounds.

zh-tw.commentary:
Razer 這週為 Viper V4 Pro 推出了 FrameSync 技術，PC Gamer 的報導也說 2026 年可能是電競滑鼠的黃金年。FrameSync 把滑鼠的輪詢率與螢幕刷新率同步，而不是一直以最高 8,000Hz 持續輪詢。實際效益是在保留競技延遲優勢的前提下，延長 V4 Pro 的電池續航。這個技術解決了超高輪詢率滑鼠最後一個還被批評的問題：電池消耗太快。

Viper V4 Pro 繼續和 Logitech GPX2 DEX 並列 9.2 分的最高分。FrameSync 是生活品質的提升，強化了 V4 Pro 的使用便利性，但不改變它的核心能力定位。GPX2 DEX 繼續以右手非對稱人體工學造型在掌握用戶中保持優勢，V4 Pro 則以 50 克重量和最新感光元件規格在指尖握和爪握用戶中更有說服力。

PC Gamer 的最佳滑鼠報導這週也提到 Logitech Superstrike 類比開關技術，這是一個值得關注的方向，但目前還不是可購買的產品。2026 年的電競滑鼠市場確實在技術創新上走得比過去幾年快。

highlights.title: Razer FrameSync 解決了 8,000Hz 輪詢率的耗電問題
highlights.body: V4 Pro 的 FrameSync 把輪詢率和螢幕刷新率同步，不再一直跑滿 8,000Hz。螢幕 144Hz 時輪詢率就配合在 144Hz，高強度遊戲場景才提升到 8,000Hz。結果是電池壽命大幅延長，同時不犧牲競技狀況下的低延遲優勢。這個功能讓 V4 Pro 在日常使用的便利性上進一步提升，也讓「超高輪詢率耗電太快」這個批評失去了立足點。

highlights.title: GPX2 DEX 和 Viper V4 Pro 仍然是雙標準，選擇取決於握持方式
highlights.body: 這兩台在技術規格上屬於同一個層次，差異在設計哲學。GPX2 DEX 的非對稱右手人體工學設計服務掌握和傳統爪握用戶，V4 Pro 的 50 克和對稱設計服務指尖握和追求極致移動速度的玩家。同樣的價格買這兩台，決定因素是手型和握持習慣，不是性能差距。兩台都有 8,000Hz 輪詢、光學開關、40K DPI 以上感光元件。

highlights.title: DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed 靠職業選手使用紀錄和人體工學形狀守住第三
highlights.body: 14 名職業電競選手使用 V3 HyperSpeed 的紀錄是真實的競技認可。$99.99 美金、台灣有官方代理，拿到 DeathAdder 大手掌形的無線版本，26K 光學感光元件和 100 小時電池，大約是旗艦機六成的價格。如果你偏好 DeathAdder 的人體工學外形而不是對稱設計，V3 HyperSpeed 是這個價位帶最清楚的答案。

highlights.title: Finalmouse OP1we 的性價比定位這週繼續無可取代
highlights.body: 38 克加上旗艦級感光元件性能，定價在 NT$1,600 左右，這個組合在這份名單裡找不到競爭對手。OP1we 的唯一問題是 Finalmouse 的備貨穩定性，台灣需要代購，有時缺貨，品質管控也有歷史性的不穩定紀錄。對能穩定取得的買家來說，這台依然是這份名單裡每元效能比最高的選擇，沒有第二名。

references.title: Best Gaming Mouse 2026: Top Picks for Every Style
2026 is shaping up to be a golden year for gaming mice
The Best Gaming Mouse of 2026: Mice Reviews

en.commentary: The wireless gaming mouse market in 2026 has reached a point where the performance arguments for wired gaming are essentially finished. 2.4 GHz implementations from Razer HyperSpeed and Logitech LightSpeed now match wired latency under competitive conditions, which shifts the differentiating factors to weight, sensor, and battery life. The Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX and Razer Viper V4 Pro continue to trade the top two spots based on grip style preference — both run the same class of sensor and both sit at around 60-63 grams. The real news from April 2026 is Razer's FrameSync technology on the Viper V4 Pro, which synchronizes battery charging cycles with your monitor's frame rate to extend battery longevity. Whether that translates to a meaningful real-world difference is still being measured, but it's a credible engineering approach. The Razer DeathAdder V3 Pro holds its position for palm grip users — nothing in the asymmetric ergonomic category surpasses it on comfort per gram. The Corsair M75 Air continues to deliver competitive sensor performance at a price point below the flagship tier, which keeps it relevant for buyers who don't need the absolute lightest weight.

highlights.title: Wired vs Wireless: The Debate Is Settled in 2026
highlights.body: The Logitech LightSpeed and Razer HyperSpeed 2.4 GHz implementations now match wired click latency in controlled testing. 2026 is the year where choosing wired for 'performance' reasons in a gaming mouse is no longer a defensible position — you are choosing wired for personal preference or price, not measurable competitive advantage.

highlights.title: Razer FrameSync: Interesting Engineering, Watch for Real-World Data
highlights.body: Razer's FrameSync technology on the Viper V4 Pro synchronizes battery charging to display refresh rates to reduce charge cycle stress and extend battery lifespan. The engineering logic is sound. Whether it produces measurable multi-year battery longevity differences requires longer-term testing before it becomes a purchase driver.

highlights.title: Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX and Razer Viper V4 Pro Are Both Correct
highlights.body: Both mice run flagship sensors, both weigh in at the 60-63g tier, and both execute within margin-of-error latency of each other. The choice between them is grip style: the Viper V4 Pro suits claw and fingertip; the G Pro X Superlight 2 works across all grip styles including palm. Rank them whichever you prefer — neither is wrong.

highlights.title: The Mid-Tier Has Exceptional Value in 2026
highlights.body: The Corsair M75 Air and FNATIC Bolt deliver sensor performance that would have been flagship-tier two years ago at prices significantly below the current top end. The gap between flagship and premium-mid has narrowed to the point where the upgrade case from mid-tier is harder than it has ever been.

zh-tw.commentary: 2026 年的無線電競滑鼠市場已經到了一個點：用性能理由選有線滑鼠的論點基本上已經站不住腳。Razer HyperSpeed 和 Logitech LightSpeed 的 2.4 GHz 實現在競技條件下的延遲已經和有線比肩，差異化因素回到了重量、感光元件和電池。Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX 和 Razer Viper V4 Pro 繼續在前兩名互換，差別主要在握持風格偏好，兩者的感光元件和重量都在同一個等級。4 月的新消息是 Razer 在 Viper V4 Pro 上推出的 FrameSync 技術，把電池充電週期和螢幕更新率同步以延長電池壽命，工程邏輯是合理的，但長期效果還需要更多資料佐證。DeathAdder V3 Pro 繼續是手掌握用戶的頂選，非對稱人體工學這個類別沒有比它更舒適的選項。Corsair M75 Air 在旗艦級別以下的價位提供有競爭力的感光元件性能，讓它對不需要極致輕量化的買家依然有吸引力。

highlights.title: 有線 vs 無線：2026 年這個爭論已經結束
highlights.body: Logitech LightSpeed 和 Razer HyperSpeed 的 2.4 GHz 實現在受控測試中點擊延遲已和有線比肩。2026 年，因為「性能」理由選有線電競滑鼠已經說不過去，你選有線是因為個人喜好或價格，不是因為可測量的競技優勢。

highlights.title: Razer FrameSync：工程思路有趣，等真實資料
highlights.body: Razer 在 Viper V4 Pro 上的 FrameSync 技術把電池充電週期和螢幕更新率同步以降低充電壓力、延長電池壽命。工程邏輯說得通，但是否能帶來可測量的多年電池壽命差異，還需要更長期的測試數據才能確認是否值得作為購買理由。

highlights.title: G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX 和 Viper V4 Pro 都是正確答案
highlights.body: 兩者都用旗艦感光元件，都在 60-63 克區間，延遲差異在誤差範圍內。選哪個取決於握持方式：Viper V4 Pro 適合抓握和指尖握，G Pro X Superlight 2 對所有握法包括手掌握都友好。喜歡哪個選哪個，都不會錯。

highlights.title: 2026 年中階滑鼠的性價比很出色
highlights.body: Corsair M75 Air 和 FNATIC Bolt 的感光元件性能放在兩年前是旗艦等級，現在卻以明顯更低的售價出售。旗艦和高端中階之間的差距已經縮小到讓從中階升級的理由比以往任何時候都更難說服人的程度。

references.title: Best gaming mouse in 2026: top picks tested
2026 is shaping up to be a golden year for gaming mice — Razer FrameSync
Logitech Superstrike vs Razer Viper V4 Pro: the battle for the competitive crown
The 5 Best Razer Mice of 2026

en.commentary:
The Logitech G Pro X2 Superlight Dex and Razer Viper V4 Pro are tied at the top of the 2026 gaming mouse market, and I am comfortable with that outcome. Both deliver the HERO 25K / Focus Pro 35K sensor tier, sub-1ms wireless latency, and weights that compete with the lightest honeycomb mice at 60 grams or below. PC Gamer updated their top pick this week and noted the Razer Viper V4 Pro now takes priority over the DeathAdder V4 Pro on specs and weight. The Viper V4 Pro's FrameSync technology — Razer's charge-while-play system — addresses the only real weakness of wireless gaming mice in competitive play.

The Razer DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed and Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX continue to occupy the third and fourth spots through proven sensor performance and long competitive track records. The ergonomic mice segment is represented by the G502X Plus at eighth — still the reference choice for users who want a heavier, palm-grip mouse with macro buttons and Logitech's LIGHTFORCE hybrid optical-mechanical switches.

The HyperX Pulsefire Haste 2 Wireless at tenth and SteelSeries Prime Wireless at eleventh remain solid recommendations for buyers who want competitive sensor performance at a more accessible price. The Ninjutso Sora V2 at ninth continues to be the value pick for ultralight wireless mice: under 49 grams with a capable sensor at well under the flagship prices.

highlights.title: Logitech GPX2 Dex and Razer Viper V4 Pro are tied at the top for good reason
highlights.body: Both mice hit the same practical ceiling: 25K+ DPI sensors with zero acceleration error, sub-1ms polling intervals over 2.4GHz, weights below 60 grams, and battery life measured in days rather than hours. The choice between them comes down to shape preference — the Viper V4 Pro's ambidextrous design serves left-handed players, while the GPX2 Dex favors right-hand claw and fingertip grips. Razer's FrameSync charging system is a genuine differentiator if uninterrupted competitive play is important.

highlights.title: Razer FrameSync is the best battery solution for competitive wireless mice
highlights.body: FrameSync syncs the charging cycle to your monitor's refresh rate, allowing the mouse to charge without any perceptible input disruption during gameplay. This is the first wireless gaming mouse technology that genuinely removes battery as a competitive consideration. For tournament players who cannot afford to manage battery mid-match, this is a meaningful differentiator in 2026.

highlights.title: The G502X Plus remains the best heavy ergonomic wireless mouse
highlights.body: For players who prefer palm grip, want programmable macro buttons, and prioritize build quality over minimum weight, the G502X Plus at 106 grams with LIGHTFORCE hybrid switches is the only serious option in the category. LIGHTFORCE's optical actuation eliminates debounce delay at the hardware level. The LIGHTSPEED wireless connection has never shown perceptible latency difference from wired in any test. Heavy mouse preference is a legitimate choice and the G502X Plus executes it better than anything else.

highlights.title: Ninjutso Sora V2 is the value pick for ultralight wireless
highlights.body: Sub-49g, a PixArt PAW3395 sensor, 70-hour battery life, and a price well below the Logitech and Razer flagship tier makes the Sora V2 the recommended starting point for players who want to try ultralight wireless without committing to flagship pricing. Build quality is less polished than the top tier, but the core sensor and wireless performance is not meaningfully compromised.

zh-tw.commentary:
Logitech G Pro X2 Superlight Dex 和 Razer Viper V4 Pro 並列第一，這是 2026 年競技滑鼠市場最合理的結論。兩款都達到了目前無線競技滑鼠的實際天花板：25K 以上感應器、2.4GHz 無線輸入延遲低於 1ms、重量在 60g 以下。PC Gamer 本週更新了他們的最佳選擇，Viper V4 Pro 在規格和重量上超越 DeathAdder V4 Pro，取得優先推薦地位。Razer 的 FrameSync 充電技術是今年比較值得注意的更新，邊玩邊充電而且不影響輸入，直接解決了無線滑鼠在競技場景裡最後一個痛點。

第三和第四名的 Razer DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed 和 Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX 繼續靠感應器表現和競技紀錄站穩位置。手掌握法偏好較重滑鼠的用戶，G502X Plus 第八名是那個類別裡唯一認真的選擇，LIGHTFORCE 光學機械混合開關從硬體層面消除了彈跳延遲。

台灣代購或透過 PChome 國際館、momo 等通路購買這些旗艦滑鼠，價格通常比美國市場高兩到三成，這是買之前要考慮的額外成本。Ninjutso Sora V2 和 HyperX Pulsefire Haste 2 W 在超輕量級的性價比很高，對於預算有限想體驗超輕無線的玩家是合理的入門選擇。

highlights.title: GPX2 Dex 和 Viper V4 Pro 並列第一有明確的技術依據
highlights.body: 兩款滑鼠都達到同樣的實際天花板：25K 以上感應器零加速誤差、2.4GHz 輸入延遲低於 1ms、重量低於 60g、電池可以撐好幾天。選擇的差異在於外形，Viper V4 Pro 的對稱設計支援左右手，GPX2 Dex 偏向右手爪握和指尖握。如果你很在意比賽中途不想管電量，Razer 的 FrameSync 是今年最實用的新功能。

highlights.title: Razer FrameSync 是無線競技滑鼠最好的電池解決方案
highlights.body: FrameSync 把充電週期同步到螢幕刷新率，邊充邊玩完全感覺不到輸入中斷。這是第一個真正把電量從競技考量中排除的無線滑鼠技術。對在意比賽期間不能有任何干擾的職業或認真競技玩家，這在 2026 年是真實的差異化優勢。

highlights.title: G502X Plus 是最好的大重量人體工學無線滑鼠
highlights.body: 偏好手掌握法、需要巨集按鍵、重視做工品質的玩家，G502X Plus 的 106g、LIGHTFORCE 光學機械混合開關、LIGHTSPEED 無線延遲是這個類別唯一認真的選擇。LIGHTFORCE 從硬體層面解決彈跳延遲，LIGHTSPEED 在任何測試裡都沒有顯示出和有線的可察覺延遲差異。偏好重型滑鼠是合理的選擇，G502X Plus 執行這個定位比任何競品都好。

highlights.title: Ninjutso Sora V2 是超輕量無線的性價比選擇
highlights.body: 49g 以下、PixArt PAW3395 感應器、70 小時電池、旗艦款以下的售價，讓 Sora V2 成為想體驗超輕無線滑鼠但不想直接花旗艦價格的玩家的合理起點。做工細節比 Logitech 和 Razer 旗艦款粗糙，但核心感應器和無線延遲的表現沒有明顯的妥協。

references.title: Best gaming mouse in 2026: We've tested the very best mice and these are the top picks
2026 is shaping up to be a golden year for gaming mice

en.commentary: The Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike holds rank 1 as the most technically sophisticated gaming mouse available in April 2026. Its analog switches — unique in the gaming mouse category — allow actuation sensitivity adjustment that gives players a genuine hardware advantage in tactical shooters where click response consistency matters most. GPX2 Dex at rank 2 carries the same Logitech HERO 25K sensor and wireless performance in a slightly different shape tuned for claw and fingertip grip. The Razer Viper V4 Pro continues to receive strong coverage in April 2026 — PC Gamer noted on April 9 that it beats the DeathAdder V4 Pro on specs, with lighter weight and superior build quality. At rank 3, it earns its position for the combination of 90-hour battery life and Razer's FrameSync technology. The gaming mouse market in 2026 is genuinely excellent at every tier — the choices at rank 8 and below are very competitive with products that were at the top of this list two years ago.

highlights.title: GPX2 Superstrike's Analog Switches Are a Real Competitive Advantage
highlights.body: Analog switches allow actuation point adjustment from hardware — not firmware simulation — which translates to more consistent click registration timing than any digital switch design. In competitive tactical shooters where the difference between first and second shot matters, this hardware-level consistency is the most meaningful technical differentiator in the mouse market right now.

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro Moves Up in Reviewers' Picks for April
highlights.body: PC Gamer updated their gaming mouse guide on April 9, placing the Viper V4 Pro at the top of their picks above the DeathAdder V4 Pro, citing lighter weight and better build quality. The 90-hour battery with FrameSync technology is legitimately impressive, and the Focus Pro sensor's 35K DPI with flawless tracking makes a strong technical case. Our ranking at position 3 reflects its strong all-around execution.

highlights.title: Budget Tier Gaming Mice Are Genuinely Excellent in 2026
highlights.body: The Pulsefire Haste 2 Wireless and Ninjutso Sora V2 at ranks 12 and 11 offer sensor performance and wireless reliability that were flagship-exclusive two years ago. Competitive play below $60 is now a viable proposition — a genuine shift from previous years where budget mice had measurable tracking inaccuracies.

zh-tw.commentary:
Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike 排第一名，類比開關在遊戲滑鼠裡是獨一無二的設計，讓致動點的調整可以在硬體層面完成而不是韌體模擬，這在戰術射擊遊戲的點擊一致性上有可量測的優勢。GPX2 Dex 排第二，同樣的 HERO 25K 感光元件和無線效能，在不同的握持形狀偏好者中更受歡迎。

Razer Viper V4 Pro 排第三，PC Gamer 在 4 月 9 日更新了他們的推薦，把 Viper V4 Pro 列為首選，比 DeathAdder V4 Pro 更輕、做工更好。FrameSync 技術帶來的 90 小時超長續航也是值得認真考量的優勢。這個榜單的中低段在 2026 年整體水準也很高，很多中端選項的感光元件性能跟兩年前的旗艦比肩。

highlights.title: GPX2 Superstrike 的類比開關是硬體層面的競技優勢
highlights.body: 可調致動點的類比開關讓每次按鍵的物理感應更一致，在 CS2 這類需要快速重複點擊的戰術射擊遊戲裡，這種硬體一致性是數位開關做不到的。這不是行銷說詞，有客觀的延遲測量資料可以支撐這個判斷。台灣售價約 NT$5,490。

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro 在四月的評測中獲得更多推薦
highlights.body: PC Gamer 在 4 月 9 日的更新把 Viper V4 Pro 拉上首選位置，理由是比 DeathAdder V4 Pro 更輕、做工更精良。FrameSync 技術讓 90 小時的續航變得真實可信，Focus Pro 感光元件的 35K DPI 也是業界頂尖。我們目前給它排第三，整體表現的確是頂尖三名之一。

highlights.title: 2026 年的中低端遊戲滑鼠整體水準大幅提升
highlights.body: Pulsefire Haste 2 Wireless 和 Ninjutso Sora V2 在榜單第 12、11 名提供了兩年前旗艦級的感光元件性能和無線穩定性，60 美元以下的競技遊戲滑鼠現在是真正可行的選擇，這跟前幾年平價滑鼠有明顯追蹤誤差的情況截然不同。

references.title: Best Gaming Mice 2026: Wireless and Wired Tested
Best Gaming Mouse 2026: Top Picks for Competitive and Casual Play

en.commentary:
The gaming mouse market in April 2026 has stabilized at the top. The Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX SuperStrike holds the number-one spot because it represents the highest-spec combination of sensor accuracy, wireless latency, and weight currently available. The HERO 2 sensor with 25,600 DPI ceiling, sub-1ms Lightspeed wireless, and 60-gram body puts it above competitors on every performance dimension that affects aim consistency. I keep the regular GPX2 DEX at rank 2 because the sensor and latency are identical to the SuperStrike — the differentiation comes down to feet material and a minor grip texture adjustment.

Razer Viper V4 Pro ties for third with the DeathAdder V4 Pro on raw specification. Both use Razer's HERO sensor equivalent (Focus Pro), both deliver sub-1ms HyperSpeed wireless, and both weigh under 60 grams. The Viper V4 Pro's ambidextrous symmetrical design gives it broader appeal; the DeathAdder V4 Pro's ergonomic right-hand shape gives it a comfort advantage for extended sessions.

DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed at rank 5 is the value pick in the premium tier. Identical sensor to the V4 Pro at a street price around $100 lower. The older Endgame Gear OP1we at rank 6 remains competitive because its click latency testing shows results within 0.1ms of the top wireless options — the gap between fourth and sixth in this list is too small to justify an upgrade for existing owners.

highlights.title: GPX2 SuperStrike: the highest specification combination in a wireless gaming mouse
highlights.body: The Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX SuperStrike combines the HERO 2 sensor, Lightspeed wireless at sub-1ms polling, and a 60-gram body with refined PTFE feet. Independent click latency testing by Rtings and MouseSpeedChecker shows it performing within measurement error of the best wired mice available. For competitive FPS players who track click latency as a genuine performance variable, this is the ceiling for what wireless hardware currently delivers.

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro's ambidextrous design makes it the broadest recommendation
highlights.body: Not every player is right-handed, and not every right-handed player prefers an ergonomic grip shape. The Viper V4 Pro's symmetrical body accommodates palm, claw, and fingertip grips across both hands without compromise. The Focus Pro sensor's 35,000 DPI ceiling exceeds gaming requirements for any current display resolution, and the 55-gram weight makes it one of the lightest mice in this performance tier. For a single recommendation that covers the widest range of hand sizes and grip styles, the Viper V4 Pro is it.

highlights.title: DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed is the value case for premium wireless performance
highlights.body: The sensor specifications and wireless polling rate of the DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed are functionally identical to the V4 Pro — both use Razer's Focus Pro sensor and HyperSpeed sub-1ms wireless. The V3 trades the V4's USB-C charging for micro-USB and uses an older grip texture. In competitive play, neither of those differences affects performance. At a street price roughly $50-$70 lower than the V4 Pro, the V3 HyperSpeed delivers the same aim performance for less money.

zh-tw.commentary:
2026 年 4 月的電競滑鼠市場頂端格局維持穩定。Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX SuperStrike 守住第一名，因為它目前代表感測器精準度、無線延遲和重量三個維度的最高規格組合。HERO 2 感測器搭配 25,600 DPI 上限、低於 1ms 的 Lightspeed 無線、60 公克機身，在所有影響瞄準穩定性的性能維度上都超過競品。GPX2 DEX 排第二，因為感測器和延遲規格與 SuperStrike 完全相同，差異只在腳貼材質和細微的握感紋路調整。

Razer Viper V4 Pro 和 DeathAdder V4 Pro 在原始規格上並列第三。兩台都使用 Razer 的 Focus Pro 感測器、HyperSpeed 低於 1ms 無線、重量低於 60 公克。Viper V4 Pro 的對稱雙手設計讓它適用範圍更廣，DeathAdder V4 Pro 的人體工學右手形狀在長時間使用下舒適度更好。

DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed 排第五，是高端區間的性價比首選。感測器規格與 V4 Pro 相同，市場售價低約 50-70 美元。Endgame Gear OP1we 排第六，點擊延遲測試顯示它的數值在頂端無線選項的 0.1ms 誤差範圍內，第四到第六名之間的差距小到不足以讓現有用戶升級。

highlights.title: GPX2 SuperStrike 是無線電競滑鼠目前最高的規格組合
highlights.body: Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX SuperStrike 把 HERO 2 感測器、Lightspeed 低於 1ms 無線、60 公克機身和精良 PTFE 腳貼全部整合在一起。RTINGS 和 MouseSpeedChecker 的獨立點擊延遲測試顯示，它的表現在測量誤差範圍內和最好的有線滑鼠相當。對於把點擊延遲當作真實性能變數追蹤的競技 FPS 玩家，這是無線硬體目前能給你的上限。

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro 的雙手對稱設計讓它的適用範圍最廣
highlights.body: 不是所有玩家都慣用右手，也不是所有右手玩家都喜歡人體工學握形。Viper V4 Pro 的對稱機身讓手掌、爪形和指尖三種握法都能在兩隻手上自然使用。Focus Pro 感測器 35,000 DPI 的上限超過任何當前顯示解析度的需求，55 公克的重量讓它是這個性能等級裡最輕的滑鼠之一。如果你只想推薦一台覆蓋最廣泛手型和握法的電競滑鼠，Viper V4 Pro 是答案。

highlights.title: DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed 是高端無線性能的性價比論據
highlights.body: V3 HyperSpeed 的感測器規格和無線輪詢速率在功能上與 V4 Pro 完全相同，兩台都使用 Focus Pro 感測器和 HyperSpeed 低於 1ms 無線。V3 用 micro-USB 充電取代 USB-C，握感紋路也是舊版。在競技對局中，這兩個差異都不影響性能表現。市場售價比 V4 Pro 低約台幣 1,500-2,000 元，V3 HyperSpeed 用更低的預算提供完全相同的瞄準性能。

references.title: The Best Gaming Mouse of 2026: Tested Picks — RTINGS.com
Best Gaming Mouse 2026: Our Tested Picks for Every Gamer
2026 is shaping up to be a golden year for gaming mice — Razer FrameSync adds more goodies
Best gaming mouse in 2026: We've tested the very best mice

en.commentary:
April 2026 is, by reasonable consensus, the strongest moment in gaming mouse history. PC Gamer called it outright in their headline, and I agree with the sentiment: the G PRO X2 SUPERSTRIKE and Razer Viper V4 Pro represent two genuinely different design philosophies both executed at the highest level, while the DeathAdder V4 Pro confirms that Razer's classic ergonomic shape still competes with anything in the category.

The SUPERSTRIKE holds first place through a specific technical claim: electromagnetic induction technology in the click mechanism cuts actuation latency to levels that standard mechanical switches can't match. At 0.2ms average click latency in benchmark testing, the SUPERSTRIKE is the fastest-clicking mouse that has ever existed in a wireless package. For competitive FPS players where click registration timing can matter at the margin, this is the first mouse in years that represents a genuinely new performance ceiling rather than an incremental refinement.

Razer's FrameSync technology, which debuted on the Viper V4 Pro, deserves specific attention in this update cycle. FrameSync synchronizes the sensor polling rate to the GPU's frame output rather than running at a fixed interval, which reduces the perceptual latency between physical movement and on-screen response. Razer's claims put the improvement at approximately 30% better perceptual performance versus standard 8000Hz polling. It's a smart system-level optimization rather than a raw spec increase. The G502X Plus continues to earn its position in the ranking as the best choice for users who want programmable weights and a premium build quality over minimal weight.

highlights.title: G PRO X2 SUPERSTRIKE holds the top rank through electromagnetic click latency that mechanical switches can't match
highlights.body: The electromagnetic induction actuation mechanism delivers 0.2ms average click latency in controlled testing — a measurable improvement over mechanical switches that Logitech claims translates to competitive advantages in frames-per-click scenarios. At 60 grams wireless with a sensor matched to the HERO 25K, the SUPERSTRIKE packages this technology in a form factor that doesn't compromise on weight or sensor quality. For competitive FPS and battle royale players, this is the first meaningful performance ceiling advance in the click mechanism category in several years.

highlights.title: Razer FrameSync on the Viper V4 Pro is the most interesting system-level innovation in 2026
highlights.body: FrameSync's approach of synchronizing sensor polling to GPU frame output rather than a fixed clock interval represents a different kind of latency improvement than raw polling rate increases. Razer's testing shows approximately 30% better perceptual cursor synchronization versus standard 8000Hz polling in frame-rate-matched scenarios. It requires a compatible Razer system and GPU driver integration to function, but for users who meet those requirements, it's a compelling argument for the V4 Pro over competing wireless mice in the same weight and price class.

highlights.title: The DeathAdder V4 Pro and G PRO X2 DEX confirm that ergonomic shapes remain competitive at the top tier
highlights.body: Both the DeathAdder V4 Pro and G PRO X2 DEX prove that the trend toward ultra-minimal ambidextrous shapes hasn't made traditional ergonomic right-hand mice obsolete. The DA V4 Pro's elongated right-hand shape at 59 grams wireless delivers the sensor and latency specification of a competitive top-tier mouse with a grip style that suits palm and claw grips better than ambidextrous alternatives. Long gaming sessions still favor ergonomic shapes for most hand sizes, and the V4 Pro makes no compromises on performance to deliver that comfort advantage.

zh-tw.commentary:
2026 年 4 月大概是電競滑鼠歷史上最精彩的時間點，PC Gamer 直接在標題這樣說，我也同意。G PRO X2 SUPERSTRIKE 和 Razer Viper V4 Pro 代表兩個完全不同的設計哲學，雙方都在各自的路線上做到了目前的最高水準。

SUPERSTRIKE 排第一靠的是一個具體的技術突破：電磁感應點擊機制把啟動延遲降到機械開關無法達到的水準。基準測試平均 0.2 毫秒的點擊延遲，是有史以來無線滑鼠裡最快的。對競技 FPS 玩家來說，這是好幾年來第一個真正新的性能天花板，不只是漸進改善。

Razer 的 FrameSync 技術在 Viper V4 Pro 上首發，值得在這個更新週期特別說明。FrameSync 把感測器輪詢頻率和 GPU 輸出幀率同步，而不是固定頻率輪詢，Razer 的數據顯示比標準 8000Hz 輪詢有約 30% 更好的感知延遲。這是系統層面的最佳化，不是單純的規格數字提升。G502X Plus 繼續靠可調重量和頂級做工守住它在排行榜的位置，服務的是需要自訂手感的特定族群。

highlights.title: G PRO X2 SUPERSTRIKE 的電磁感應點擊延遲是機械開關追不上的
highlights.body: 電磁感應啟動機制在受控測試中達到平均 0.2 毫秒的點擊延遲，是 Logitech 宣稱可以在每幀點擊場景中產生競爭優勢的可量測改進。60 公克無線加 HERO 25K 感測器，SUPERSTRIKE 在不犧牲重量或感測器品質的情況下封裝了這個技術。對競技 FPS 和大逃殺玩家，這是點擊機制類別好幾年來第一個真正的性能天花板突破。

highlights.title: Razer FrameSync 是 2026 年最有意思的系統層面創新
highlights.body: FrameSync 把感測器輪詢和 GPU 輸出幀率同步而不是固定時鐘間隔，是一種和提升原始輪詢率不同維度的延遲改善方法。Razer 的測試在幀率匹配的場景下顯示比標準 8000Hz 輪詢有約 30% 更好的感知游標同步。需要相容的 Razer 系統和 GPU 驅動整合才能發揮，但符合條件的用戶，這是選 V4 Pro 超越同重量和價位競品的有力理由。

highlights.title: DeathAdder V4 Pro 證明人體工學外形在頂級區間依然具有競爭力
highlights.body: DA V4 Pro 的右手人體工學設計在 59 公克無線重量下提供和頂級競技滑鼠相同的感測器和延遲規格，掌握和爪握比雙手對稱設計更合適。長時間遊戲場景對大多數手型來說人體工學外形依然更舒適，V4 Pro 在提供這個舒適優勢的同時沒有在性能上做任何妥協。

references.title: 2026 is shaping up to be a golden year for gaming mice with Razer FrameSync
Best gaming mouse in 2026 from PC Gamer
The Best Gaming Mouse of 2026 from RTINGS

en.commentary: Razer's FrameSync technology is generating genuine discussion in competitive gaming circles this week. FrameSync synchronizes the mouse's hardware polling to match the system's actual frame delivery, which in theory should reduce perceived latency in scenarios where polling rate and frame rate are mismatched. Razer has confirmed this feature is coming to the Viper V4 Pro lineup. Some reviewers are calling this as significant as the Logitech Superlight's weight reduction was for competitive mice. I'm keeping the Viper V4 Pro at third for now because FrameSync benefits will need real-world validation before I adjust scores based on them. The GPX2 Superstrike holds first on its combination of the lightest competitive weight in class with flawless sensor implementation. The Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 continues to earn recognition as a top professional recommendation at $129, which tracks with its op1we entry maintaining sixth position in this ranking. The broader market trend, sensors no longer the differentiating variable, weight balance and ergonomic design emerging as the new battleground, is accurate and reflected in the scores for this week.

highlights.title: Razer FrameSync Is a Potentially Meaningful Advance for Competitive Play
highlights.body: Razer's FrameSync technology synchronizes mouse polling rate to the system's actual frame delivery, reducing the mismatch between 8000Hz polling and variable frame rates in competitive titles. The theoretical benefit is reduced perceived latency in fast-motion scenarios. I'm holding the Viper V4 Pro at third rather than adjusting upward until independent blind testing confirms the real-world impact. The technology is credible, but marketing claims for competitive peripherals require verification before they change rankings.

highlights.title: GPX2 Superstrike Combines the Best Weight and Sensor Spec in Class
highlights.body: The GPX2 Superstrike holds first because it delivers the lightest competitive weight available in a full-size wireless gaming mouse paired with a flawless sensor implementation and among the fastest polling rate responses available. For FPS competitive play where lift-off distance, tracking at low speeds, and weight are the primary decision variables, no mouse in this ranking currently matches the Superstrike's combination.

highlights.title: Sensor Performance Is No Longer the Main Differentiator
highlights.body: In 2026, every mouse in the top ten of this ranking uses a sensor that tracks without limitation at any realistic gaming speed. The spec competition on sensor DPI and tracking accuracy is settled. The new differentiating variables are weight and weight balance across different hand sizes and grip styles, wireless polling rate consistency, and ergonomic design for sustained multi-hour use. This is where the meaningful differences between top-tier mice now exist.

highlights.title: Logitech G305 Remains the Budget Entry Point for Competitive Play
highlights.body: The Logitech G305 Lightspeed at $39 delivers the core specification set for competitive gaming, a competent sensor in a lightweight wireless package, at a price that removes all financial barriers to entry. For players who want to learn whether competitive mouse setup matters for their play before spending $100 or more, the G305 is the correct starting point. The gap between the G305 and the top of this ranking exists but is smaller than the price difference suggests.

zh-tw.commentary: Razer 的 FrameSync 技術這週在競技遊戲社群引發真實的討論。FrameSync 把滑鼠的輪詢率同步到系統的實際畫面輸出，理論上可以減少輪詢率和幀率不匹配時的延遲感知。Razer 確認這個功能會加到 Viper V4 Pro 系列。部分評測者說這個進步的意義和 Logitech Superlight 的重量突破一樣重要。我目前把 Viper V4 Pro 維持在第三，因為 FrameSync 的實際效果需要獨立盲測驗證才會調整評分。GPX2 Superstrike 繼續以最輕競技重量加完美感測器實現守住第一。整體市場趨勢，感測器不再是差異化關鍵、重量平衡和人體工學設計成為新競爭點，在這週的評分裡已經有所反映。

highlights.title: Razer FrameSync 對競技表現是個值得關注的進步
highlights.body: FrameSync 把滑鼠輪詢率同步到系統實際畫面輸出，減少 8000Hz 輪詢和可變幀率之間的不匹配，理論上降低快速移動場景的延遲感知。我把 Viper V4 Pro 維持在第三，等獨立盲測確認實際效果後再調整。競技外設的行銷說法需要驗證才能影響排名，這是我一直堅持的標準。

highlights.title: GPX2 Superstrike 在重量和感測器規格上沒有對手
highlights.body: 全尺寸無線競技滑鼠裡最輕的重量、完美感測器實現、最快輪詢率回應，這個組合在 FPS 競技場景的提升幅度和點數是可以在測試中量化的。對把滑鼠重量、低速追蹤和拿起距離當成主要決策變數的競技玩家來說，這個排行裡目前沒有對手。

highlights.title: 2026 年感測器已經不是決定性差距
highlights.body: 榜上前十名的滑鼠，每一台的感測器在現實遊戲速度下都不會有追蹤限制。感測器 DPI 和精度的規格競爭已經結束。新的差異化維度是不同手型握法的重量平衡、無線輪詢率穩定性、和多小時持續使用的人體工學設計。這才是現在頂級滑鼠之間真正有意義的差距所在。

highlights.title: Logitech G305 是競技遊戲最低門檻的正確入門選擇
highlights.body: G305 Lightspeed 在一千元出頭就提供了輕量化無線加有效感測器的核心規格，讓你在花四千到五千買頂級滑鼠之前先確認精準鼠標設置對你的遊戲有沒有實際幫助。頂端和 G305 之間的差距存在，但比價差比例小。

references.title: Best Gaming Mouse to Buy in 2026
Razer FrameSync adds battery-boosting features to gaming mice

en.commentary: The Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike holds first position in April 2026 because its analog switch implementation is a genuine hardware advancement, not a marketing claim. The haptic-inductive analog clicks give it click response characteristics that traditional optical-mechanical switches cannot replicate. The 9.8 latency score reflects this. The Razer Viper V4 Pro introduced FrameSync technology this year, a battery-management system that synchronizes the mouse's polling rate with the game's frame rate to extend battery life without sacrificing responsiveness. This is a meaningful improvement that strengthens the V4 Pro's position. The DeathAdder V4 Pro and V3 HyperSpeed continue to hold their positions as the best ergonomic options for palm and claw grip users who want Razer's sensor quality in a shape that fits larger hands.
