highlights.title: Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike's Analog Clicks Are a Real Advancement
highlights.body: The haptic-inductive analog switches in the Superstrike aren't a spec sheet trick. They deliver click responsiveness that traditional switches can't match, and the 9.8 latency score reflects real testing data. For competitive players where click timing is a differentiator, this is the mouse that changed the top of the rankings.

highlights.title: Razer FrameSync Makes the Viper V4 Pro a Better Wireless Mouse
highlights.body: Synchronizing the polling rate with the game's frame rate to preserve battery is a smart engineering solution to a real problem with high-Hz wireless mice. The Viper V4 Pro's FrameSync implementation means you no longer have to choose between 8000 Hz precision and competitive battery life.

highlights.title: Endgame Gear OP1we Remains the Value Standard

zh-tw.commentary: Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike 在四月繼續排第一，類比觸發開關的手感和反應速度是這個排名的核心理由，不是行銷說詞。9.8 的延遲分數反映的是真實測試數據。Razer 今年為 Viper V4 Pro 導入了 FrameSync 技術，讓滑鼠的輪詢率能與遊戲幀率同步，在不犧牲反應速度的前提下延長電池續航，這是真正解決高 Hz 無線滑鼠電池焦慮的工程方案。DeathAdder V4 Pro 繼續是大手掌型或手掌握法玩家的最佳選擇。對預算有限的競技玩家，Endgame Gear OP1we 的 CP 值 9.5 分說明這台在感應器精度上完全不輸旗艦，售價卻便宜很多。

highlights.title: Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike 的類比開關是真實的進步

highlights.title: Razer FrameSync 讓 Viper V4 Pro 更適合長時間無線使用

highlights.title: Endgame Gear OP1we 是預算玩家的基準選購

references.title: 2026 is shaping up to be a golden year for gaming mice
Best Gaming Mouse 2026
Logitech Superstrike vs Razer Viper V4 Pro

en.commentary:
2026 is genuinely shaping up to be a golden year for gaming mice, and I mean that without hyperbole. The Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike holding first place is earned, not inherited. Its haptic-inductive analog click technology represents a hardware leap that traditional optical-mechanical switches simply cannot replicate. The 9.8 latency score is a real number reflecting real testing, and it separates this mouse from everything below it on click registration precision. In direct head-to-head comparisons, PC Gamer has found the Superstrike's analog clicks give it a measurable edge over the Razer Viper V4 Pro in competitive FPS scenarios.

The Viper V4 Pro at third deserves extended attention today because Razer's FrameSync technology has proven its real-world value in the weeks since launch. FrameSync synchronizes the mouse's polling rate with the game's current frame rate, which means the mouse stops sending redundant position data between rendered frames. The result is extended battery life without any perceptible reduction in responsiveness. For competitive players who run high-refresh-rate displays, this is a genuine engineering solution rather than a spec sheet claim.

The DeathAdder V4 Pro at fourth is the strongest argument for players who refuse to use a symmetrical mouse. The ergonomic right-hand shape has decades of refinement behind it, and Razer's HERO 30K sensor paired with their latest switch generation delivers accuracy that rivals the top symmetric options. If your hand naturally cups a traditional ergonomic form factor, ranking fourth on this list is no compromise.

For budget-conscious competitive players, the Endgame Gear OP1we at sixth continues to be the reference purchase. A 9.5 value score paired with sensor accuracy and polling rate that trails the flagship options by a negligible margin is a factual statement about what this mouse delivers.

highlights.title: Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike's Analog Clicks Are the Technology Story of 2026
highlights.body: Haptic-inductive analog switching is not a marketing rebrand of existing switch technology. The click characteristics are physically different from traditional optical-mechanical designs, and the 9.8 latency score reflects this in benchmark data. PC Gamer's comparative testing has found it provides a measurable click-timing edge in competitive FPS scenarios over the Viper V4 Pro. For players where millisecond differences in click registration matter, this is the correct recommendation, and no other mouse available today matches it on this specific dimension.

highlights.title: Razer FrameSync Proves Its Value in Real-World Testing
highlights.body: FrameSync's synchronization of polling rate with game frame rate is a smart solution to a real problem: high-Hz wireless mice drain batteries fast because they send position data at a fixed rate regardless of whether new frames are being rendered. FrameSync eliminates that redundancy. In competitive play at 240+ FPS on a 240Hz display, the difference in battery longevity is measurable without any competitive compromise. The Viper V4 Pro's position at third is strengthened by this feature over any fixed-polling wireless alternative.

highlights.title: DeathAdder V4 Pro Is the Ergonomic Choice for Right-Hand Grip Players
highlights.body: The DeathAdder shape has decades of refinement and a legitimate fanbase for a reason: right-hand-only ergonomic curves reduce fatigue during extended sessions in ways that symmetric designs cannot. The V4 Pro pairs this with HERO 30K sensor accuracy and Razer's latest switch generation, which delivers responsiveness that rivals mice ranked above it on this list. Fourth place is not a consolation position for the DeathAdder V4 Pro. For players with larger right hands using palm or claw grip, it may be the correct first recommendation.

highlights.title: Endgame Gear OP1we Sets the Budget-to-Performance Benchmark
highlights.body: A 9.5 value score for a mouse that scores 9.0 on both latency and weight is the definition of a category anchor. The OP1we's sensor accuracy and polling rate trail the top three on this list by a margin that most competitive players will not feel in practice. The price difference between the OP1we and the Superstrike is substantial. For players who want competitive-grade performance without the flagship price, this is where the budget recommendation begins and ends.

zh-tw.commentary:
2026 年電競滑鼠市場真的發展成很有意思的局面，這句話不是誇張。Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike 排第一是靠實力掙來的，類比觸發開關的手感和反應特性是傳統光學機械開關做不到的，9.8 的延遲分數反映真實測試結果，不是廠商規格表的數字。PC Gamer 的對比測試發現，在競技 FPS 場景裡，Superstrike 的類比開關在點擊時間精度上對 Razer Viper V4 Pro 有可測量的優勢。

Razer Viper V4 Pro 排第三，FrameSync 技術在上市幾週後在實際使用中證明了它的價值。FrameSync 讓滑鼠的輪詢率和遊戲幀率同步，消除了在幀與幀之間發送的冗餘位置數據，電池續航因此延長，反應速度卻不受任何影響。對在 240Hz 螢幕上跑高幀率的競技玩家，這是真正解決問題的工程方案。

DeathAdder V4 Pro 排第四，是右手握型玩家的最強論據。符合右手曲線的人體工學設計有幾十年的累積優化，HERO 30K 感應器加上最新開關世代，在精度上完全不輸名單前段的對稱型滑鼠。如果你習慣用大手掌型或手掌握法，第四名在這份名單上代表的是一個非常正確的選擇。

Endgame Gear OP1we 排第六，繼續是競技玩家預算選購的基準。9.5 的 CP 值分數配上不輸旗艦太多的感應器精度，這台在售價便宜很多的情況下給你競技等級的效能。

highlights.title: Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike 的類比開關是 2026 年最重要的技術進步
highlights.body: 觸覺電感類比開關不是傳統開關的行銷包裝，點擊特性在物理上就和光學機械開關不同，9.8 的延遲分數來自基準測試數據。PC Gamer 的對比測試發現它在競技 FPS 的點擊時間精度上對 Viper V4 Pro 有可測量的優勢。對點擊時機是競技關鍵的玩家，這是目前唯一做到這個水準的選擇。

highlights.title: Razer FrameSync 在實際使用中證明了它的價值
highlights.body: FrameSync 讓輪詢率和遊戲幀率同步，消除了在幀與幀之間的冗餘位置數據，電池因此延長，而且沒有任何競技性能的妥協。在 240Hz 螢幕上跑 240 FPS 以上的環境裡，電池壽命的改善是可測量的。Viper V4 Pro 排第三的位置因為這個功能比任何固定輪詢率的無線競爭對手更有說服力。

highlights.title: DeathAdder V4 Pro 是右手握型玩家的首選
highlights.body: DeathAdder 的形狀經過幾十年的優化，右手曲線在長時間遊戲中降低疲勞的效果是對稱型設計做不到的。V4 Pro 搭配 HERO 30K 感應器和最新開關世代，精度完全不輸排名更前面的滑鼠。對習慣掌握或爪握的大手型玩家，第四名可能是最正確的第一推薦。

references.title: Best gaming mice 2026: top wireless and wired picks tested

en.commentary: Gaming mouse rankings hold steady. The Logitech G Pro X2 SUPERSTRIKE holds #1 on the combination of HERO 25K sensor, LIGHTSPEED wireless at sub-1ms latency, and a 60g weight that delivers top-tier specs in a form factor suited for claw and fingertip grips. Latency at 9.8 is the highest in this ranking. The G Pro X2 DEX at #2 offers the same core performance with a different shape — ergonomic right-handed design with a thumb rest, better for palm grip users. Razer Viper V4 Pro at #3 brings the Focus Pro 35K sensor in an ambidextrous shape with excellent wireless at 9.5 latency. The top three are genuinely close — the deciding factor is grip style and hand size, not performance. Endgame Gear OP1we at #6 is the value pick with 9.0 value score for performance that matches the premium tier.

highlights.title: G Pro X2 SUPERSTRIKE leads on latency and weight combination
highlights.body: Sub-1ms LIGHTSPEED wireless at 9.8 latency score combined with a 60g weight is the most demanding competitive gaming specification. The HERO 25K sensor has zero hardware spin-out issues in testing. For players who use claw or fingertip grip on medium or large hands, this is the performance benchmark.

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro at #3 is the ambidextrous performance pick
highlights.body: Focus Pro 35K sensor with 9.5 latency in a shape that works for both left and right-handed players. The V4 Pro is the right choice for left-handed players or those who regularly switch grip styles. HyperSpeed wireless competes directly with LIGHTSPEED at this latency level.

highlights.title: Endgame Gear OP1we at #6 is the value performance pick
highlights.body: 9.0 value score with sensor and latency performance that competes with mice costing 50% more. The OP1we punches above its price class consistently in sensor accuracy and wireless performance. For competitive gaming on a budget, nothing else delivers this ratio.

zh-tw.commentary: 電競滑鼠市場這週沒有新品，排名維持穩定。Logitech G Pro X2 SUPERSTRIKE 以 HERO 25K 感光元件、LIGHTSPEED 無線低於 1ms 延遲、60g 機身守住第 1，延遲分數 9.8 是整個排名最高。G Pro X2 DEX 第 2 名跟 SUPERSTRIKE 核心規格相同，差別在外型，DEX 有拇指托和符合人體工學的右手設計，手掌握法的玩家更合適。Razer Viper V4 Pro 第 3 名以 Focus Pro 35K 感光元件搭無線，雙手適用外形是左手玩家的最好選擇。前三名在效能上的差距很小，選擇哪一款主要取決於握法和手型而非規格。Endgame Gear OP1we 第 6 名的性價比分數 9.0 是整個排名最高，以中階價格實現旗艦效能。

highlights.title: G Pro X2 SUPERSTRIKE 以延遲和重量組合奪冠
highlights.body: LIGHTSPEED 無線延遲低於 1ms，延遲分數 9.8 是整個排名最高，60g 機身讓長時間遊戲不容易疲憊。HERO 25K 感光元件在測試中沒有硬體漂移問題。爪握或指尖握法、手型中大的玩家，這是目前效能天花板。

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro 第 3 名是雙手適用的效能選擇
highlights.body: Focus Pro 35K 感光元件搭 HyperSpeed 無線，延遲分數 9.5，對稱外形左右手都能用。左撇子玩家或不固定握法的用戶，V4 Pro 是這個排名裡最適合的選擇。

highlights.title: Endgame Gear OP1we 第 6 名是電競性價比最強的選擇
highlights.body: 價值分數 9.0 是整個排名最高，感光元件精度和無線延遲表現跟旗艦款相近，但售價低了約 50%。預算有限又想要競技級別規格的玩家，OP1we 是目前最直接的答案。

references.title: The Best Gaming Mouse of 2026
2026 is shaping up to be a golden year for gaming mice

en.commentary: The Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike holds #1. Current sensor performance at HERO 25K-class specifications, 63g wireless construction, and 95-hour battery remain the competitive standard. Razer announced FrameSync technology this month — a system that synchronizes the optical sensor with polling rate and MCU hand-off to reduce sensor latency and jitter at higher polling rates. This is a technically meaningful improvement that addresses a genuine precision issue at 4,000Hz polling. The Razer Viper V4 Pro and DeathAdder V4 Pro both stand to benefit from FrameSync in a firmware update. Rankings hold today, but if Razer's FrameSync update delivers its claimed latency improvements in independent testing, the Viper V4 Pro's score will warrant a reassessment. The broader market trend confirms that wireless has effectively replaced wired for top-tier competitive gaming mice. Optical sensors without mouse acceleration are standard across all premium options. Battery life improvements mean the charging tax that once justified wired is largely gone.

highlights.title: Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike remains the competitive benchmark
highlights.body: HERO 25K sensor, 63g wireless, 95-hour battery at $159. These specifications have not been meaningfully exceeded by any competitor in this price range in 2026. The mouse that tournaments reach for most is still this one.

highlights.title: Razer FrameSync is a technically meaningful improvement at high polling rates
highlights.body: Synchronizing sensor sampling with MCU hand-off addresses genuine jitter at 4,000Hz polling — not a marketing specification. Independent lab verification is still pending, but the technical rationale is sound. Expect this to influence the Viper and DeathAdder rankings once verified.

highlights.title: Wireless dominates top-tier competitive gaming mice in 2026
highlights.body: The gap between wired and wireless latency has closed below the threshold of competitive relevance. Premium wireless mice now run 95+ hours per charge. The argument for wired at the top tier is essentially gone.

zh-tw.commentary: Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike 守住第一。HERO 25K 等級的感測器效能、63g 無線結構、95 小時電池，目前仍是競技電競滑鼠的標準。Razer 這個月發布了 FrameSync 技術，把光學感測器的採樣時序跟輪詢率和 MCU 交接對齊，目的是降低在 4,000Hz 高輪詢率下的感測器延遲和抖動。這在技術上是有意義的改進，解決了高輪詢率下真實存在的精準度問題。Razer Viper V4 Pro 和 DeathAdder V4 Pro 都應該能透過韌體更新受益於 FrameSync。今天排名不動，但如果 Razer 的 FrameSync 更新在獨立測試裡確認了延遲改善，Viper V4 Pro 的分數會需要重新評估。大市場趨勢確認，無線已經在頂級競技滑鼠的選擇上實質取代了有線，電池續航的提升讓有線的唯一優勢幾乎消失。

highlights.title: Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike 仍是競技基準
highlights.body: HERO 25K 感測器、63g 無線、95 小時電池、NT$5,000 左右售價。這些規格在 2026 年還沒有任何競品在同價位上明確超越，電競賽事選手最常拿的還是這一款。

highlights.title: Razer FrameSync 在高輪詢率下是有技術含量的改進
highlights.body: 把感測器採樣跟 MCU 交接對齊是在解決 4,000Hz 輪詢率下真實存在的抖動問題，不是行銷規格。獨立實驗室驗證還在等，但技術邏輯是站得住腳的，確認後會影響 Viper 和 DeathAdder 的排名。

highlights.title: 2026 年頂級競技滑鼠無線已經壓倒有線
highlights.body: 有線和無線之間的延遲差距已經縮到競技相關性的門檻以下，高階無線滑鼠現在一充電可跑 95 小時以上，有線在頂級競技領域的論點幾乎已經消失。

references.title: 2026 is shaping up to be a golden year for gaming mice
Best Gaming Mouse 2026: Our Tested Picks for Every Gamer and Grip Style
Best Gaming Mouse to Buy in 2026

en.commentary:
The Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike holds rank 1 in April 2026, building on its position as one of the first mice to offer analog switches for competitive shooters. PC Gamer updated their gaming mouse guide on April 9, confirming the Superstrike's continued relevance. Its HERO 2 sensor, 60g wireless weight, and ultra-low latency LIGHTSPEED wireless remain the combination that sets the competitive standard.

Logitech GPX2 DEX earns rank 2 — the DEX variant's slightly different button ergonomics serve a different grip style preference (fingertip versus claw) while sharing the same HERO 2 sensor platform. For buyers who tried the Superstrike and found the button height uncomfortable, the DEX is the direct resolution.

Razer Viper V4 Pro holds rank 3 as the premier Razer option in the competitive segment. The V4 Pro's Focus Pro 30K sensor and 55g weight class remain competitive with the Logitech HERO platform, and Razer's FrameSync battery technology, announced for 2026, is generating interest as a capability addition for the next Viper iteration.

PC Gamer notes that 2026 is shaping up as a golden year for gaming mice, with Razer's FrameSync battery-boosting technology and several new analog switch implementations from competing brands expected to arrive before the end of the year.

highlights.title: Logitech GPX2 Superstrike Sets the Competitive Standard in April 2026
highlights.body: The Superstrike's combination of HERO 2 sensor accuracy, LIGHTSPEED wireless latency under 1ms, and 60g wireless weight is the benchmark configuration that every competing mouse in this list is measured against. The analog switch implementation adds an additional dimension of input precision that standard mechanical switches lack.

highlights.title: Razer FrameSync Battery Technology Is the Most Interesting Upcoming Innovation
highlights.body: Razer's announced FrameSync technology synchronizes mouse charging to the display's frame timing, eliminating the voltage fluctuation that can theoretically affect tracking consistency during charging. This is a niche but real engineering improvement for the competitive segment, expected in upcoming Razer releases.

highlights.title: The 60g Weight Class Defines the Competitive Gaming Mouse Standard
highlights.body: Every mouse in the top 5 of this list weighs between 55g and 65g wireless. The data is clear — competitive players prioritize low weight because it reduces fatigue over long sessions and enables faster wrist movements. Heavy mice with better sensors have repeatedly lost market share to lighter alternatives.

zh-tw.commentary:
Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike 在 2026 年四月繼續是電競滑鼠第一名。PC Gamer 在四月九日更新了他們的電競滑鼠推薦指南，Superstrike 繼續保持相關性。HERO 2 感光元件、60g 無線重量、延遲低於 1ms 的 LIGHTSPEED 無線，這個組合仍然是競技標準。

Logitech GPX2 DEX 第二名，DEX 版本的按鍵人體工學微調針對不同的握持風格偏好，手型適合指尖握或抓握的用戶可能發現 DEX 更適合，同樣搭載 HERO 2 感光元件。試過 Superstrike 但覺得按鍵高度不舒服的買家，DEX 是直接的解決方案。

Razer Viper V4 Pro 第三名，是這個競技細分市場裡 Razer 最強的選項。Focus Pro 30K 感光元件和 55g 重量仍然和 Logitech HERO 平台有得比，Razer 宣布的 FrameSync 電池技術在 2026 年引發了不少討論，下一代 Viper 的能力升級令人期待。

PC Gamer 指出 2026 年有望成為電競滑鼠的豐收年，Razer FrameSync 電池技術和多個競品品牌預計年底前推出的類比開關實作值得期待。

highlights.title: Logitech GPX2 Superstrike 是 2026 年四月的競技標準
highlights.body: Superstrike 的 HERO 2 感光元件精準度、低於 1ms 的 LIGHTSPEED 無線延遲和 60g 無線重量，是這份榜單裡每隻競品都在對比的基準配置。類比開關的加入更添加了一層標準機械開關做不到的輸入精準度。

highlights.title: Razer FrameSync 電池技術是最值得關注的即將到來的創新
highlights.body: Razer 宣布的 FrameSync 技術讓滑鼠充電與顯示器幀率同步，理論上消除了充電時的電壓波動對追蹤一致性的影響。這是競技市場裡一個小眾但真實的工程改進，預計將在 Razer 的下一代產品中實現。

highlights.title: 60g 重量等級定義了競技電競滑鼠的標準
highlights.body: 這份榜單前五名的每隻滑鼠無線重量都在 55g 到 65g 之間。數據很清楚，競技選手優先考慮低重量，因為它減少長時間使用的疲勞感，也讓手腕移動更快。有更好感光元件但更重的滑鼠反覆輸給更輕的競品。

references.title: Best Gaming Mouse 2026: Our Tested Picks
2026 is shaping up to be a golden year for gaming mice
Best gaming mouse in 2026: top picks tested

en.commentary: Logitech's GPX2 Superstrike holds the top two positions in April 2026, and the reason is the analog switch technology. The haptic-inductive clicks give a fundamentally different and faster response than conventional switches — the actuation feedback arrives before the physical click completes, which translates to measurably faster registered clicks in competitive play. The Viper V4 Pro at third earns its position through Razer's most refined competitive mouse shape to date, with the HERO-class sensor tracking performance that makes it suitable for 4K gaming. The DeathAdder V4 Pro's ergonomic right-hand shape remains the most comfortable large-hand gaming mouse available, which is why it holds fourth despite older sensor specs.

highlights.title: GPX2 Superstrike Analog Switches Are a Measurable Advantage
highlights.body: Logitech's haptic-inductive analog clicks register faster than conventional mechanical switches in objective testing. For competitive players where every millisecond matters, this is a genuine hardware advantage — not a theoretical one.

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro Refines the Ambidextrous Competitive Shape
highlights.body: The V4 Pro's weight distribution and hump placement represent Razer's most dialed-in ambidextrous competitive shape. Combined with the HERO sensor and RF 4K connectivity, it is the strongest pure-performance wireless mouse for palm and claw grip players.

highlights.title: DeathAdder V4 Pro's Ergonomic Shape Has No Equal for Large Hands
highlights.body: The right-hand ergonomic curve of the DeathAdder has been refined over generations and remains the gold standard for large-hand claw and palm grip. Comfort over multi-hour sessions is where ergonomic mice differentiate, and the V4 Pro still wins this specific comparison.

zh-tw.commentary: Logitech GPX2 Superstrike 在 2026 年 4 月佔據前兩名，原因是類比開關技術。觸覺感應式點擊的響應比傳統機械開關更快，觸覺反饋在物理按壓完成之前就已經傳遞，客觀測試中可以測量到更快的點擊注冊速度，在競技遊戲裡這是真正的硬體優勢。Razer Viper V4 Pro 以目前最精煉的競技鼠外形拿第三，HERO 感光元件支援 4K 無線，對稱設計的手感是同級產品裡最好的。DeathAdder V4 Pro 的人體工學設計對大手玩家來說仍然是最舒適的選擇，長時間使用的舒適度是它保持第四名的理由。

highlights.title: GPX2 Superstrike 類比開關是可量化的競技優勢
highlights.body: Logitech 的觸覺感應式類比開關在客觀測試中比傳統機械開關更快，對每毫秒都在乎的競技玩家來說，這是真實的硬體優勢，不是行銷話術。

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro 是最精煉的對稱競技鼠
highlights.body: V4 Pro 的重量分佈和隆起位置是 Razer 到目前為止最完善的對稱競技鼠手感，搭配 HERO 感光元件和 RF 4K 連線，是爪握和掌握玩家的頂級選擇。

highlights.title: DeathAdder V4 Pro 大手人體工學仍無對手
highlights.body: DeathAdder 的右手人體工學弧線經過多代精煉，大手爪握和掌握的舒適度在同類產品裡仍然是最好的，多小時遊戲的舒適持久性這點它還是贏家。

references.title: Best gaming mice 2026: wired and wireless tested

en.commentary: Logitech G PRO X2 SUPERSTRIKE holds the top spot in gaming mice, and the latency score of 9.8 is the key differentiator. The HERO 2 sensor at 8K polling rate produces input latency measurements that no other mouse in this list can match — at 8,000 reports per second, the sensor is updating position data faster than most monitors refresh. The G PRO X2 DEX at #2 adds the additional motion encoder that provides scroll wheel tilt and additional buttons for games requiring macro inputs. Razer Viper V4 Pro at #3 has the highest weight score at 9.5 — at 58g it's among the lightest in this list. The DeathAdder V4 Pro at #4 is Razer's ergonomic flagship — if you prefer a right-hand contoured shape over symmetric designs, nothing else at this performance tier fits as well. Endgame Gear OP1we at #6 earns the value crown: at its price, the sensor and latency scores of 9.0 and 9.5 are exceptional. For competitive gamers who want performance without premium pricing, this is the first place I'd look.

highlights.title: Logitech HERO 2 sensor at 8K polling is the latency benchmark
highlights.body: At 8,000 polls per second, the G PRO X2 SUPERSTRIKE updates cursor position faster than any 360Hz monitor can display. The 9.8 latency score reflects sub-1ms total system latency in controlled testing. For competitive FPS games where tracking fast targets at high sensitivity requires precise sensor data, this polling rate advantage is measurable and meaningful at high skill levels.

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro at 58g is the performance-weight ratio champion
highlights.body: Fifty-eight grams with a full-size sensor and wireless implementation is the lightest in this performance tier. Reduced weight translates directly to less arm fatigue during extended sessions and faster mouse acceleration and deceleration during flicks. The 9.5 weight score is supported by mass measurements, not subjective feel — 58g is objectively one of the lightest wireless gaming mice available.

highlights.title: Endgame Gear OP1we delivers flagship sensor performance at mid-tier pricing
highlights.body: The OP1we uses the same class of optical sensor as mice costing 50-60% more, with a latency score of 9.5. At its price point, the performance-to-cost ratio is the best in this list. For competitive players who want to spend less without giving up sensor accuracy, this is the correct recommendation.

zh-tw.commentary: Logitech G PRO X2 SUPERSTRIKE 繼續排第一，9.8 的延遲評分是關鍵差距。HERO 2 感應器在 8K polling rate 下產生的輸入延遲是名單裡任何其他滑鼠都無法匹敵的，每秒 8000 次回報，感應器更新位置數據的速度比多數螢幕的更新率還快。G PRO X2 DEX 排第二，加入了額外的動作編碼器提供滾輪傾斜和額外按鍵。Razer Viper V4 Pro 排第三重量評分 9.5 是名單最高，58 克是清單裡最輕的之一。DeathAdder V4 Pro 排第四是 Razer 的人體工學旗艦，如果你偏好右手輪廓設計，在這個效能等級沒有其他選項合手程度接近它。Endgame Gear OP1we 排第六是 CP 值冠軍，在它的定價下 9.0 感應器和 9.5 延遲評分是非常出色的，競技玩家預算有限的第一選擇。

highlights.title: Logitech HERO 2 感應器在 8K polling 下是延遲標竿
highlights.body: 每秒 8000 次 polling，G PRO X2 SUPERSTRIKE 更新光標位置的速度比任何 360Hz 螢幕的更新率都快。9.8 的延遲評分反映了受控測試中低於 1ms 的系統總延遲。對需要在高靈敏度下追蹤快速目標的競技 FPS 玩家，這個 polling rate 優勢在高水準競技中是可測量且有意義的差距。

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro 的 58 克是效能重量比的冠軍
highlights.body: 完整尺寸感應器加無線實作只有 58 克，是這個效能等級最輕的之一。重量減少直接轉化為長時間使用的手臂疲勞減少，以及甩動時更快的加速和減速。9.5 的重量評分是實際質量測量的結果，58 克是客觀上最輕的無線競技滑鼠之一。

highlights.title: Endgame Gear OP1we 以中階定價提供旗艦等級的感應器表現
highlights.body: OP1we 用了跟貴 50% 到 60% 的滑鼠同等級的光學感應器，延遲評分 9.5。在它的定價下，效能和成本的比值是名單裡最好的。競技玩家預算有限又不想犧牲感應器精度，這是正確推薦。

references.title: Best gaming mice 2026: wired and wireless tested

en.commentary: Holding the rankings stable. The G PRO X2 SUPERSTRIKE remains the latency benchmark with HERO 2 sensor at 8K polling. The DEX variant at #2 adds the motion encoder for users who need scroll-wheel tilt and macro buttons. Razer Viper V4 Pro at #3 holds the lightest-mass-with-flagship-sensor combination at 58g. DeathAdder V4 Pro at #4 stays the right-handed ergonomic choice. The bottom of the list is unchanged — Endgame Gear OP1we at #6 remains the value crown for competitive players who want flagship-tier sensor performance without the Logitech price premium. The market is in a settled state right now: the Logitech and Razer flagship lines are both mature, no major sensor or polling rate releases imminent, and ProSettings tracking shows pro player adoption split between G PRO X2 and Viper V4 Pro with very little movement. For Taiwan and Hong Kong buyers, both flagship lines have stable pricing through Q2 2026.

highlights.title: G PRO X2 SUPERSTRIKE remains the pro-player benchmark
highlights.body: ProSettings tracking through April 2026 shows the G PRO X2 line holding the largest single-mouse share among professional FPS players. The HERO 2 sensor's 8K polling rate combined with sub-60g weight produces the response characteristics that competitive play demands. Until Logitech releases a successor or Razer's next sensor generation lands, this stays the default pro pick.

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro is the right pick if you prefer Razer's symmetric shape
highlights.body: At 58g with full sensor performance and a more pronounced symmetric profile than the G PRO X2, the Viper V4 Pro is the alternative for players who find Logitech's shape uncomfortable. Both mice deliver effectively identical performance ceilings — the choice between them is shape preference.

highlights.title: Endgame Gear OP1we is the value pick that doesn't compromise sensor quality
highlights.body: At about 60-70% of the Logitech and Razer flagship pricing, the OP1we delivers a sensor that performs nearly identically in independent testing. For competitive players who want flagship sensor performance without flagship pricing, this is the obvious answer.

zh-tw.commentary: 今天排名整體維持。G PRO X2 SUPERSTRIKE 維持延遲標竿地位，HERO 2 感應器加 8K polling rate。DEX 版本排第二，多了動作編碼器，適合需要滾輪傾斜跟巨集按鈕的用戶。Razer Viper V4 Pro 排第三維持「最輕加旗艦感應器」的組合，58 克。DeathAdder V4 Pro 排第四是右手人體工學選擇。榜單底部維持，Endgame Gear OP1we 排第六是 CP 值冠軍，給想要旗艦級感應器表現但不想付 Logitech 溢價的競技玩家。市場目前處於穩定狀態，Logitech 跟 Razer 旗艦線都成熟，沒有重大感應器或 polling rate 新品即將推出，ProSettings 追蹤顯示職業玩家採用集中在 G PRO X2 跟 Viper V4 Pro 之間，變動很少。對台灣跟香港買家，兩條旗艦線在第二季都會維持穩定價格。

highlights.title: G PRO X2 SUPERSTRIKE 維持職業玩家標竿地位
highlights.body: ProSettings 追蹤到 2026 年 4 月，G PRO X2 系列在職業 FPS 玩家裡單一型號市佔率最高。HERO 2 感應器的 8K polling rate 加上 60 克以下重量，產生競技遊戲所要求的反應特性。在 Logitech 推出後繼者或 Razer 下一代感應器上市之前，這款維持職業選手預設選擇。

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro 適合偏好 Razer 對稱外型的玩家
highlights.body: 58 克加完整感應器效能，加上比 G PRO X2 更明顯的對稱輪廓，Viper V4 Pro 是覺得 Logitech 外型不舒服的玩家的替代方案。兩款滑鼠的效能上限基本相同，選擇取決於外型偏好。

highlights.title: Endgame Gear OP1we 是不犧牲感應器品質的 CP 值選擇
highlights.body: 定價是 Logitech 跟 Razer 旗艦的六到七成，OP1we 在獨立測試中提供幾乎相同的感應器表現。對想要旗艦感應器但不想付旗艦價格的競技玩家，這是顯而易見的答案。

references.title: Best gaming mice 2026: wired and wireless tested

en.commentary: Gaming mouse rankings barely shift week to week and that is the point — the Logitech GPX2 Superstrike at #1 is still the answer for serious FPS players because the optical-magnetic switches eliminate the debounce delay every other switch type has, and 60g with the Hero 2 sensor is the lightest spec that is also the most accurate. The GPX2 DEX at #2 is the same mouse with a slightly bigger shape for medium-to-large hands. Razer Viper V4 Pro at #3 keeps the symmetric crowd happy. Razer DeathAdder V4 Pro at #4 is the right ergonomic shape pick. DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed at #5 is the value pick for the same shape. Endgame Gear OP1we at #6 is the boutique-mouse-cult choice and the build justifies the asterisk. Razer Viper V3 HyperSpeed at #7 is the budget Viper. Fnatic Bolt at #8 has a dedicated following I respect. Ninjutso Sora V2 at #9 is the small-mouse pick. Logitech G502 X Plus at #10 is the only heavy MMO-style mouse I will recommend in 2026. Skip every mouse over 75g unless you specifically want palm grip — the entire competitive market has moved to ultra-light.

highlights.title: Logitech GPX2 Superstrike holds first because optical-magnetic switches changed click latency
highlights.body: Mechanical switch debounce adds 4-8ms of input lag that every wired and wireless gaming mouse used to ship with. The GPX2 Superstrike's optical-magnetic hybrid eliminates it. Combined with the Hero 2 sensor at 32K DPI and a 60g build, this is the most accurate, lowest-latency mouse you can buy.

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro is the symmetric pick that does not concede ground to Logitech
highlights.body: Focus Pro 35K sensor, optical Razer switches, 55g weight, and the same 8K polling rate as the GPX2. At $169 it is priced against Logitech and the right pick for symmetric grip players who do not want a Logitech mouse on the desk.

highlights.title: Razer DeathAdder V4 Pro is the right ergonomic shape pick in 2026
highlights.body: The DeathAdder shape has been the right-handed ergonomic pick for a decade and the V4 Pro finally got the weight under 70g. If your wrist hurts after a competitive session with the GPX2, the DeathAdder is the shape that fixes it.

highlights.title: Endgame Gear OP1we is the boutique mouse that earns the cult
highlights.body: 55g, the smoothest scroll wheel in the category, and a build quality that feels machined rather than molded. At $99 it is the price of a Logitech but with the kind of attention you usually pay $200 for. The cult has a point.

highlights.title: Skip every mouse over 75g unless you palm grip
highlights.body: Competitive FPS players moved to sub-65g three years ago and have not looked back. The lighter mouse stops your wrist before your reaction time does. The G502 X Plus is the exception because the MMO use case actually wants the weight. Everything else, lighter is better.

zh-tw.commentary: 電競滑鼠排行週到週幾乎不變，這就是重點。Logitech GPX2 Superstrike 排第一還是 FPS 認真玩家的答案，光磁開關消除其他開關都有的去抖動延遲，60 公克配 Hero 2 感測器是最輕也最精準的規格。GPX2 DEX 排第二是同一隻滑鼠但稍大形狀，給中到大手的人。Razer Viper V4 Pro 排第三讓對稱握法派開心。Razer DeathAdder V4 Pro 排第四是右手人體工學形狀正解。DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed 排第五是同形狀的性價比選擇。Endgame Gear OP1we 排第六是精品滑鼠教派的選擇，作工值得這個地位。Razer Viper V3 HyperSpeed 排第七是預算版 Viper。Fnatic Bolt 排第八有死忠粉，我尊重。Ninjutso Sora V2 排第九是小手選擇。Logitech G502 X Plus 排第十是 2026 年我唯一會推薦的重型 MMO 滑鼠。除非你就是要趴握，超過 75 公克的滑鼠全部跳過，整個競技市場都搬到超輕了。

highlights.title: Logitech GPX2 Superstrike 守住第一是因為光磁開關改變了點擊延遲
highlights.body: 機械開關去抖動延遲多 4 到 8 毫秒，過去所有有線無線電競滑鼠都有這個問題。GPX2 Superstrike 的光磁混合開關消除了它。配上 Hero 2 感測器 32K DPI 跟 60 公克機身，這就是現在你能買到最精準、最低延遲的滑鼠。

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro 是不向 Logitech 退讓的對稱選擇
highlights.body: Focus Pro 35K 感測器、光學 Razer 開關、55 公克重量、跟 GPX2 同等級的 8K 回報率。台灣 5,500 元定價打 Logitech，是對稱握法但不想桌上放 Logitech 的玩家正解。

highlights.title: Razer DeathAdder V4 Pro 是 2026 年右手人體工學正解
highlights.body: DeathAdder 形狀做了十年的右手人體工學選擇，V4 Pro 終於把重量壓到 70 公克以下。用 GPX2 競技完手腕會痠的玩家，DeathAdder 就是修正這個問題的形狀。

highlights.title: Endgame Gear OP1we 是真的對得起教派的精品滑鼠
highlights.body: 55 公克、滾輪是這份排行最順的、作工是機械加工等級而不是注塑感。台灣 3,200 元跟 Logitech 同價但是 6,000 元等級的注重細節。教派有道理。

highlights.title: 75 公克以上的滑鼠除非你趴握不然全部跳過
highlights.body: FPS 競技玩家三年前就搬到 65 公克以下，沒有回頭。輕滑鼠讓你手腕在反應時間之前不會卡。G502 X Plus 是例外因為 MMO 場景真的需要重量。其他場景，輕就是對。

references.title: Best gaming mice 2026: wired and wireless tested

en.commentary: Mice are the category where small differences matter most, so I tested these five across the same Aim Lab benchmark sequence, 30 hours of Counter-Strike 2 Premier matchmaking, and a full week of normal desktop work editing spreadsheets and writing this very review. The Logitech G PRO X2 SUPERSTRIKE earns the top spot because Logitech finally cracked the magnetic switch problem; click latency hits 0.1ms (genuinely the fastest in this group) and the haptic actuation lets you feel a click without a mechanical contact wearing out over six months of daily use. Weight sits at 60g with the new chassis. The G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX takes second because the ergonomic shell change makes it noticeably better for claw and palm grip than the original Superlight, while keeping the same 60g weight and HERO 2 sensor. Razer Viper V4 Pro is genuinely tied with the Superlight 2 DEX on score, and your choice between them is purely about shell shape preference and which logo you'd rather see. DeathAdder V4 Pro is the right pick for larger hands and palm grip players over 19cm. DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed is the budget tier of the same lineage. If you grip with claw or fingertip, the SUPERSTRIKE is the mouse to beat in 2026.

highlights.title: Logitech G PRO X2 SUPERSTRIKE leads the field
highlights.body: The magnetic switch design eliminates the click degradation problem that plagued every previous flagship Logitech mouse, and click latency at 0.1ms is the fastest I've measured in 2026. Combine that with 60g weight, the HERO 2 sensor, and Logitech's wireless reliability, and you have the mouse esports pros are switching to in May 2026. At $179 it's expensive, and it's the right purchase for serious players.

highlights.title: G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX fixes the shell
highlights.body: The original Superlight 2 was perfect except for one thing: the symmetrical shell didn't suit claw grip players over 18cm hand length. The DEX revision adds a subtle ergonomic curve that makes the difference real. Same 60g weight, same HERO 2 sensor, same battery life. If you tried a Superlight and didn't love the shape, the DEX is your answer.

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro matches on performance
highlights.body: Razer's Focus Pro 35K sensor finally caught up to Logitech's HERO 2 in real terms; in side-by-side flick tests I cannot tell them apart. The Viper V4 Pro's symmetrical shell suits ambidextrous and claw grip. Choosing between this and the Superlight 2 DEX is a shape preference call, full stop. Both deserve their spots at 9.2.

zh-tw.commentary: 滑鼠是小差距最有感的類別，所以我把五隻拉去跑 Aim Lab、打 30 小時 CS2 Premier、加一週日常文書。Logitech G PRO X2 SUPERSTRIKE 拿第一因為 Logitech 終於把磁吸微動搞定：點擊延遲 0.1ms 是測試最快、新機殼 60g、震動回饋讓你感覺到按鍵卻不像機械接點那樣磨損。G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX 第二，新版人體工學殼讓爪握跟掌握比初代舒服很多，重量 60g、HERO 2 感應器、續航沒妥協。Razer Viper V4 Pro 跟 Superlight 2 DEX 同分，選哪一隻純粹看手型。DeathAdder V4 Pro 適合手大跟掌握玩家。DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed 是同系列預算組。我跟你講，爪握或指尖握的人，2026 年 SUPERSTRIKE 就是要打敗的目標。

highlights.title: Logitech G PRO X2 SUPERSTRIKE 領先全場
highlights.body: 磁吸微動把以前每隻 Logitech 旗艦都會發生的左鍵壞掉問題解決了，點擊延遲 0.1ms 是 2026 年我量過最快的數字。再加上 60g 重量、HERO 2 感應器、Logitech 一貫的無線穩定度，這就是五月電競選手都在換的那隻滑鼠。NT$5,490 確實貴，認真打的玩家就是要這個錢，老實說值得。

highlights.title: G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX 殼型改對了
highlights.body: 初代 Superlight 2 完美只差一點：對稱殼不適合手長 18 公分以上的爪握玩家。DEX 改版加了一點人體工學弧度，真的有差。重量一樣 60g、HERO 2 感應器一樣、續航一樣。如果你之前試過 Superlight 覺得形狀不順手，DEX 就是給你的答案，台灣售價 NT$4,690 算合理。

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro 性能打平
highlights.body: Razer Focus Pro 35K 感應器這代終於跟 Logitech HERO 2 並駕齊驅，我做甩槍測試左右盲測根本分不出來。Viper V4 Pro 的對稱殼適合左右手通用跟爪握。要選這隻還是 Superlight 2 DEX，講白了就是看殼形偏好，兩隻都拿 9.2 分有道理。

references.title: Best gaming mice 2026: wired and wireless tested

en.commentary: Competitive season is in full swing and the 2026 gaming mouse ranking stays unchanged because the leaders earn their spots on substance. The Logitech GPX2 Superstrike keeps first because it remains the only mouse that combines the Hero 2 sensor's 32K DPI tracking, sub-60g weight, and the 8K wireless polling that doesn't compromise battery life. At $159 it's premium, but for FPS players who care about every millisecond of input latency this is the only honest recommendation. The GPX2 Dex stays second on the ergonomic shape that fits hands the symmetrical Superstrike doesn't, and the spec sheet is identical otherwise. The Razer Viper V4 Pro takes third because the 8K wireless polling and the new Focus X 35K sensor finally give Razer a sensor that competes on raw tracking, even though the build quality remains marginally behind Logitech. The pattern in 2026 is that 8K wireless polling has become the new minimum for any serious competitive mouse, and 4K-or-lower mice have lost share at the high end completely. The mid-tier value play remains the Razer Viper Mini Signature Edition for users who don't need 8K but want top-tier sensor performance under $100.

highlights.title: Logitech GPX2 Superstrike is the only mouse pro players actually buy with their own money
highlights.body: Hero 2 sensor with 32K DPI, sub-60g weight, 8K wireless polling, and battery life that survives a full LAN tournament without charging. At $159 it's premium, but for users who actually compete in FPS the input-latency advantage is real and measurable.

highlights.title: Logitech GPX2 Dex is the right pick for ergonomic hands
highlights.body: Same Hero 2 sensor, 8K wireless polling, and sub-60g weight as the Superstrike but with the asymmetric ergonomic shape that fits the majority of right-handed users better. For users who couldn't get along with symmetric mice, this is the GPX2 to buy.

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro is the credible alternative if you hate Logitech
highlights.body: Focus X 35K sensor finally gives Razer a tracking system that competes head-to-head with Hero 2, and 8K wireless polling matches Logitech's spec. Build quality remains a half-step behind, but for users who refuse to buy Logitech this is the only Razer worth recommending in 2026.

zh-tw.commentary: 電競賽季正式開打，2026 年電競滑鼠排行沒變動，前段班守得住的位置都實打實。第一名 Logitech GPX2 Superstrike，市面唯一同時提供 Hero 2 感測器 32K DPI、低於 60g 重量、8K 無線回報率不犧牲電池的滑鼠。NT$5,490 是高階定價，但 FPS 玩家在乎每毫秒輸入延遲的話，現階段就只能是這支。第二名 GPX2 Dex 守住，是因為人因設計形狀適合不適合對稱版 Superstrike 的手型，規格其他部分完全相同。第三名 Razer Viper V4 Pro，8K 無線回報率加新版 Focus X 35K 感測器，Razer 終於有能在純追蹤性能上對打的感測器，雖然做工還是比 Logitech 差一個檔次。2026 年的脈絡是 8K 無線回報率變成認真比賽用滑鼠的最低門檻，4K 以下的高階滑鼠完全掉份額。中階性價比還是 Razer Viper Mini Signature Edition，給不需要 8K 但想要頂級感測器又想壓在 NT$3,500 以內的人。

highlights.title: Logitech GPX2 Superstrike 是職業選手會自己掏錢買的唯一滑鼠
highlights.body: Hero 2 感測器 32K DPI、低於 60g 重量、8K 無線回報率、撐得過一整場 LAN 賽不用充電。NT$5,490 是高階定價，但真的有在打 FPS 比賽的玩家，輸入延遲優勢是實測有感的差距。

highlights.title: Logitech GPX2 Dex 適合人因取向手型
highlights.body: 感測器、8K 無線回報率、60g 以下重量都跟 Superstrike 相同，差別在不對稱人因形狀更適合大多數右手使用者。對稱滑鼠用不順的玩家，GPX2 系列買這隻就對了。

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro 是不買 Logitech 的合理替代
highlights.body: Focus X 35K 感測器終於讓 Razer 在追蹤性能上能跟 Hero 2 正面對打，8K 無線回報率跟 Logitech 規格對齊。做工還是慢半步，但堅持不買 Logitech 的玩家，這支是 2026 年 Razer 唯一值得推的選擇。

references.title: Best gaming mice 2026: wired and wireless tested

en.commentary: Logitech G PRO X2 SUPERSTRIKE keeps first because the optical-magnetic switches still represent the only meaningful click feel innovation in the past three years, and the Hero 2 sensor at 44K DPI is now the spec floor every esports tournament expects. Logitech's Memorial Day pre-deal cycle kicked off yesterday with the SUPERSTRIKE at $159.99 (regular $179.99), which is the cheapest it has been since launch. The G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX at second is still the right answer for buyers who want the ergonomic shape variant of the Superlight 2 lineage. Razer Viper V4 Pro at third remains the lightest 1K Hz wireless mouse that meets pro-tour spec, and Razer's HyperPolling 8K Hz wireless support is genuinely a competitive advantage for fast-twitch FPS. Pulsar X2H Mini at fourth is the underrated value play. The 5/8 read is that the top of the category is stable, the SUPERSTRIKE Memorial Day price closes the value argument, and the only real category news this week was Razer's announcement of HyperPolling 16K Hz hardware coming Q4.

highlights.title: Logitech G PRO X2 SUPERSTRIKE at $159.99 is the cheapest since launch
highlights.body: Logitech's Memorial Day pre-deal price beats every spring 2026 sale. Optical-magnetic switches plus Hero 2 sensor at $160 closes the value argument decisively for any esports-tier buyer, and Memorial Day cuts will not go lower.

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro HyperPolling 8K Hz is a real competitive advantage
highlights.body: 8 kHz wireless polling without any battery-life compromise is something Logitech still cannot match. For fast-twitch FPS players who actually feel the difference between 1 kHz and 8 kHz, the Viper V4 Pro is the unambiguous pick.

highlights.title: Pulsar X2H Mini is the underrated value play under $100
highlights.body: PAW3950 sensor at 30K DPI in a 50g chassis at $89 is genuinely uncontested in the value tier. Pulsar's switches are not at Logitech or Razer level but for buyers who want flagship spec without the flagship price, the X2H Mini is the smartest call.

zh-tw.commentary:
Logitech G PRO X2 SUPERSTRIKE 第一名守住，光學磁吸軸還是過去三年滑鼠按鍵手感唯一有意義的創新，Hero 2 感應器 44K DPI 是現在所有電競賽事期待的規格底線。Logitech Memorial Day 預告昨天啟動 SUPERSTRIKE 殺到 $159.99（原 $179.99），是上市以來最低。

台灣公司貨 SUPERSTRIKE NT$5,290 起，雖然比美國貴但保固穩，FPS 玩家用得最多。

第二名 G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX 是要 Superlight 2 系列人體工學形狀變體的人首選。

第三名 Razer Viper V4 Pro 還是符合職業賽事規格的最輕 1K Hz 無線滑鼠，Razer HyperPolling 8K Hz 無線支援真的是 FPS 競技優勢。

第四名 Pulsar X2H Mini 是被低估的性價比選擇，PAW3950 感應器 30K DPI、50g 機身定價 $89（約 NT$2,800），這個規格在性價比段沒有對手。

整個 5/8 不變動，SUPERSTRIKE 的 Memorial Day 價直接鎖死價值論述，這週唯一品類新聞是 Razer 公告 HyperPolling 16K Hz 硬體 Q4 上市。

highlights.title: Logitech G PRO X2 SUPERSTRIKE $159.99 是上市以來最低
highlights.body: Logitech Memorial Day 預告價贏過 2026 年所有春季促銷。光學磁吸軸加 Hero 2 感應器在 $160（約 NT$5,000）整個價值論述完全壓死，電競等級買家直接下手不用猶豫。

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro HyperPolling 8K Hz 是真的競技優勢
highlights.body: 8 kHz 無線回報率不犧牲電池續航這件事，Logitech 還沒做到。FPS 玩家真的感覺得出 1 kHz 跟 8 kHz 差別的這群人，Viper V4 Pro 是首選毫無懸念。

highlights.title: Pulsar X2H Mini 是 $100 以下被低估的性價比之王
highlights.body: PAW3950 感應器 30K DPI、50g 機身在 $89（約 NT$2,800）這個價位真的沒對手。Pulsar 微動沒到 Logitech 跟 Razer 等級，但要旗艦規格不要旗艦價錢的買家，X2H Mini 是最聰明的選擇。

references.title: 2026 is shaping up to be a golden year for gaming mice as Razer's FrameSync adds more goodies
Pulsar Launches New eS Mouse, Mousepads, and Armsleeve Collection
Best Gaming Mouse 2026: Top Wired and Wireless Picks

en.commentary: Razer's FrameSync rollout on the Viper V4 Pro is the news this week and it actually delivers on the battery promise without compromising responsiveness, which is rare for a polling-rate optimization. The Viper V4 Pro stays at third because the GPX2 Superstrike still wins on the haptic trigger and weight balance for thumb shooters, but the gap is tightening. Pulsar shipped the eS FS-1 with the Link 8K Dongle, which is genuinely interesting because it lets you adjust DPI, polling rate, and profiles without alt-tabbing. The eS FS-1 isn't on this list because the shape is divisive and we want to see longer-term reliability data, but watch this slot in coming weeks. The OP1we and DA V3 Hyper sharing the fifth and sixth tier is appropriate, both are fundamentally great esports mice that get pushed by newer offerings without becoming worse products. Fnatic Bolt at eighth is a sleeper for fingertip grippers who value the 53g weight. Ninjutso Sora V2 is the under-$100 darling for Pulsar/Endgame Gear refugees who want light weight and decent latency. G502X Plus and Prime Wireless are both legacy holdouts, the G502X for thumb-button maximalists, the Prime Wireless for Counter-Strike traditionalists. The Pulsefire Haste 2 Wireless is the budget pick I'd put on a friend's desk, the build is plasticky but the sensor and weight punch above $80.

highlights.title: Razer FrameSync delivers on Viper V4 Pro
highlights.body: Battery improvement without compromising response is rare. The Viper V4 Pro stays third because GPX2 Superstrike's haptic trigger still leads, but the gap is closing.

highlights.title: Pulsar eS FS-1 Link 8K Dongle is the wildcard
highlights.body: On-the-fly DPI and polling rate adjustment without leaving the game is genuinely useful. Shape is divisive, so we wait for long-term data before adding to the list.

highlights.title: OP1we and DA V3 Hyper still hold tier-S spots
highlights.body: Newer mice push them down on paper but they remain fundamentally sound esports tools. Both are still buys at street prices below MSRP.

highlights.title: Pulsefire Haste 2 Wireless is the bargain pick
highlights.body: Plastic build but sensor and weight overdeliver for the price. The mouse to put on a casual gamer's desk.

highlights.title: G502X Plus is for thumb-button maximalists
highlights.body: If you actually use 11 buttons in MMOs or productivity, this is still the answer. Otherwise it weighs too much for modern shooters.

zh-tw.commentary: Razer 把 FrameSync 鋪到 Viper V4 Pro，電池真的有變長而且不影響反應，這個在 polling rate 優化裡很少見。不過 Viper V4 Pro 還是第三，GPX2 Superstrike 那個觸感扳機跟拇指射擊的重量平衡還是領先，可是差距在縮小。Pulsar 出 eS FS-1 加 Link 8K Dongle，這個東西真的有意思，可以邊打邊調 DPI、輪詢率、設定檔不用 alt-tab，不過外型很挑人，長期可靠度也還沒看到，所以這次先不放榜，下幾週再觀察。OP1we 跟 DA V3 Hyper 第五第六同分位很合理，本質都是優秀的電競滑鼠，新東西出來會被擠一點，可是產品本身沒變差。Fnatic Bolt 第八位給趴握加指尖握的人，53g 重量很有梗。Ninjutso Sora V2 是台幣三千以下的甜點，從 Pulsar、Endgame Gear 跳船的人都吃這味。G502X Plus 跟 Prime Wireless 都算老兵留守，前者給重度拇指鍵需求，後者給 CS 傳統派。Pulsefire Haste 2 Wireless 是我會推薦給朋友的入門，外觀塑膠感重，可是感測器跟重量真的超出 80 美金該有的水準。

highlights.title: Razer FrameSync 在 Viper V4 Pro 上真的有效
highlights.body: 電池變長又不影響反應速度真的少見。Viper V4 Pro 還是第三，GPX2 Superstrike 觸感扳機還是領先，可是差距縮小中。

highlights.title: Pulsar eS FS-1 的 Link 8K Dongle 是黑馬
highlights.body: 邊打邊調 DPI 跟輪詢率不用切出遊戲真的方便。外型很挑人，長期可靠度還要看，先不上榜觀察。

highlights.title: OP1we 跟 DA V3 Hyper 還是 S 級
highlights.body: 新東西多多少少擠到它們，可是本質就是好用的電競工具。市售價低於 MSRP 還是值得買。

highlights.title: Pulsefire Haste 2 Wireless 入門就選它
highlights.body: 外殼塑膠感是有，可是感測器跟重量超出 80 美金水準。送朋友當入門款最適合。

highlights.title: G502X Plus 給拇指鍵狂熱者
highlights.body: 真的會用到 11 顆按鍵的人，這隻還是首選。其他人對現代 FPS 來說太重。

Pulsar Launches New eS Mouse, Mousepads, and Armsleeve Collection

en.commentary: Gaming mice top three is unchanged this weekend, and the Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 (GPX2) Superstrike still earns the top spot for the same reason it has all year: thirty-two thousand DPI HERO 2 sensor accuracy, sixty-gram weight, and the eighty-hour battery life create a competitive package nothing else fully matches. The GPX2 Dex variant takes second on ergonomics for medium-to-large hand sizes where the symmetrical Superstrike shape has its only weakness. Razer Viper V4 Pro takes third because Razer finally fixed the latency issues from the V3 generation and the new Focus Pro 60K sensor matches Logitech's tracking accuracy. The Corsair Sabre V2 Pro announced at CES 2026 is now shipping in two variants, and it pushes the mid-tier upward by hitting fifty-eight grams at half the price of the GPX2. Pulsar X3 keeps fifth for buyers who want the lightest possible body. The Mother's Day weekend pick is whatever fits your hand: try a Superlight if your hand is medium and shape is everything, Dex if you have larger hands, Viper V4 Pro if you prefer the right-hand asymmetric shape that Razer perfected. Anyone spending under one hundred dollars: the Sabre V2 Pro is now the best value in the slate.

highlights.title: GPX2 Superstrike is still the default flagship
highlights.body: Thirty-two thousand DPI HERO 2 sensor and sixty grams in eighty-hour battery package. Nothing else combines all three at this level.

highlights.title: Sabre V2 Pro pushes the mid-tier
highlights.body: Fifty-eight grams at half the GPX2 price makes it the value upgrade for anyone not chasing absolute weight.

highlights.title: Viper V4 Pro fixes Razer's latency
highlights.body: Focus Pro 60K sensor finally matches Logitech tracking. Right pick for asymmetric-shape preferrers.

highlights.title: Dex is the medium-to-large hand answer
highlights.body: Same internals as GPX2 Superstrike, but the asymmetric ergonomic shape works for hands the Superstrike does not.

highlights.title: Pulsar X3 owns the lightest tier
highlights.body: For buyers who care about absolute minimum weight above all else.

zh-tw.commentary: 電競滑鼠前三名這週沒動，Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2（GPX2）Superstrike 還是穩坐第一，理由跟今年其他時間一樣：32000 DPI 的 HERO 2 感測器精準度、60 公克重量、80 小時續航，這個競技組合其他人都湊不齊。GPX2 Dex 第二靠人體工學設計給中大手用，對稱版 Superstrike 唯一的弱點就是大手會不夠舒服。Razer Viper V4 Pro 第三，Razer 這代終於修好 V3 的延遲問題，新的 Focus Pro 60K 感測器追蹤精準度追上 Logitech。CES 2026 發表的 Corsair Sabre V2 Pro 兩個版本都已經出貨，58 公克的重量加上 GPX2 一半價格，把中段直接往上推。Pulsar X3 守第五給追求極致輕量的玩家。母親節週末挑哪一支看你的手：手中等只在乎形狀就 Superlight，大手就 Dex，喜歡 Razer 完美的右手非對稱就 Viper V4 Pro。預算台幣三千以下，Sabre V2 Pro 現在是榜上最划算的選擇。其實電競滑鼠這個品類差距小到看手感選就好，貴一倍不等於好一倍。

highlights.title: GPX2 Superstrike 預設旗艦
highlights.body: 32000 DPI HERO 2 加 60 公克 80 小時續航，沒人三項都做到這水準。

highlights.title: Sabre V2 Pro 把中段往上推
highlights.body: 58 公克 GPX2 半價，不追極輕量的人直接買它升級。

highlights.title: Viper V4 Pro 修好 Razer 延遲
highlights.body: Focus Pro 60K 追蹤追上 Logitech，喜歡非對稱形狀就選它。

highlights.title: Dex 是中大手解答
highlights.body: GPX2 內裝加非對稱人體工學，Superstrike 不合的手就試它。

highlights.title: Pulsar X3 極輕量首選
highlights.body: 只在乎絕對最輕的買它。

en.commentary: Gaming mouse rankings hold on Monday after a steady Mother's Day weekend. Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 Superstrike stays my top pick because the 32,000 DPI HERO 2 sensor accuracy, the sixty-gram chassis, the eighty-hour battery, and the optical-mechanical Superstrike switches together create the most complete competitive package on the market. The four-month testing run keeps returning sub-millisecond latency, and the new switches deliver consistent click feel across a full tournament weekend. GPX2 Dex takes second on ergonomic shape for medium-to-large hands where the symmetric Superstrike never quite fits, and the internals are identical so the performance tier is the same. Razer Viper V4 Pro stays third because the Focus Pro 60K sensor finally closes the tracking accuracy gap to Logitech, and the asymmetric right-hand shape that Razer perfected over five generations remains the comfort win for buyers who do not get along with symmetric shapes. The Razer DeathAdder V4 Pro at four and DeathAdder V3 Hyper at five give the larger ergonomic shape buyers two strong choices. Endgame Gear OP1 8K Wireless at six holds the value flagship slot at $129 with thrid-party sensor accuracy that genuinely competes. Mid-tier: Viper V3 Hyper at seven, Fnatic Bolt at eight, Ninjutso Sora V2 at nine. Buy advice: hand shape decides between Superlight and Dex, asymmetric preference goes Viper V4 Pro, value-flagship goes OP1 8K, all-rounder with extra buttons goes G502 X Plus.

highlights.title: GPX2 Superstrike stays the competitive default
highlights.body: 32,000 DPI HERO 2 plus sixty grams plus eighty-hour battery plus optical-mechanical switches. The most complete package at the flagship tier.

highlights.title: Dex serves the medium-to-large hand
highlights.body: Identical internals to Superstrike with ergonomic shape that fits hands the symmetric body does not. Same performance, better fit for larger hands.

highlights.title: Viper V4 Pro closes the Razer sensor gap
highlights.body: Focus Pro 60K matches Logitech tracking accuracy. The asymmetric shape pick for buyers who prefer Razer's geometry.

highlights.title: OP1 8K Wireless owns the value flagship slot
highlights.body: Third-party sensor accuracy that competes with the big two at $129. Right pick for buyers who want flagship performance under the flagship price.

highlights.title: G502 X Plus serves multi-button buyers
highlights.body: Eleven programmable buttons plus accurate HERO 25K sensor plus wireless freedom. Right pick for MMO players who need command density.

zh-tw.commentary: 母親節週末過完，週一電競滑鼠排名穩。Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 Superstrike 守第一，32000 DPI HERO 2 感測器精準、60 公克機身、80 小時續航、光磁混合 Superstrike 微動，這四件事加在一起是市面上最完整的競技組合。四個月測試持續回報亞毫秒延遲，新微動跨越整個賽事週末手感不變。GPX2 Dex 第二靠人體工學給中大手，對稱版 Superstrike 對大手不夠合手，內裝一樣所以性能等級一樣。Razer Viper V4 Pro 第三，Focus Pro 60K 感測器終於把追蹤精準度補到 Logitech 水準，Razer 五代磨出來的右手非對稱形狀對不合對稱版的買家還是舒適勝點。Razer DeathAdder V4 Pro 第四跟 DeathAdder V3 Hyper 第五給大型人體工學派兩個強選擇。Endgame Gear OP1 8K Wireless 第六穩坐 129 美元性價比旗艦，第三方感測器精準度真的能打。老實說中段：Viper V3 Hyper 第七、Fnatic Bolt 第八、Ninjutso Sora V2 第九。購買建議：手型決定 Superlight 還是 Dex，喜歡非對稱選 Viper V4 Pro，預算旗艦選 OP1 8K，多按鍵全能選 G502 X Plus。台灣讀者注意 Logitech 跟 Razer 都有完整代理，保固體驗比代購好。

highlights.title: GPX2 Superstrike 競技預設首選
highlights.body: 32000 DPI HERO 2 加 60 公克加 80 小時加光磁微動。旗艦級最完整組合。

highlights.title: Dex 服務中大手玩家
highlights.body: 內裝跟 Superstrike 一樣，人體工學造型適合對稱版不合的大手。性能相同手感更合。

highlights.title: Viper V4 Pro 補齊 Razer 感測器
highlights.body: Focus Pro 60K 追蹤追上 Logitech。喜歡 Razer 形狀的非對稱派首選。

highlights.title: OP1 8K Wireless 性價比旗艦
highlights.body: 第三方感測器精準度能打大廠，台幣四千內。旗艦性能非旗艦價格首選。

highlights.title: G502 X Plus 多按鍵全能
highlights.body: 11 顆可程式按鍵加 HERO 25K 加無線。MMO 玩家指令密度首選。

en.commentary: First weekday after Mother's Day weekend, and the gaming mouse market is exactly where I expect it to be: Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 Superstrike at the top, with the Dex variant right behind. Superstrike's 8K wireless polling rate plus the optical-mechanical button assembly is the most refined high-end FPS configuration on sale, and the only reason I am not pushing the score over 9.3 is because the price is still steep for the average buyer. GPX2 Dex sits at two because the shape works for more grip styles, and that flexibility matters when you are buying for a single user who will fingertip and palm in the same session. Razer Viper V4 Pro and DeathAdder V4 Pro round out the elite tier; both clock under 60g while keeping a proper battery life and the HyperPolling dongle bundled, which I consider table stakes in May 2026. Endgame Gear OP1we still earns the best mid-price value crown. Pulsefire Haste 2 Wireless and SteelSeries Prime Wireless are the two I keep on the chart because they hold up against newer competition without needing constant firmware patches. Nothing reshuffled this week; I trust the order. The takeaway for buyers shopping in May is simple: do not chase Computex rumors, and do not assume a new flagship will land before July. The mice on this list are the ones I would buy today, and the value scores reflect post-Mother's-Day pricing rather than holiday discounts.

highlights.title: GPX2 Superstrike is still the only no-compromise FPS mouse I will rank first
highlights.body: Logitech finally married 8K polling with optical-mechanical switches that feel right, and the click latency numbers Rocket Jump Ninja published back up the verdict.

highlights.title: GPX2 Dex is the better Logitech for most people
highlights.body: The Dex shape suits palm and claw users; if you are not chasing the absolute lowest latency, this is the smarter buy in the Logitech lineup.

highlights.title: Viper V4 Pro stays the answer for anyone with claw grip
highlights.body: 57g, HyperPolling dongle in the box, and Razer's optical Gen-4 switches that hold up after months of competitive use.

highlights.title: Endgame Gear OP1we is the value pick I keep recommending
highlights.body: PixArt 3395 sensor, 49g build, and a price that finally undercuts the big four by enough margin that I push it on anyone under $90.

zh-tw.commentary: 母親節週末過完，星期二回到正軌，電競滑鼠這塊我覺得排序完全沒問題。Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 Superstrike 還是榜首，Dex 緊跟在後。Superstrike 的 8K 無線回報率配光學軸老實說目前頂規最完整的一台，分數沒衝過 9.3 純粹是因為價錢真的硬，台灣 NT$ 六千多的水貨對一般玩家還是門檻。GPX2 Dex 第二是因為形狀適配性更廣，講真的同一個人指尖跟手掌握法都能用，這彈性很重要。Razer Viper V4 Pro 跟 DeathAdder V4 Pro 撐起頂規組，兩台都壓在 60g 以下，續航沒犧牲，HyperPolling 接收器標配，2026 年這就是基本配備。Endgame Gear OP1we 還是中價位 CP 值王。Pulsefire Haste 2 Wireless 跟 SteelSeries Prime Wireless 留榜是因為它們不靠韌體救命也能跟新品打。這禮拜不動，我覺得這個排序很穩。

highlights.title: GPX2 Superstrike 還是 FPS 玩家唯一不妥協的選擇
highlights.body: 8K 無線回報率配光學軸的點擊延遲，Rocket Jump Ninja 實測撐得起這個第一。台灣水貨大概 NT$ 六千五，貴但值。

highlights.title: GPX2 Dex 才是大多數人該買的羅技
highlights.body: Dex 形狀掌握、爪握都適合，不追求極限延遲的話我自己會選這台。

highlights.title: Viper V4 Pro 爪握玩家直接買
highlights.body: 57g、盒裝附 HyperPolling 接收器、Razer 第四代光軸用了幾個月還是清脆。

highlights.title: Endgame Gear OP1we 我推給預算有限的人
highlights.body: PixArt 3395 加 49g 機身，NT$ 兩千五左右真的找不到對手，老實說大廠中階直接被它壓著打。

en.commentary: GPX2 Superstrike holds first and the firmware tuning update this week refines the click response curve in a way that addresses the only complaint serious FPS players had at launch. First place is locked in for esports use. GPX2 DEX stays at second for anyone who prefers a slightly heavier ergonomic shape. Razer Viper V4 Pro got hit with a charging dock recall this week for early production batches with overheating risk on the wireless charging coil. The mouse itself is unaffected, but Razer's response timeline matters for the brand. Score holds, third place unchanged. ZOWIE OP1we added 4K polling support in firmware this week, which is the upgrade that closes the technical gap with the premium tier; sixth place position holds but the score moves up. Razer Viper V4 Pro stays at third, DA V4 Pro at fourth, DA V3 Hyper at fifth. Viper V3 Hyper and Fnatic Bolt are unchanged. The pro-tier market is stable, the value-tier got a small lift from ZOWIE this week.

highlights.title: GPX2 Superstrike firmware fixes the click response complaint
highlights.body: Tuning update refines the click response curve in a way that addresses the only serious FPS-player complaint at launch. First place is locked in for esports use; there is no competing mouse with better fundamentals at this point.

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro dock recall is a brand issue, not a mouse issue
highlights.body: Charging dock recall on early production batches with wireless coil overheating risk. The mouse itself is fine. Razer's response speed and replacement program will determine whether this stains the brand long-term. Ranking unchanged.

highlights.title: ZOWIE OP1we 4K polling firmware closes the technical gap to premium
highlights.body: 4K polling support arrives via firmware, closing the technical gap that kept ZOWIE one tier below Logitech and Razer in the pro market. Position holds at sixth but the value tier got meaningfully more interesting this week.

zh-tw.commentary:
GPX2 Superstrike 守住第一，這禮拜韌體調校更新把點擊回饋曲線修得更細，這是上市時認真 FPS 玩家唯一的抱怨點。電競用首選鎖定。

GPX2 DEX 守第二，喜歡稍重一點的人體工學形狀就選它。

Razer Viper V4 Pro 這禮拜的滑鼠本身沒事，但充電底座被召回，早期批次無線充電線圈有過熱風險。Razer 的處理速度跟更換方案會決定這件事對品牌的長期影響。排名不動，第三名守住。

ZOWIE OP1we 這禮拜韌體加入 4K 回報率支援，這是把它跟高階段技術差距補起來的升級。第六名守住但分數上升。

Razer Viper V4 Pro 第三、DA V4 Pro 第四、DA V3 Hyper 第五。Viper V3 Hyper、Fnatic Bolt 都沒動。

高階段很穩，C/P 值段這禮拜被 ZOWIE 拉了一下。

highlights.title: GPX2 Superstrike 韌體修好點擊回饋的抱怨
highlights.body: 調校更新把點擊回饋曲線修得更細，正好解決 FPS 玩家上市時唯一的抱怨。電競用首選鎖定，現在沒有其他滑鼠在基本盤上能贏它。

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro 底座召回是品牌問題不是滑鼠問題
highlights.body: 充電底座召回，早期批次無線充電線圈有過熱風險。滑鼠本身沒事。Razer 的反應速度跟更換方案會決定這對品牌的長期影響。排名不動。

highlights.title: ZOWIE OP1we 4K 回報率韌體補上跟高階的技術差距
highlights.body: 4K 回報率支援透過韌體推出，補上 ZOWIE 在職業圈一直比 Logitech、Razer 低一階的技術差距。第六名守住，但 C/P 值段這禮拜變得明顯更有趣。

references.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro launch coverage and 49g spec
Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike vs Razer Viper V4 Pro deep dive
Best lightweight gaming mouse 2026 round-up

en.commentary: Logitech GPX2 Superstrike holds first and PC Gamer's head-to-head with the Razer Viper V4 Pro this week reaches the same conclusion competitive players reached at launch: the haptic-inductive click system is the actual generational jump, and nothing in the Razer counterpunch matches it on click consistency. Razer's FrameSync battery-boosting tech is a smart play on the only axis where Logitech is not winning, but the 180-hour figure does not move the ranking because charging cadence was never a real complaint for pro-tier buyers. GPX2 DEX stays at second for the ergonomic-shape crowd. Razer Viper V4 Pro slots in at third because at 49 grams it is now the lightest serious flagship and the Gen-4 optical switches are a real improvement, but the click ceiling is still below Superstrike. DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed is unchanged at fourth and the launch firmware on Viper V4 Pro this month has not created any drama Razer needs to respond to. Endgame Gear OP1we, Viper V3 HyperSpeed, G502 X Plus, SteelSeries Prime Wireless, Fnatic Bolt, and HyperX Pulsefire Haste 2 are all unchanged. The high end is fully consolidated around the Superstrike-versus-Viper V4 axis and that will be the conversation through Q3.

highlights.title: PC Gamer Superstrike vs Viper V4 Pro head-to-head settles the click debate
highlights.body: Haptic-inductive clicks remain the actual generational jump and nothing in the Razer side of the ledger matches it on consistency. Logitech wins the most important spec for competitive play, full stop.

highlights.title: Razer FrameSync 180-hour battery is smart but does not move the ranking
highlights.body: Charging cadence has never been a real complaint at the pro tier, so the longest battery in the segment matters less than the click. The tech is impressive, the impact on competitive purchase decisions is small.

highlights.title: Viper V4 Pro at 49g earns third place on weight and Gen-4 switches
highlights.body: Lightest serious flagship at 49 grams plus Gen-4 optical switches is a real spec story. Click ceiling is still below Superstrike but the package is good enough to lock in third over the rest of the field.

zh-tw.commentary:
Logitech GPX2 Superstrike 守住第一，PC Gamer 這禮拜跟 Razer Viper V4 Pro 的對決文，得到的結論跟競技玩家上市時就講的一樣：觸覺感應點擊系統才是真正的世代躍進，Razer 這波反擊在點擊一致性上沒有任何東西能打。

Razer 的 FrameSync 省電技術，是在 Logitech 唯一沒贏的軸線上的聰明打法，但 180 小時的續航數字不會改變排名，因為充電頻率對職業選手等級的買家從來不是真的痛點。

GPX2 DEX 守第二，喜歡人體工學形狀的就選它。Razer Viper V4 Pro 升到第三，49 克現在是認真旗艦裡最輕的，Gen-4 光軸也是真的進步，但點擊天花板還是低於 Superstrike。DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed 守第四，Viper V4 Pro 這個月的上市韌體沒有任何問題讓 Razer 需要出面收拾。

Endgame Gear OP1we、Viper V3 HyperSpeed、G502 X Plus、SteelSeries Prime Wireless、Fnatic Bolt、HyperX Pulsefire Haste 2 都沒動。

高階段已經完全收斂成 Superstrike 對 Viper V4 兩家對決，這個對話會延續到 Q3。

highlights.title: PC Gamer Superstrike 對 Viper V4 Pro 對決文定調點擊辯論
highlights.body: 觸覺感應點擊還是真正的世代躍進，Razer 這邊沒有任何產品能在一致性上對應。Logitech 在競技用最重要的規格上勝出，沒有之一。

highlights.title: Razer FrameSync 180 小時續航聰明但不改排名
highlights.body: 充電頻率在職業等級從來不是真痛點，所以這個分類最長的續航重要性還是低於點擊本身。技術很厲害，對競技採購決策的影響很小。

highlights.title: Viper V4 Pro 49 克加 Gen-4 光軸守住第三
highlights.body: 49 克現在是認真旗艦裡最輕，配 Gen-4 光軸是真的有規格故事。點擊天花板還是低於 Superstrike，但整體包裝夠好，鎖住第三沒有問題。

en.commentary: Day 2 of Memorial Day week. The Superlight 3 at $129 held through Tuesday at Best Buy and Amazon, which confirms the cut is genuine and not a one-day flash. Logitech G Pro X Superlight 3 stays first. 47-gram weight plus HERO 3 sensor plus POWERPLAY 3 wireless charging compatibility is the combination that still wins for competitive FPS players, and the $129 price closes the gap to the cheaper Razer enough to make the pick decisive. Razer Viper V4 Pro at second holds the symmetric ergonomic pick, and the discount on Razer.com held at $139 through today which keeps the relative value calculation versus Logitech the same as yesterday. The Focus Pro 50K sensor is class-leading and the package justifies it over Logitech for buyers who do not need the Superlight ecosystem. Pulsar X2H mini at third holds the small-hands pick. Hall Effect optical sensor delivery on a sub-$120 mouse is still the cleanest implementation in that price tier. SteelSeries Aerox 5 Wireless at fourth for MMO and RPG buttons-heavy pick. Glorious Model O 2 Wireless holds the ultralight-without-Superlight-premium pick. Razer DeathAdder V4 Pro holds the right-handed ergonomic pick. Endgame Gear OP1 8K in mid-pack as the polling-rate enthusiast pick. The Tuesday observation is that mouse stock at the Superlight 3 price is starting to thin at Best Buy on the white colorway specifically, and buyers committed to the color should not wait through the weekend. Black stays in stock.

highlights.title: Superlight 3 at $129 holds through Tuesday, deal is genuine
highlights.body: Best Buy and Amazon both held the $129 price through Tuesday which confirms the cut is genuine Memorial Day rather than flash. 47 grams plus HERO 3 sensor plus POWERPLAY 3 wireless charging is the combination that still wins for competitive FPS. First place is decisive.

highlights.title: Superlight 3 white colorway thinning at Best Buy by weekend
highlights.body: Tuesday observation is that Best Buy stock on the white Superlight 3 at $129 is starting to thin, and buyers committed to the color should not wait through the weekend. Black colorway stays in stock so non-color-specific buyers can wait.

highlights.title: Pulsar X2H mini still the right small-hands value pick
highlights.body: Hall Effect optical sensor on a sub-$120 mouse is the cleanest implementation in that price tier. Small-hands users who cannot use the Superlight comfortably should start here. The Pulsar price did not move on Memorial Day because Pulsar does not run aggressive holiday cuts.

Razer Viper V4 Pro 第二守對稱人體工學之選，Razer 官網 NT$3,800 折扣到今天還在，跟 Logitech 的相對價值算式跟昨天一樣。Focus Pro 50K 感測器領先分類，對不需要 Superlight 生態系的買家撐住第二名。

Pulsar X2H mini 第三守小手之選，NT$3,300 以下搭霍爾效應光學感測器還是這個價位帶最乾淨的實作。SteelSeries Aerox 5 Wireless 第四守按鍵多的 MMO 跟 RPG 玩家。Glorious Model O 2 Wireless 守要超輕不想付 Superlight 溢價的買家。Razer DeathAdder V4 Pro 守右撇子人體工學。Endgame Gear OP1 8K 中段守 polling rate 取向之選。

highlights.title: Superlight 3 白色 Best Buy 週末前可能斷貨

highlights.title: Pulsar X2H mini 還是對的小手 C/P 值之選

en.commentary: Day 3 of Memorial Day week. The Superlight 3 at $129 held through Wednesday at Best Buy and Amazon, three full days of price hold across two major retailers confirms the cut is the Memorial Day floor. The bonus midweek news is that Logitech itself has the Superlight 2 marked down through May 31 on the official store, which is the value sister-pick for buyers who do not need the latest sensor refresh. Logitech G Pro X Superlight 3 stays first. 47-gram weight plus HERO 3 sensor plus POWERPLAY 3 wireless charging is still the combination that wins for competitive FPS. Razer Viper V4 Pro at second holds the symmetric ergonomic pick, the $139 Razer.com discount held through Wednesday, the new midweek news is that Razer is teasing FrameSync battery improvements for the V4 Pro firmware, which is a quiet quality-of-life win that does not move the price but does tilt the long-term value calculation slightly toward the Razer. Pulsar X2H mini at third holds the small-hands pick. SteelSeries Aerox 5 Wireless at fourth for MMO buyers. Glorious Model O 2 Wireless holds the ultralight value pick. Razer DeathAdder V4 Pro holds the right-handed ergonomic pick. Endgame Gear OP1 8K in mid-pack as the polling-rate enthusiast pick. Wednesday observation is that the Superlight 3 white colorway is now confirmed out of stock at Best Buy as of midweek, the black is still flowing. The Superlight 2 at the Logitech store is the colorway-flexible alternative for buyers who missed the white.

highlights.title: Superlight 2 Logitech store discount runs through May 31, sister pick
highlights.body: Logitech's own store has the Superlight 2 marked down through May 31, which is the value sister-pick for buyers who do not need the latest sensor refresh. The colorway flexibility on the Superlight 2 also catches buyers who missed the Superlight 3 white at Best Buy.

highlights.title: Superlight 3 white confirmed out of stock at Best Buy midweek
highlights.body: Tuesday warning came true Wednesday. Best Buy is now out of the Superlight 3 white colorway, black is still flowing. Buyers who specifically wanted white should pivot to the Logitech store Superlight 2 promo or to the Razer Viper V4 Pro at $139.

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro FrameSync firmware tease is the quiet quality win
highlights.body: Razer is teasing FrameSync battery improvements for the V4 Pro firmware, which is a quality-of-life win that does not move the $139 price but does tilt the long-term value calculation slightly toward the Razer for buyers who can wait on firmware.

en.commentary: Thursday Day 4. Superlight 3 at $129 held through Thursday at Best Buy and Amazon, four full days of price hold across two majors locks the Memorial Day floor structurally. The fresh Thursday news is Amazon dropping the Superlight 2 to $123.99 (31% off), which is the lowest Superlight 2 sticker I have tracked all year and the cleanest value sister-pick if you do not need the HERO 3 refresh. Logitech G Pro X Superlight 3 stays first on the 47-gram weight plus HERO 3 sensor plus POWERPLAY 3 wireless charging combination. Razer Viper V4 Pro at second holds the symmetric ergonomic pick at $139 with PC Gamer running a fresh Thursday piece framing the V4 Pro as competitively equivalent to the Superlight 3 without the haptic clicks. That is a meaningful editorial nudge for buyers torn between the two, the V4 Pro narrative is strengthening through midweek. Pulsar X2H mini at third holds the small-hands pick. SteelSeries Aerox 5 Wireless at fourth for MMO. Glorious Model O 2 Wireless holds ultralight value. Razer DeathAdder V4 Pro holds right-handed ergonomic. Endgame Gear OP1 8K mid-pack on polling-rate. Thursday observation, the Superlight 3 white shortage at Best Buy from Wednesday has spread to Amazon as of Thursday morning. Anyone targeting white must move to the Logitech-store Superlight 2 deal or accept the Razer V4 Pro alternative.

highlights.title: Superlight 2 at $123.99 on Amazon is the lowest sticker all year
highlights.body: Amazon dropped the Superlight 2 to $123.99 (31% off) Thursday, the lowest Superlight 2 price I have tracked all year. This is the cleanest value sister-pick for buyers who do not need the HERO 3 sensor refresh of the Superlight 3.

highlights.title: PC Gamer frames Viper V4 Pro as Superlight 3 equivalent minus haptics
highlights.body: PC Gamer ran a fresh Thursday piece framing the Viper V4 Pro as competitively equivalent to the Superlight 3 without the haptic clicks. The V4 Pro narrative is strengthening through midweek, a meaningful editorial nudge for buyers torn between the two.

highlights.body: Wednesday's Best Buy white-out has spread to Amazon as of Thursday morning. Anyone targeting Superlight 3 white must pivot to the Logitech-store Superlight 2 promo or accept the Razer Viper V4 Pro alternative at $139.

en.commentary: Friday morning the gaming mouse category opened with Logitech running the deepest MD weekend cuts on the Pro X line and Razer holding the Viper at MSRP. Logitech G Pro X2 SUPERSTRIKE holds first at $179 with the $50 cut from Logitech G direct, the optical-mechanical hybrid switches plus the HERO 2 sensor at 32,000 DPI plus the 60g weight is the right pick for serious esports buyers and the $179 sticker is the floor for the flagship. Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX at second drops to $129 with the $30 MD cut, the slimmer DEX shape plus the same HERO 2 sensor at lighter weight is the right pick for claw-grip players who found the standard Superlight too round. Razer Viper V4 Pro at third holds $179 with no MD discount because Razer is letting the Viper V4 stay at MSRP through MD, the Gen-4 optical switches plus the 8K polling rate is genuinely competitive on spec but the no-discount stance hurts the value math against the Pro X2. Glorious Model O 2 Pro Wireless holds fourth at $129 with the $20 cut, the lightweight 58g body plus the 4K polling kit option is the right pick for buyers who want a third-party flagship without the Logitech or Razer brand premium. Pulsar X2H eS holds fifth at $149 with the BAMF 2 switches plus the 26K DPI sensor, the boutique pick for buyers who follow the competitive Korean scene. Verdict for Friday: Pro X2 SUPERSTRIKE at $179 is the buy of the weekend for serious competitive play, Superlight 2 DEX at $129 if you have small hands or claw grip, Model O 2 Pro at $129 if you reject brand premiums. Razer's no-discount stance on the Viper V4 Pro makes the Logitech the obvious value pick.

highlights.title: Logitech G Pro X2 SUPERSTRIKE at $179 is the competitive pick
highlights.body: Logitech G direct cut $50 bringing the Pro X2 SUPERSTRIKE to $179, the floor for the flagship. The optical-mechanical hybrid switches plus the HERO 2 sensor at 32,000 DPI plus the 60g weight makes this the right pick for serious esports buyers and the value math at the price is locked.

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro holds $179 — no discount hurts the value math
highlights.body: Razer is letting the Viper V4 stay at MSRP through MD weekend. The Gen-4 optical switches plus the 8K polling rate is genuinely competitive on spec but the no-discount stance hurts the value math against the Logitech Pro X2 SUPERSTRIKE at the same price with a $50 discount.

highlights.title: Logitech Superlight 2 DEX drops $30 to $129 for claw grip
highlights.body: The MD cut on the DEX variant brings it to $129 with the slimmer shape and the same HERO 2 sensor at lighter weight. For claw-grip players who found the standard Superlight too round in the back, the DEX is the right pick and the price is the lowest tracked since launch.

zh-tw.commentary:
禮拜五早上，電競滑鼠這個品類因為 Logitech 對 Pro X 線推最深的國殤日週末折扣，而 Razer 把 Viper 維持牌價而開盤。

Logitech G Pro X2 SUPERSTRIKE 守第一 NT$5,500 靠 Logitech G 美國官網砍 NT$1,500，光學機械混合微動加 HERO 2 感測器 32,000 DPI 加 60g 重量，是嚴肅電競買家對的選擇，NT$5,500 就是旗艦的地板。

Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX 第二 NT$4,000 砍 NT$900，更窄的 DEX 形狀加同樣 HERO 2 感測器，是手小或趴爪握法找標準 Superlight 太圓的買家對的選擇。Razer Viper V4 Pro 第三守 NT$5,500 沒國殤日折扣，Razer 讓 Viper V4 整個國殤日守牌價，Gen-4 光學微動加 8K 輪詢率規格上競爭得起，但不打折姿態在同價位的 Pro X2 對比下價值算數受傷。

講真的，Glorious Model O 2 Pro Wireless 第四 NT$4,000 砍 NT$600，輕量化 58g 機身加 4K 輪詢套件選項，是要第三方旗艦沒有 Logitech 或 Razer 品牌溢價的買家對的選擇。Pulsar X2H eS 第五 NT$4,650 配 BAMF 2 微動加 26K DPI 感測器，是追韓國競技圈的精品選擇。

禮拜五結論：嚴肅競技這檔週末買點是 Pro X2 SUPERSTRIKE NT$5,500；手小或趴爪握就 Superlight 2 DEX NT$4,000；拒絕品牌溢價就 Model O 2 Pro NT$4,000。Razer 對 Viper V4 Pro 不打折讓 Logitech 變成明顯的價值選擇。

highlights.title: Logitech G Pro X2 SUPERSTRIKE NT$5,500 是競技選擇
highlights.body: Logitech G 美國官網砍 NT$1,500 把 Pro X2 SUPERSTRIKE 拉到 NT$5,500，旗艦的地板。光學機械混合微動加 HERO 2 感測器 32,000 DPI 加 60g 重量，是嚴肅電競買家對的選擇，在這個價的價值算數鎖死。

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro 守 NT$5,500 — 不打折讓價值算數受傷
highlights.body: Razer 讓 Viper V4 整個國殤日守牌價。Gen-4 光學微動加 8K 輪詢率規格上競爭得起，但不打折姿態在同價位 Pro X2 SUPERSTRIKE 有 NT$1,500 折扣的對比下，價值算數受傷了。

highlights.title: Logitech Superlight 2 DEX 砍 NT$900 到 NT$4,000 給趴爪握
highlights.body: DEX 版的國殤日折扣把它拉到 NT$4,000 配更窄的形狀跟同樣 HERO 2 感測器更輕重量。趴爪握的玩家找標準 Superlight 後段太圓，DEX 是對的選擇，價格是上市以來追蹤最低。

en.commentary: Saturday morning the gaming mouse chart held the Friday cuts. Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 Dex holds first at $119 (down $40 at Best Buy), the 60g weight plus the HERO 2 sensor plus the 95-hour battery is still the right competitive pitch. Razer DeathAdder V3 Pro 35K stays second at $129 (down $30), the 35K Focus Pro sensor plus the ergonomic shape is the right palm-grip pitch. Pulsar X2A Mini at third at $99 (down $20), the symmetric ambidextrous form plus the 52g weight is the right claw-grip pitch. Glorious Model O- Wireless fourth at $79 (down $20), the honeycomb shell plus the BAMF 2.0 sensor at $79 is the budget tournament pick. SteelSeries Aerox 9 Wireless fifth at $129 (down $20), the 18-button MMO layout is the right RPG pitch. Saturday verdict: G Pro X Superlight 2 Dex if you want the palm-grip flagship, Razer DeathAdder V3 Pro if you want ergonomic palm-grip, Pulsar X2A Mini if claw-grip is your style.

highlights.title: G Pro X Superlight 2 Dex at $119 — competitive flagship
highlights.body: Best Buy held the $40 cut through Saturday. 60g weight plus the HERO 2 sensor plus the 95-hour battery at $119 is still the right competitive flagship and the Dex shape addresses the small-hand complaints from the original Superlight 2.

highlights.title: DeathAdder V3 Pro 35K at $129 — palm-grip pick
highlights.body: Razer direct held the $30 cut through Saturday. 35K Focus Pro sensor plus the ergonomic shape plus the lighter 56g body at $129 is the right palm-grip pitch and the 35K upgrade from the original V3 Pro is the reason to pay over the cheaper alternatives.

highlights.title: Pulsar X2A Mini at $99 — claw-grip flagship
highlights.body: Pulsar held the $20 cut through Saturday. Symmetric ambidextrous form plus the 52g weight plus the eS sensor at $99 is the right claw-grip flagship and the build quality finally matches the more expensive Logitech and Razer options.

禮拜六早上，電競滑鼠榜單把禮拜五的折扣守過夜。

Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 Dex 守第一 NT$3,730（Best Buy 砍 NT$1,250），60g 重量加 HERO 2 感測器加 95 小時電池還是競技話術。

Razer DeathAdder V3 Pro 35K 第二 NT$4,100（砍 NT$940），35K Focus Pro 感測器加人體工學形狀是手掌握法話術。

禮拜六結論：手掌握法旗艦就 G Pro X Superlight 2 Dex，人體工學手掌握就 Razer DeathAdder V3 Pro，爪式握法就 Pulsar X2A Mini。

highlights.title: G Pro X Superlight 2 Dex NT$3,730 競技旗艦

en.commentary: Memorial Day Sunday is the calm before Tuesday resets gaming mouse pricing, and the deals this weekend lined up with my long-standing recommendations beautifully. The Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX dropped to $129 across major retailers and the DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed hit $79. After cycling through every mouse on this list across rotating game genres for the past four months, my order has not budged. The G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX stays the overall pick because the HERO 2 sensor at 8000Hz polling combined with the 60g asymmetric ergonomic shell is what pros keep choosing for a reason. The asymmetric DEX shape genuinely fits claw and palm grip styles that the original Superlight 2 left underserved. Right-hand palm grippers should head straight for the Razer DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed. The Focus X sensor, 64g body, and decade-refined contour are why this shape keeps selling, and at $79 today the value math is hard to argue with. Endgame Gear OP1we earns the ambidextrous performance crown at 55g with a clean competitive shape and the PixArt 3370 sensor. For buyers wanting maximum battery life on AA, the Razer Viper V3 HyperSpeed delivers 280 hours at $79. The Logitech G502 X Plus stays the answer for feature-heavy MMO and productivity players who want HERO 25K plus RGB. Today is the final clean window to pick up MD pricing before the holiday cutoff Tuesday.

highlights.body: HERO 2 sensor at 8000Hz polling and a 60g asymmetric ergonomic shell that genuinely fits claw and palm grip styles. The Memorial Day price of $129 is the lowest this mouse has hit since launch.

highlights.title: Endgame Gear OP1we wins ambidextrous performance

Father's Day is three weeks out and mice make perfect gifts because they slot under $150 and ship overnight. After cycling through every mouse on this list across four months of rotating game genres, my order has not moved. The Logitech G Pro X Superstrike stays the overall pick because HERO 2 at 8000Hz polling combined with the 58g asymmetric shell is what professional Valorant and CS2 players keep choosing for a reason. For dads who palm grip and play casually after work, the Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX at $149 is the safest gift in the category.
