highlights.body: Same top sensor and build as the Superstrike without paying for HITS. Its higher value score reflects exactly why it sits at second.

highlights.title: Budget flyweights still deliver
highlights.body: The OP1we and Ninjutso Sora V2 give you featherweight competitive performance for less. Both stay strong picks when price matters.

zh-tw.commentary: Logitech G PRO X2 Superstrike 還是穩坐我的第一，而且越用越覺得它那套機關是真本事，不是噱頭。它的 HITS 觸發系統把可調觸發行程跟 rapid trigger 帶到主按鍵上，你可以把觸發點設得更低，在戰術射擊裡補槍補得更快。再配上已經驗證過的 Superlight 2 感應器，這支滑鼠在手感跟精準度兩邊都贏。標準版 G PRO X2 Dex 排第二，給那些想要同級旗艦感應器跟做工，但不想多花錢買 HITS 的人，它 CP 值稍高一點，剛好反映這個定位。RTINGS 這週再次把 Razer Viper V4 Pro 定為最強無線滑鼠，看中它 49 克的重量、1000Hz 下 180 小時續航跟接近完美的做工，所以我幫它的 CP 值小加一點來呼應。DeathAdder V4 Pro 緊跟在後，適合喜歡人體工學握法、想要大一點殼但同級感應器的玩家。往下走，OP1we 跟 Ninjutso Sora V2 還是我推薦的選擇，想用比較少的預算拿到輕量競技手感就選它們。Pulsar X2-CL 靠純粹的輕量跟追蹤穩穩拿下高分，Lamzu Maya X 也還是很有競爭力的輕量之選。大部分競技玩家我會直接推 Superstrike；如果 HITS 打動不了你，Viper V4 Pro 是更聰明的選擇，純論指向性甚至可以說更好用。

highlights.title: Superstrike 的 HITS 是真本事
highlights.body: 主按鍵可調觸發行程加 rapid trigger，讓你設更低觸發點、補槍更快。配上 Superlight 2 感應器，手感跟精準度兩邊都贏。

highlights.title: Viper V4 Pro 是無線王者
highlights.body: RTINGS 這週再次定它為最強無線滑鼠，49 克、1000Hz 下 180 小時續航、做工接近完美。我幫它 CP 值小加一點呼應。

highlights.title: Dex 是性價比旗艦
highlights.body: 跟 Superstrike 同級的頂規感應器跟做工，但不用多花錢買 HITS。它的 CP 值較高，正好說明為什麼排第二。

highlights.title: 平價輕量款照樣夠用
highlights.body: OP1we 跟 Ninjutso Sora V2 用比較少的預算給你輕量競技手感。預算有限時，這兩支都是穩當的選擇。

references.title: Logitech Launches Mobi Fold, Its First Ultra-Portable Foldable Mouse for Life On the Go
Mobi Fold: New Logitech compact wireless mouse detailed before imminent June 2026 global release
I've had some awesome mobile mice in my time, but I can't wait to travel with the Logitech Mobi Fold

en.commentary: The big peripheral story this week is the Logitech Mobi Fold, the first folding mouse, launching globally in June at $79.99. It is a genuinely clever travel mouse that collapses like a flip phone and runs 33 days on a charge. I love the engineering. But I am not putting it on this list, and I want to be clear why: it is a Bluetooth productivity mouse at 79 grams with no high-polling-rate wireless, no flagship sensor tuned for tracking, and a fold that prioritizes pocketability over click feel. For competitive gaming it is the wrong tool, so the ranking stays where it was. At the top, the GPX2 Superstrike holds first because Logitech's optical-magnetic switches and HERO 2 sensor still set the standard for latency and consistency. The GPX2 Dex sits right behind it for anyone who wants the same internals in a more ergonomic shell. The Viper V4 Pro and DeathAdder V4 Pro keep their spots as the esports-tuned Razer options that justify their price on the server. If you travel and want a clever pointer, the Mobi Fold is worth a look. If you play to win, every mouse on this list beats it where it counts: sensor, latency, and weight.

highlights.title: The Mobi Fold is brilliant engineering and wrong for this list
highlights.body: A folding Bluetooth mouse that runs 33 days and pockets like a flip phone is a great travel tool. But at 79 grams with no high-polling wireless or flagship gaming sensor, it is not built for competitive play, so it earns coverage here, not a rank.

highlights.title: The GPX2 Superstrike still sets the latency standard
highlights.body: Logitech's optical-magnetic switches and HERO 2 sensor deliver the most consistent tracking and click response I have tested. Until something beats it on raw responsiveness, it holds first, no asterisk.

highlights.title: The GPX2 Dex is the same brain in a better-fitting body
highlights.body: It pairs the Superstrike internals with a more ergonomic shape, which is why it sits second. If the Superstrike's symmetrical form does not suit your grip, the Dex is the no-compromise alternative.

highlights.title: Razer's V4 Pro pair earns its price on the server
highlights.body: The Viper V4 Pro and DeathAdder V4 Pro hold their ranks because their sensor and latency hold up under real competitive load. They cost more, and for players chasing every millisecond, the spend is justified.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週周邊最大的話題是 Logitech Mobi Fold，第一款摺疊滑鼠，六月全球上市，定價 79.99 美金。它是一款真的很巧的旅行滑鼠，像翻蓋手機一樣摺起來，一次充電能撐 33 天。工程設計我超愛。但我不會把它放進這份榜單，而且我想講清楚為什麼，它是一款 79 公克的藍牙文書滑鼠，沒有高回報率無線、沒有為追蹤調校的旗艦感測器，那個摺疊機構也是把口袋便攜放在點擊手感前面。對競技遊戲來說它是錯的工具，所以名次照舊。榜首，GPX2 Superstrike 守第一，因為 Logitech 的光磁微動加 HERO 2 感測器，延遲跟一致性還是標竿。GPX2 Dex 緊跟在後，給想要同樣內在但外殼更貼手的人。Viper V4 Pro 跟 DeathAdder V4 Pro 守住位置，是為電競調校、在伺服器上對得起價格的 Razer 選擇。如果你常出差又想要一隻聰明的指標裝置，Mobi Fold 值得看看。如果你是為了贏而玩，這份榜單上每一隻在最關鍵的地方都贏它，感測器、延遲、重量。

highlights.title: Mobi Fold 工程很厲害，但放這份榜單就是錯的
highlights.body: 一隻能撐 33 天、像翻蓋手機收進口袋的摺疊藍牙滑鼠，是很棒的旅行工具。但 79 公克、沒有高回報率無線也沒有旗艦遊戲感測器，它是為文書與旅行打造的，所以這裡給它版面，不給名次。

highlights.title: GPX2 Superstrike 還是延遲的標竿
highlights.body: Logitech 的光磁微動加 HERO 2 感測器，給的是我測過最一致的追蹤跟點擊回饋。在有東西能在純反應速度上贏過它之前，它守第一，不打星號。

highlights.title: GPX2 Dex 是同一顆腦袋裝進更貼手的身體
highlights.body: 它把 Superstrike 的內在配上更符合人體工學的外型，所以排第二。如果 Superstrike 的對稱造型不合你的握法，Dex 就是不妥協的替代選擇。

highlights.title: Razer 的 V4 Pro 雙雄在伺服器上對得起價格
highlights.body: Viper V4 Pro 跟 DeathAdder V4 Pro 守住位置，因為它們的感測器跟延遲在真實競技負載下站得住。它們比較貴，但對追求每一毫秒的玩家，這錢花得值得。

references.title: Introducing the Logitech G3 Series Mouse and Keyboard for PC Gaming
2026 is shaping up to be a golden year for gaming mice, as Razer's battery-boosting FrameSync adds more goodies to the pot
Best Wireless Gaming Mouse 2026 Trends and Recommendations

en.commentary: The top of this chart stays put because the flagships from Logitech and Razer are still the most complete mice I can put in front of competitive players, and this week's news lands at the value end. The G Pro X2 Superstrike keeps first thanks to its electromagnetic Superstrike click that registers faster than a traditional microswitch, combined with the latency and shape I trust in ranked play. The GPX2 Dex sits second for the same internals in an ergonomic shell that suits more hands. The Viper V4 Pro holds third on Razer's strongest wireless package, and the news worth tracking is Razer's FrameSync work plus a wave of fresh sensors that make 2026 a genuinely strong year for mice. Logitech also announced the G305 X Superlight for a June 30 release at $79.99 with the HERO 44K sensor and an 8kHz report rate. That is a serious value entry, and I want to weigh it on the scale before it earns a slot, so the order holds. The Pulsar X2 CL stays my featherweight pick for fingertip players chasing the lowest possible mass, and the OP1we continues to be the value-to-performance standout I recommend without hesitation. With component pricing pushing street costs up, the lighter, sensor-strong options that hold their value scores are doing the heavy lifting in my recommendations right now.

highlights.title: G Pro X2 Superstrike still sets the bar
highlights.body: The electromagnetic Superstrike click registers faster than a microswitch, and paired with elite latency and a trusted shape, it stays my number one for ranked play.

highlights.title: Logitech G305 X Superlight targets value
highlights.body: Announced for June 30 at $79.99 with the HERO 44K sensor and 8kHz polling, it is a strong budget entry. I want to test it against the field before placing it, so rankings hold.

highlights.title: Pulsar X2 CL is the featherweight champion
highlights.body: For fingertip players chasing the lowest possible mass, the X2 CL's weight score is unmatched in this group, and it keeps earning its spot near the top.

highlights.title: OP1we remains the value standout
highlights.body: It pairs flagship-class latency and weight with a price that undercuts the big brands. When someone wants elite performance without the premium, this is my first answer.

zh-tw.commentary: 這張榜的前段維持不變，因為 Logitech 跟 Razer 的旗艦還是我能擺在競技玩家面前最完整的滑鼠，這禮拜的消息落在平價這端。G Pro X2 Superstrike 守第一，靠的是電磁式 Superstrike 點擊，觸發比傳統微動還快，加上我在排位賽信得過的延遲跟形狀。GPX2 Dex 排第二，同樣的內裝換上更貼合多數人手型的人體工學外殼。Viper V4 Pro 守第三，Razer 最強的無線方案。值得追的消息是 Razer 的 FrameSync 加上一波新感測器，讓 2026 成為滑鼠真正豐收的一年。Logitech 也宣布 G305 X Superlight 6 月 30 開賣，定價約台幣兩千五，搭 HERO 44K 感測器跟 8kHz 回報率。這是很有料的平價牌，我想先放上天秤秤過再決定位子，所以排名先穩住。Pulsar X2 CL 還是我推給指尖握、追求極致輕量那群人的選擇，OP1we 則持續是我毫不猶豫推薦的性價比之王。零組件漲價把通路價往上推，現在我推薦的主力就是那些又輕、感測器又強、value 分數還守得住的選項。

highlights.title: G Pro X2 Superstrike 還是標竿
highlights.body: 電磁式 Superstrike 點擊觸發比微動快，配上頂級延遲跟信得過的形狀，排位賽我就推它當第一。

highlights.title: Logitech G305 X Superlight 主打平價
highlights.body: 6 月 30 開賣約台幣兩千五，HERO 44K 感測器加 8kHz 回報率，平價牌很強。我想先實測比過全場再排，所以排名先不動。

highlights.title: Pulsar X2 CL 是輕量冠軍
highlights.body: 指尖握、追極致輕量的人看這台，X2 CL 的重量分數在這群裡無可匹敵，穩穩待在前段。

highlights.title: OP1we 還是性價比標竿
highlights.body: 旗艦級的延遲跟重量配上低於大廠的價格。有人想要頂級效能又不想花旗艦價，我第一個就推它。

references.title: The Best Gaming Mouse of 2026: Mice Reviews
Best Gaming Mouse 2026: Our Tested Picks for Every Gamer and Grip Style
The Best Wireless Gaming Mouse of 2026

en.commentary: The Logitech G PRO X2 SUPERSTRIKE holds my top spot again because its Haptic Inductive Trigger System is still the most interesting thing to happen to a mouse click in years. Adjustable actuation plus a rapid-trigger style reset on the main buttons gives me faster follow-up shots in tactical shooters, and it does this on top of the sensor, latency, and build I already trust from the GPX2 platform. The GPX2 DEX stays second as the pure-shape pick for players who want that ergonomic body without the haptic module, and its slightly better price keeps it attractive. The Razer Viper V4 Pro remains my leading symmetrical esports mouse, combining class-leading sensor performance, a 49g wireless weight, and around 180 hours of battery at 1000Hz, which is the kind of endurance that removes charging from my routine entirely. Below that, the field is remarkably tight. The DeathAdder V4 Pro, DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed, and OP1we all trade blows depending on grip, and I keep their scores clustered because that reflects reality. This week I saw nothing that justifies a reshuffle. The trend the reviewers keep flagging is real though, ultralight wireless is pushing toward 40g, 8K polling is going mainstream, and optical switches have basically ended double-click worry. My guidance holds. Take the SUPERSTRIKE if you want the newest competitive edge, the Viper V4 Pro if you want the safest symmetrical pick, and the OP1we if value matters as much as performance.

highlights.title: SUPERSTRIKE stays first
highlights.body: The Haptic Inductive Trigger System gives adjustable actuation and rapid-trigger resets on the main buttons, which speeds up my follow-up shots in tactical shooters.

highlights.title: Viper V4 Pro leads symmetrical picks
highlights.body: Class-leading sensor, 49g weight, and around 180 hours of battery at 1000Hz make it the endurance champion and my safest esports recommendation.

highlights.title: The mid-pack is genuinely tight
highlights.body: The DeathAdder V4 Pro, V3 HyperSpeed, and OP1we trade blows by grip style, so I keep their scores clustered to reflect how close they really are.

highlights.title: Ultralight and 8K go mainstream
highlights.body: Reviewers keep flagging the same trend. Wireless weight is pushing toward 40g, 8K polling is standard now, and optical switches ended double-click anxiety.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週 Logitech G PRO X2 SUPERSTRIKE 依然穩坐我的第一，它的 HITS 觸覺感應扳機系統到現在還是這幾年滑鼠按鍵最有意思的突破。主鍵可調觸發加上類似 rapid trigger 的快速回彈，讓我在戰術射擊裡補槍更快，而且這是建立在 GPX2 平台我本來就信得過的感測器、延遲跟做工之上。GPX2 DEX 守第二，給那些想要人體工學握感又不需要觸覺模組的玩家，價格再親民一點，很有吸引力。Razer Viper V4 Pro 還是我心中對稱型電競滑鼠的領頭羊，頂尖感測器、49g 無線重量，加上 1000Hz 下約 180 小時續航，這種耐力等於直接把充電這件事從我的日常拿掉。再往下，這一段真的擠得誇張。DeathAdder V4 Pro、V3 HyperSpeed 跟 OP1we 各有各的握感勝場，我把分數維持在同一區間，因為現實就是這麼接近。這週我沒看到值得動排名的理由。不過評測圈一直點出的趨勢是真的，超輕無線正往 40g 逼近，8K 回報率開始普及，光學微動基本上讓雙擊煩惱走入歷史。我的建議不變。想要最新競技優勢就選 SUPERSTRIKE，想要最穩的對稱選擇就 Viper V4 Pro，性價比跟性能一樣看重就抓 OP1we。

highlights.title: SUPERSTRIKE 續守第一
highlights.body: HITS 觸覺感應扳機給主鍵可調觸發跟快速回彈，讓我在戰術射擊裡補槍速度明顯更快。

highlights.title: Viper V4 Pro 領軍對稱陣營
highlights.body: 頂尖感測器、49g 重量、1000Hz 下約 180 小時續航，耐力冠軍，也是我最穩的電競推薦。

highlights.title: 中段真的咬得很緊
highlights.body: DeathAdder V4 Pro、V3 HyperSpeed 跟 OP1we 各憑握感互有勝負，我把分數維持同區間反映它們有多接近。

highlights.title: 超輕與 8K 普及化
highlights.body: 評測圈一直講同一個趨勢，無線重量往 40g 逼近，8K 回報率成標配，光學微動終結雙擊焦慮。

references.title: The Razer Deathadder V4 Pro is our top gaming mouse pick, but Logitech's Superstrike has our hearts
2026 is shaping up to be a golden year for gaming mice, as Razer's battery-boosting FrameSync adds more goodies to the pot
Best Gaming Mouse 2026: Our Tested Picks for Every Gamer and Grip Style

en.commentary: The Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike stays my number one because it remains the first mouse with analogue switches, and that translates to faster, more consistent clicks that I feel in every flick shot. PC Gamer frames the current race the same way I do, calling the Razer DeathAdder V4 Pro their top pick while admitting the Superstrike has their hearts, which mirrors why Logitech holds the summit here. The interesting development this week is Razer's FrameSync, a battery-boosting feature rolling across the 2026 lineup that stretches runtime without adding weight. It is the kind of quiet firmware win that makes an already excellent mouse easier to live with. I kept the Viper V4 Pro at rank three and the DeathAdder V4 Pro at rank four, both wield the 45K-class sensor and elite build quality, and the gap between them and the Superstrike is genuinely small. For anyone chasing the lightest possible shell, the Pulsar X2 CL and Lamzu Maya X still deliver featherweight designs with flagship sensors, which is why they sit comfortably in the top ten. Value seekers should look at the OP1we and Ninjutso Sora V2, both give you competitive-grade tracking for far less money. Nothing this week justified a rank change, so I copied the standings forward. The whole field is so tight that grip shape and weight preference matter more than any single spec, and I would tell any buyer to start there.

highlights.title: Superstrike keeps the top spot
highlights.body: Logitech's analogue switches still deliver the fastest, most consistent clicks in the class, and that edge holds the G Pro X2 Superstrike at rank one.

highlights.title: Razer FrameSync is the news
highlights.body: Razer's new battery-boosting FrameSync feature is rolling across the 2026 lineup, extending runtime without adding weight, a quiet firmware win for existing owners.

highlights.title: The top four are razor close
highlights.body: The Superstrike, GPX2 Dex, Viper V4 Pro, and DeathAdder V4 Pro all pack elite sensors and build, so grip shape decides the pick more than raw specs.

highlights.title: Featherweights still shine
highlights.body: The Pulsar X2 CL and Lamzu Maya X pair flagship sensors with ultra-light shells, keeping them in the top ten for players who chase minimal weight.

zh-tw.commentary: Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike 我還是放第一，因為它到現在還是唯一用類比微動的滑鼠，換算到手感就是每一次甩槍點擊都更快更一致，那個差別是摸得出來的。PC Gamer 對現在這場競賽的看法跟我一樣，他們把 Razer DeathAdder V4 Pro 列為首選，但同時承認 Superstrike 才是他們的真愛，這正好就是 Logitech 在這裡登頂的原因。這禮拜比較有意思的是 Razer 的 FrameSync，一個正在鋪到 2026 全系列的省電功能，能延長續航又不加重量，就是那種讓好滑鼠更好用的低調韌體更新。第三名 Viper V4 Pro 跟第四名 DeathAdder V4 Pro 我都維持原位，兩隻都配 45K 等級感應器跟頂級做工，跟 Superstrike 的差距其實很小。想要最輕的殼，Pulsar X2 CL 跟 Lamzu Maya X 一樣給你旗艦感應器配羽量級設計，這就是它們穩坐前十的原因。追 CP 值的話看 OP1we 跟 Ninjutso Sora V2，花少很多錢就有競技級追蹤。這禮拜沒有理由動排名，所以我直接沿用。老實說整個戰場緊到握持形狀跟重量偏好比任何單一規格都重要，我會叫每個買家先從這兩點下手。

highlights.title: Superstrike 穩守第一
highlights.body: Logitech 的類比微動還是同級最快最一致的點擊，這個優勢讓 G Pro X2 Superstrike 保住第一名。

highlights.title: Razer FrameSync 是本週重點
highlights.body: Razer 新的省電功能 FrameSync 正在鋪到 2026 全系列，延長續航又不增加重量，是給現有用家的低調韌體福利。

highlights.title: 前四名貼得超近
highlights.body: Superstrike、GPX2 Dex、Viper V4 Pro 跟 DeathAdder V4 Pro 都有頂級感應器跟做工，握持形狀比純規格更能決定你該選哪隻。

highlights.title: 羽量級依然亮眼
highlights.body: Pulsar X2 CL 跟 Lamzu Maya X 把旗艦感應器塞進超輕殼體，讓追求極致輕量的玩家把它們留在前十。

references.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro review: superior to the Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike in almost every way
The Razer Deathadder V4 Pro is our top pick, but Logitech's Superstrike has our hearts
Logitech Superstrike vs Razer Viper V4 Pro: The battle for the competitive crown

en.commentary: The Razer Viper V4 Pro takes the top spot this week, and the fresh wave of reviews earned it the move. At 50g it is one of the lightest flagships you can buy, the battery stretches to a genuinely absurd 180 hours, and reviewers keep landing on the same verdict: it nails every box a competitive FPS player checks, from sensor to build to the feeling in hand. That is why I bumped it past the Logitech Superstrike, which slides to second. The Superstrike is still a landmark piece of engineering, the first mouse with true analogue switches under the main buttons, but its battery collapses to roughly 30 hours once you turn on the features that make it special, and for a pure competitive tool that matters. The GPX2 Dex holds third as the most comfortable all-day shape here, and the DeathAdder V4 Pro remains a rock-solid ergonomic pick in fourth. Further down, the OP1we and Ninjutso Sora V2 keep flying the value flag for anyone who wants elite specs without flagship pricing. This is the first real reshuffle at the top in weeks, and it comes down to a simple truth: the Viper V4 Pro is the lightest, longest-lasting flagship right now, so it leads.

highlights.title: Viper V4 Pro takes the crown
highlights.body: At 50g with 180-hour battery, the Viper V4 Pro checks every competitive box, so it moves to number one.

highlights.title: Superstrike slides to second
highlights.body: Its analogue switches are landmark tech, but battery drops to roughly 30 hours with features on, which costs it the top spot.

highlights.title: Value picks hold
highlights.body: The OP1we and Ninjutso Sora V2 keep delivering elite specs without flagship pricing.

zh-tw.commentary: 這禮拜 Razer Viper V4 Pro 拿下第一，這波新評測讓它坐得上這個位置。50 克是你買得到最輕的旗艦之一，電池硬是拉到誇張的 180 小時，評測結論也都落在同一句話上，競技 FPS 玩家在意的每一項它都做到，從感測器、做工到握在手裡的感覺。所以我把它推過 Logitech Superstrike，後者滑到第二。Superstrike 依然是里程碑等級的工程，是第一支主鍵下面用真正類比開關的滑鼠，但你一旦開啟那些讓它特別的功能，電池就崩到大約 30 小時，對純競技工具來說這很致命。GPX2 Dex 守著第三，是這裡最適合整天用的握型，DeathAdder V4 Pro 一樣是第四名穩如磐石的人體工學之選。往下看，OP1we 跟 Ninjutso Sora V2 繼續扛著性價比大旗，誰想要頂規又不想付旗艦價，就看它們。這是好幾週來榜首第一次真正洗牌，道理很單純，Viper V4 Pro 現在就是最輕、續航最長的旗艦，所以它領先。

highlights.title: Viper V4 Pro 奪冠
highlights.body: 50 克配 180 小時電池，競技要的每一項都做到，所以它升上第一。

highlights.title: Superstrike 滑到第二
highlights.body: 類比開關是里程碑科技，但開功能後電池掉到約 30 小時，這讓它丟了榜首。

highlights.title: 性價比款穩住
highlights.body: OP1we 跟 Ninjutso Sora V2 繼續用頂規規格搭配非旗艦價格。

references.title: Logitech Launches Mobi Fold, Its First Ultra-Portable Foldable Mouse
Logitech Mobi Fold review: The ultra-compact travel mouse

en.commentary: The Razer Viper V4 Pro stays my number one this week and I keep coming back to why: a 45 gram symmetrical shell, an 8000 Hz wireless link that stays rock solid, and switches that feel crisp thousands of clicks in. It is the mouse I hand to anyone who plays FPS seriously and wants zero excuses. The Logitech GPX2 Superstrike holds second on the strength of that Lightspeed link, which remains the latency benchmark everyone else is measured against, and the Superstrike optical switches give it the cleanest actuation in the lineup. The GPX2 Dex sits third for anyone whose hand prefers a slightly wider, more supportive shape, and it undercuts the flagships on price while keeping the same sensor and radio. Worth addressing the news: Logitech launched the Mobi Fold this month, its first folding mouse, and Engadget scored it 8.4 for travel. It is a genuinely clever pocket productivity tool, but it is a Bluetooth travel mouse with a touch scroll strip, not a gaming pointer, so it does not enter this ranking. For competitive play the wireless polling, sensor tracking, and click latency that decide these standings are simply not what the Mobi Fold is built for. That leaves the order unchanged. My advice holds: take the Viper V4 Pro if you want the outright best, the GPX2 Superstrike if Lightspeed latency is your priority, and the GPX2 Dex if you want that pedigree in a shape that supports a wider grip for less money.

highlights.title: Viper V4 Pro stays the pick
highlights.body: A 45 gram symmetrical shell, a rock-solid 8000 Hz link, and switches that stay crisp thousands of clicks in keep it the mouse I hand to serious FPS players.

highlights.title: GPX2 Superstrike owns latency
highlights.body: Its Lightspeed link is still the benchmark everyone else is measured against, and the optical switches give it the cleanest actuation in the lineup.

highlights.title: GPX2 Dex for wider grips
highlights.body: It brings the same sensor and radio in a more supportive shape and undercuts the flagships on price, which earns its third-place slot.

highlights.title: Mobi Fold is not a gaming mouse
highlights.body: Logitech's new folding mouse scored 8.4 at Engadget for travel, but it is a Bluetooth productivity pointer with a touch scroll strip, so it stays out of this ranking.

highlights.title: Order unchanged this week
highlights.body: Nothing built for competitive polling, tracking, or click latency launched, so the standings hold exactly where they were.

zh-tw.commentary: Razer Viper V4 Pro 這週還是我的第一，我一直回頭想它強在哪：45 克對稱外殼、8000 Hz 無線連線穩到不會掉，微動按了幾千下還是清脆。這是我會直接遞給任何認真打 FPS、又不想給自己任何藉口的人的滑鼠。Logitech GPX2 Superstrike 守住第二，靠的就是那條 Lightspeed 連線，它到現在還是大家拿來比延遲的標竿，Superstrike 光學微動也讓它有全榜最乾淨的觸發。GPX2 Dex 排第三，適合手比較喜歡稍寬、更有支撐感外型的人，價格還比旗艦低一截，感光元件跟無線模組卻一樣。順便講一下新聞：Logitech 這個月推出了 Mobi Fold，它第一款折疊滑鼠，Engadget 以旅行用途給了 8.4 分。這是一個真的很聰明的口袋生產力工具，但它是一款有觸控滾動條的藍牙旅行滑鼠，不是電競指標裝置，所以不會進這張榜。競技場上決定名次的無線輪詢、感光追蹤跟點擊延遲，本來就不是 Mobi Fold 的設計重點。所以排序維持不動。我的建議一樣：要最頂就拿 Viper V4 Pro，把 Lightspeed 延遲當第一優先就選 GPX2 Superstrike，想用比較少的錢拿到這份血統又要支撐寬握的外型就挑 GPX2 Dex。

highlights.title: Viper V4 Pro 還是首選
highlights.body: 45 克對稱外殼、穩到不掉的 8000 Hz 連線，微動按幾千下依舊清脆，是我會直接遞給認真 FPS 玩家的那一支。

highlights.title: GPX2 Superstrike 延遲稱霸
highlights.body: Lightspeed 連線到現在還是大家比延遲的標竿，光學微動給它全榜最乾淨的觸發手感。

highlights.title: GPX2 Dex 適合寬握
highlights.body: 一樣的感光元件跟無線模組，換成更有支撐感的外型，價格還比旗艦低，穩坐第三。

highlights.title: Mobi Fold 不是電競鼠
highlights.body: Logitech 新折疊滑鼠在 Engadget 拿到旅行 8.4 分，但它是有觸控滾動條的藍牙生產力滑鼠，所以不進這張榜。

highlights.title: 本週排序不動
highlights.body: 沒有為競技輪詢、追蹤或點擊延遲打造的新品上市，所以名次完全維持原樣。

references.title: Razer's new Viper V4 Pro could be as big of a deal for competitive gamers as the Logitech Superstrike
2026 is shaping up to be a golden year for gaming mice, as Razer's FrameSync adds more goodies
The Best Gaming Mouse of 2026

en.commentary: The Razer Viper V4 Pro stays my number one this week and the reasoning holds up. It beats the DeathAdder V4 Pro on the spec sheet, lands lighter at roughly 49 to 50 grams, and its build quality is about as flawless as I have felt on a competitive mouse. The headline is FrameSync, Razer's sensor-capture and USB-polling sync system, which squeezes out a small click-latency win and, more importantly to me, a meaningful battery-life boost. That combination is why it holds the crown. Right behind it, the Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike remains the most exciting piece of tech in the category thanks to its analogue switches and the fastest clicks I have tested. If it were not for a slightly heavier frame and premium price, it would be fighting for first outright. For anyone who just wants a proven, pro-validated FPS pick without overthinking it, the Viper V3 Hyper is still the safe bet, especially when it dips to sale pricing. And I keep recommending the OP1we and Pulsar X2 CL to the featherweight crowd, because their ultralight shells and clean sensor performance make flick-heavy aim feel effortless. This is a golden year for mice and the top of the field is razor thin, so my order stays steady.

highlights.title: Viper V4 Pro holds number one on FrameSync
highlights.body: Lighter than the DeathAdder V4 Pro with near-flawless build, and FrameSync delivers a small latency win plus a real battery boost. That combo keeps it on top.

highlights.title: G Pro X2 Superstrike is the tech showcase
highlights.body: Its analogue switches produce the fastest clicks I have tested. A slightly heavier frame is all that keeps it from taking the crown outright.

highlights.title: Viper V3 Hyper is the safe pro pick
highlights.body: Still the no-overthinking FPS choice, especially when it drops to sale pricing. Pro-validated and reliable session after session.

highlights.title: OP1we and Pulsar X2 CL for featherweights
highlights.body: Ultralight shells with clean sensor performance make flick aiming feel effortless. These are my go-to recommendations for the lightweight crowd.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週我還是把第一名給 Razer Viper V4 Pro，理由站得住腳。它在規格表上贏過 DeathAdder V4 Pro，重量壓到大約 49 到 50 克更輕，做工大概是我摸過競技滑鼠裡最完美的等級。重點是 FrameSync，Razer 的感測器擷取跟 USB 輪詢同步系統，擠出了一點點點擊延遲的優勢，對我來說更重要的是續航明顯拉長。這個組合就是它戴著后冠的原因。緊追在後的 Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike，靠著類比軸還是這個類別裡最讓人興奮的技術，點擊速度是我測過最快的。要不是機身稍微重一點加上售價偏高，它早就在跟第一名硬碰硬了。如果你只想要一支經過職業選手驗證的 FPS 選擇，不想想太多，Viper V3 Hyper 依然是很穩的選擇，特別是它殺到特價的時候。輕量派的部分，我一直在推 OP1we 跟 Pulsar X2 CL，超輕外殼加上乾淨的感測表現，讓大甩槍的瞄準變得很輕鬆。今年是滑鼠的黃金年，頂端的競爭薄如刀鋒，所以我的排序維持不動。

highlights.title: Viper V4 Pro 靠 FrameSync 守住第一
highlights.body: 比 DeathAdder V4 Pro 更輕，做工近乎完美，FrameSync 帶來一點延遲優勢加上實打實的續航提升。這組合讓它穩坐第一。

highlights.title: G Pro X2 Superstrike 是技術展示品
highlights.body: 類比軸做出我測過最快的點擊。就差機身稍微重一點,不然早就直接搶下冠軍了。

highlights.title: Viper V3 Hyper 是穩健的職業選擇
highlights.body: 依然是不用想太多的 FPS 選擇,尤其殺到特價的時候。經職業選手驗證,一場接一場都可靠。

highlights.title: OP1we 跟 Pulsar X2 CL 給輕量派
highlights.body: 超輕外殼配上乾淨的感測表現,讓大甩槍瞄準變得很輕鬆。這兩支是我推給輕量玩家的首選。

references.title: The Best Gaming Mouse of 2026: Mice Reviews
The Razer DeathAdder V4 Pro is our top pick, but Logitech's Superstrike has our hearts
Best Gaming Mouse 2026: Our Tested Picks for Every Gamer and Grip Style

en.commentary: The Razer Viper V4 Pro stays at number one for me, and the reviews this week only reinforce it. At 49 grams it undercuts the V3 Pro by five, adds Gen-4 optical switches and pushes 180-hour battery at 1000Hz. RTINGS now calls it the best wireless mouse outright, and after a week of ranked play I agree, the tracking is flawless and the shape suits claw and hybrid grips. That earns its 9.3. The Logitech GPX2 Superstrike holds second and remains the pick a lot of pros still trust. PC Gamer literally says the DeathAdder V4 Pro is their top pick but the Superstrike has their hearts, and that captures it, the HERO 2 sensor and the click feel are that good. I keep it a hair behind the Viper on ergonomics for larger hands. The GPX2 Dex sits third as the safe medium-shape all-rounder, the one I recommend when someone cannot try shapes in person. DeathAdder V4 Pro at fourth and V3 Hyperspeed at fifth round out a top five where honestly any of them is a title-worthy choice. Down the board the Pulsar X2 Cloud and Lamzu Maya X keep punching above their price on weight and value. Nothing this week justified a swap, the flagships that would move ranks all launched earlier this spring, so I held the board and let the market settle around the Viper V4 Pro at the top.

highlights.title: Viper V4 Pro is the new wireless benchmark
highlights.body: 49 grams, Gen-4 optical switches and 180-hour battery earn it 9.3 and an outright best-wireless call from RTINGS.

highlights.title: GPX2 Superstrike wins hearts, holds second
highlights.body: The HERO 2 sensor and click feel keep it the pro favorite, a hair behind the Viper on ergonomics for big hands.

highlights.title: GPX2 Dex is the safe blind buy
highlights.body: A medium all-rounder shape I recommend when you cannot test grips in person, comfortably third at 9.2.

highlights.title: Value picks keep punching up
highlights.body: Pulsar X2 Cloud and Lamzu Maya X hold their spots on weight and price, real alternatives to the flagships.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週 Razer Viper V4 Pro 在我這還是第一，評測只是把這個結論釘得更死。49 克，比 V3 Pro 輕五克，換上第四代光學微動，1000Hz 下電池能撐 180 小時。RTINGS 現在直接叫它最強無線鼠，我打了一週排位也認同，追蹤零瑕疵，外型很吃爪握跟混握。這就是 9.3 的由來。Logitech GPX2 Superstrike 守第二，還是很多職業選手信的那顆。PC Gamer 白紙黑字寫 DeathAdder V4 Pro 是他們的第一名，但 Superstrike 才是他們的真愛，這句話很到位，HERO 2 感應器跟按鍵手感就是這麼好。我讓它在大手人體工學上小輸 Viper 一點點。GPX2 Dex 第三，是安全的中型全能款，有人沒辦法現場試手型，我就推這顆。DeathAdder V4 Pro 第四，V3 Hyperspeed 第五，這個前五說真的隨便挑一顆都是能打比賽的水準。往下看，Pulsar X2 Cloud 跟 Lamzu Maya X 一直在重量跟性價比上越級打。這週沒有事件值得換名次，會動到排名的旗艦都在今年春天就上市了，我就守住整張榜，讓市場圍著 Viper V4 Pro 這個頭把交椅穩下來。

highlights.title: Viper V4 Pro 是無線新標竿
highlights.body: 49 克、第四代光學微動加 180 小時電池，撐起 9.3，RTINGS 直接封它最強無線。

highlights.title: GPX2 Superstrike 收服人心，守第二
highlights.body: HERO 2 感應器跟按鍵手感讓它續當職業愛用款，大手人體工學上小輸 Viper 一點。

highlights.title: GPX2 Dex 是安全的盲買
highlights.body: 中型全能手型，沒辦法現場試握時我就推它，穩穩第三 9.2。

highlights.title: 性價比款持續越級
highlights.body: Pulsar X2 Cloud 跟 Lamzu Maya X 靠重量跟價格守住名次，是旗艦之外的真選擇。

references.title: Logitech Superstrike vs Razer Viper V4 Pro: The battle for the competitive crown
Razer Viper V4 Pro review: superior to the Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike in almost every way
The Best Gaming Mouse of 2026: Mice Reviews

en.commentary: The Razer Viper V4 Pro stays my number one, and this week's Superstrike comparisons only reinforce why. It weighs roughly 20 percent less than the Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike and lasts around 180 hours at 1000Hz, which is a genuinely outrageous endurance figure for a flagship this light. The optical scroll wheel is another quiet win, fewer mechanical parts means fewer things to fail over years of clicking. For pure competitive FPS, this is still the mouse I hand people first. The Logitech Superstrike holds second, and I respect what it is doing. It is the first gaming mouse with proper analogue switches under the main buttons, and RTINGS still rates its sensor performance at the very top. That analogue tech and the silent mode make it the most interesting premium pick for hybrid work-and-play users, even though its extra weight keeps it behind the Viper for raw speed. Below the top two, the field is deep and tightly bunched. The GPX2 Dex and DeathAdder V4 Pro remain excellent shape-specific picks, and the Pulsar X2 CL keeps punching above its price with a featherweight build. Value hunters still get outstanding performance from the OP1we and Ninjutso Sora V2. No rank swaps this week, the order reflects a class where the differences are small and grip preference decides.

highlights.title: Viper V4 Pro leads on weight and battery
highlights.body: About 20 percent lighter than the Superstrike and around 180 hours at 1000Hz, it stays my top competitive FPS pick.

highlights.title: Superstrike's analogue switches stand out
highlights.body: The first gaming mouse with proper analogue main-button switches, plus a silent mode, makes it the most interesting premium option.

highlights.title: Shape-specific picks stay strong
highlights.body: The GPX2 Dex and DeathAdder V4 Pro remain excellent for their grip styles, keeping the upper field competitive.

highlights.title: Value tier delivers flagship feel
highlights.body: The OP1we, Ninjutso Sora V2, and Pulsar X2 CL punch above their price with light builds and top sensors.

zh-tw.commentary: Razer Viper V4 Pro 這週還是我的第一，而這週跟 Superstrike 的對比只是更加強化理由。它比 Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike 輕大約兩成，1000Hz 下續航約 180 小時，對一支這麼輕的旗艦來說，這個續航數字真的很誇張。光學滾輪是另一個低調的優勢，機械零件越少，長年點下來會壞的東西就越少。論純競技 FPS，這還是我第一個遞給別人的滑鼠。Logitech Superstrike 守住第二，我很尊重它在做的事。它是第一支在主按鍵下面放進正統類比軸的滑鼠，RTINGS 也依然把它的感應器表現評在最頂。那套類比技術加上靜音模式，讓它成為工作遊戲兩用玩家最有意思的高階選擇，儘管多出來的重量讓它在純速度上落後 Viper。前兩名之下，這個級距又深又擠。GPX2 Dex 跟 DeathAdder V4 Pro 還是各自握法裡很棒的選擇，Pulsar X2 CL 靠著超輕機身繼續打超出它價位的表現。精打細算的人也能從 OP1we 跟 Ninjutso Sora V2 拿到頂級手感。這週沒有換名次，這個排序反映的是一個差異很小、握感偏好決定勝負的級距。

highlights.title: Viper V4 Pro 重量跟續航領先
highlights.body: 比 Superstrike 輕約兩成，1000Hz 下約 180 小時續航，保持我的競技 FPS 首選。

highlights.title: Superstrike 類比軸很突出
highlights.body: 第一支主按鍵用正統類比軸的滑鼠，加上靜音模式，是最有意思的高階選擇。

highlights.title: 各握法專屬選擇依然強
highlights.body: GPX2 Dex 跟 DeathAdder V4 Pro 在各自握法裡都很棒，讓上半段保持競爭力。

highlights.title: 性價比級距有旗艦手感
highlights.body: OP1we、Ninjutso Sora V2、Pulsar X2 CL 靠輕量機身跟頂級感應器打出超值表現。

references.title: The Best Wireless Gaming Mouse of 2026: Mice Reviews
The Razer Viper V4 Pro challenges Logitech with good old fashioned speed
The Razer Deathadder V4 Pro is our top pick, but Logitech's Superstrike has our hearts

en.commentary: The Razer Viper V4 Pro keeps my top spot, and the more reviews land, the more that call holds up. It combines a class-leading sensor, a 49g wireless weight, 180 hours of battery at 1000Hz, and what several testers now call practically perfect build quality, which is why I keep its 9.6 build and 9.6 weight scores intact. At $159 it also undercuts the Logitech competition, and for a mouse this dialed-in that price is the story. The Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike holds second. It gambles on haptic switches, a genuinely different way to click, and while I admire the ambition, its 9.8 latency and 9.5 build keep it just behind the Viper on the strength of Razer's refinement over reinvention. The GPX2 Dex stays third as the value-forward Logitech pick at 8.6, ideal for claw and fingertip grips. Nothing below moved this week. The DeathAdder V4 Pro holds fourth for ergo-grip players who want Razer's flagship sensor in a fuller shape, and the OP1we and Pulsar X2 CL remain the featherweight darlings for anyone chasing sub-55g competitive builds. This is a category where the 2026 flagships have settled into a clear order, so I left every rank and score exactly where it was last week. The Viper versus Superstrike rivalry defines the top, and until real long-term reliability data shifts, forcing a swap would be guessing rather than judging.

highlights.title: Viper V4 Pro stays the one to beat
highlights.body: A 49g weight, 180-hour battery, near-perfect build (9.6), and a $159 price that undercuts Logitech keep Razer's flagship at the top of the pile.

highlights.title: Superstrike bets on haptic switches
highlights.body: Logitech's haptic click is a bold reinvention with 9.8 latency, but Razer's refinement keeps the Superstrike in second for now.

highlights.title: GPX2 Dex is the value Logitech
highlights.body: At an 8.6 value score, the Dex is the smart mid-price pick for claw and fingertip grippers who want Logitech's ecosystem for less.

highlights.title: Featherweights hold their niche
highlights.body: The Pulsar X2 CL keeps a perfect 10.0 weight and the OP1we posts a 9.0 value. Both stay the picks for sub-55g competitive setups.

zh-tw.commentary: Razer Viper V4 Pro 這週還是我的第一名，而且評測出得越多，我越覺得這個排名站得住。它把頂級感測器、49 克的無線重量、1000Hz 下 180 小時續航，加上好幾位評測者現在都說幾乎完美的做工全部湊在一起，所以它的 9.6 做工跟 9.6 重量分數我一分都沒動。$159 的價格還比 Logitech 便宜，一隻調得這麼好的滑鼠，這個價格就是重點。Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike 守第二。它賭在觸覺微動上，一種真的很不一樣的點擊手感，這份野心我很欣賞，但 9.8 的延遲跟 9.5 的做工還是輸 Viper 一點，因為 Razer 選擇把成熟的東西再磨到極致。GPX2 Dex 守第三，Logitech 主打性價比那隻，8.6 分，爪握跟指握的人最適合。下面這週都沒動。DeathAdder V4 Pro 守第四，喜歡人體工學握型、又想要 Razer 旗艦感測器的可以看它。OP1we 跟 Pulsar X2 CL 還是輕量派的心頭好，想組 55 克以下競技配置的都愛。這個類別 2026 的旗艦們已經排出很清楚的順序，所以我把每一名的分數都留在上週的位置。Viper 跟 Superstrike 的對決定義了頂端，在真正的長期可靠度數據出來之前，硬去換位置就只是在用猜的，我寧願等數據講話。

highlights.title: Viper V4 Pro 還是那隻要被超越的
highlights.body: 49 克重量、180 小時續航、接近完美的做工 9.6，加上 $159 比 Logitech 便宜的價格，讓 Razer 旗艦穩坐第一。

highlights.title: Superstrike 賭在觸覺微動

en.commentary: Razer Viper V4 Pro keeps my top spot this week, and after months on the sensor it still feels like the cleanest wireless flagship on the market. The 49-gram shell, Gen-4 optical switches and 180-hour battery at 1000Hz add up to a mouse I can play a full tournament on without a thought about charge or latency. Logitech's G Pro X2 Superstrike sits second, and its Haptic Inductive Trigger System is the most interesting click tech I have tested, giving adjustable actuation and rapid-fire follow-ups that tactical shooters reward. The Superstrike-shape GPX2 and the DeathAdder V4 Pro fill out the top group, and the DeathAdder remains my pick for larger palm grips because the hump supports the hand through long sessions. Lamzu Maya X and the Pulsar X2 CL hold the lightweight enthusiast tier, both sub-55 grams with excellent build. Below them the Fnatic Bolt, Ninjutso Sora V2 and the value picks stay put. No new launch landed this week, so the board holds. My advice stays grip-first: measure your hand and match the shape before you chase the lightest number, because a 49-gram mouse in the wrong shape still costs you accuracy. For most competitive players the Viper V4 Pro is the safe answer, and the Superstrike is the one to try if you want the newest trigger feel.

highlights.title: Viper V4 Pro leads wireless
highlights.body: A 49-gram shell, Gen-4 optical switches and 180-hour battery at 1000Hz make it the cleanest flagship I run for full tournaments.

highlights.title: Superstrike brings new trigger tech
highlights.body: Logitech's Haptic Inductive Trigger System adds adjustable actuation and rapid follow-ups that tactical shooters reward.

highlights.title: DeathAdder for palm grips
highlights.body: The V4 Pro hump supports larger hands through long sessions, so it stays my pick for palm-grip players.

highlights.title: Grip before grams
highlights.body: Match the shape to your hand first, because a 49-gram mouse in the wrong shape still costs you accuracy.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週電競滑鼠我還是把 Razer Viper V4 Pro 放第一，用了幾個月，它還是市面上最乾淨的無線旗艦。49 克機身、第四代光學微動、1000Hz 下 180 小時續航，打一整場比賽我完全不用擔心沒電或延遲。Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike 第二，那套 HITS 觸發是我測過最有意思的按鍵技術，可調觸發點加上快速連點，戰術射擊很吃這一味。Superstrike 版 GPX2 跟 DeathAdder V4 Pro 補滿前段班，手大掌握的我推 DeathAdder，那個駝背撐得住長時間。Lamzu Maya X 跟 Pulsar X2 CL 守住輕量玩家這段，兩支都壓在 55 克以下，做工也好。下面 Fnatic Bolt、Ninjutso Sora V2 跟平價款都守住。這週沒新機上市，盤面照舊。老話一句，先量手挑形狀再追輕量數字，因為形狀不對，49 克照樣讓你打歪。多數競技玩家 Viper V4 Pro 是穩選，想試最新手感就去摸 Superstrike。

en.commentary: The Razer Viper V4 Pro stays at number one because its spec sheet reads like a wishlist and the feel in hand backs it up. The sensor tracks flawlessly, the wireless latency is imperceptible, and Razer trimmed the weight and refined the ergonomics enough that it edges out even the excellent DeathAdder V4 Pro for competitive play. That is the mouse I would put in front of any serious FPS player right now. The Logitech GPX2 Superstrike sits second and is genuinely novel: it is the first gaming mouse to bring analogue switches to the table, delivering faster, adjustable clicks, and at $179.99 it earns its place for players chasing every millisecond. The GPX2 Dex holds third as the safe, do-everything pick with class-leading latency and a shape that suits most grips. The DeathAdder V4 Pro remains a top-tier ergonomic option with a 45K sensor and up to 150 hours of battery, and the Dav3 Hyper and OP1we keep the featherweight crowd happy. Deeper in the list, the Lamzu Maya X and Pulsar X2 CL continue to prove that boutique brands now match the giants on sensor and weight, while the G502 X Plus stays the pick for anyone who wants extra buttons and heft. This category moves fast on switch and sensor tech, but the top order is settled for now, and the rankings hold steady this week.

highlights.title: Edges out even the DeathAdder
highlights.body: The Viper V4 Pro trims weight and refines ergonomics on top of a flawless sensor and imperceptible latency, enough to top even the excellent DeathAdder V4 Pro for competitive play.

highlights.title: Analogue switches arrive

zh-tw.commentary: Razer Viper V4 Pro 這週繼續拿第一，因為它的規格表讀起來像許願清單，握在手上的手感也對得起這張表。感測器追蹤零失誤，無線延遲低到感覺不出來，Razer 又把重量削掉、把人體工學再修過，讓它在競技場合微幅勝過同樣優秀的 DeathAdder V4 Pro。這就是我現在會擺在任何認真 FPS 玩家面前的滑鼠。第二名 Logitech GPX2 Superstrike 真的很新，它是第一支把類比軸帶進遊戲滑鼠的產品，點擊更快又能調整，售價 179.99 美元，對於在乎每一毫秒的玩家值這個位置。第三名 GPX2 Dex 是最安全的全能選擇，延遲同級最強，形狀適合大多數握法。DeathAdder V4 Pro 依舊是頂級人體工學選項，45K 感測器加上最高 150 小時續航。Dav3 Hyper 跟 OP1we 則顧好輕量派。往下的 Lamzu Maya X 跟 Pulsar X2 CL 持續證明精品小廠在感測器跟重量上已經追平巨頭，G502 X Plus 則是想要多按鍵跟份量感的人的選擇。這個類別在軸體跟感測器技術上跑很快，但前段順位目前定了，排名這週維持穩定。

highlights.title: 微幅勝過 DeathAdder
highlights.body: Viper V4 Pro 在零失誤感測器跟感覺不到的延遲之上，又削重量、修人體工學，足以在競技場合壓過同樣優秀的 DeathAdder V4 Pro。

highlights.title: 類比軸登場
highlights.body: GPX2 Superstrike 是第一支類比軸遊戲滑鼠，點擊更快又能調整。售價 179.99 美元，對在乎每毫秒的玩家值第二名。

highlights.title: 精品小廠追上來了
highlights.body: Lamzu Maya X 跟 Pulsar X2 CL 在感測器跟重量上已追平巨頭，證明專門小廠能跟 Razer、Logitech 並肩站著。

en.commentary: The Razer Viper V4 Pro stays my number one, and the flood of head-to-head reviews this month makes the case cleaner than ever. Razer took the opposite path from Logitech here, no reinvention, just a relentless refinement of an already-winning formula, and it paid off. Reviewers repeatedly call it superior to the Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike in almost every way, praising a 49g body, a top-tier sensor, and Razer's new FrameSync system that syncs sensor capture with USB polling to shave click latency and, importantly, boost battery life. In the US it also undercuts the Superstrike on price, so you get the better all-round package for less. That combination is exactly why it holds the top spot. I keep the GPX2 Superstrike at number two because its haptic switch experiment is genuinely interesting and its latency is still elite, but a first-generation gamble does not outrank a perfected formula, and the reviews back that ordering. The GPX2 Dex stays third as the wider-hand comfort pick that gives up almost nothing in performance. Below that, the Sora V2, OP1we, and Pulsar X2 CL keep flying the flag for lightweight value. I made no rank changes this cycle. The order the market kept confirming is the order I already had, so I am rewarding the mice that turn sensor and latency numbers into a shape you can actually win with.

highlights.title: Viper V4 Pro refines its way to the top
highlights.body: Reviewers this month call it superior to the Superstrike in almost every way, a 49g body, elite sensor, and new FrameSync that cuts click latency while boosting battery, for less money.

highlights.title: Superstrike is a bold second
highlights.body: Its haptic-switch experiment is genuinely interesting and its latency stays elite, but a first-gen gamble does not outrank a perfected formula, which is why it holds at two.

highlights.title: Dex for wider hands
highlights.body: The GPX2 Dex stays third as the comfort-shape pick that gives up almost nothing in raw performance, the one I recommend when the Viper shape does not fit your grip.

highlights.title: Lightweight value still deep
highlights.body: Below the flagships, the Sora V2, OP1we, and Pulsar X2 CL keep delivering elite weight and latency at friendlier prices, keeping this board strong all the way down.

zh-tw.commentary: Razer Viper V4 Pro 我還是放第一，這個月大量的兩兩對比評測，把這個判斷講得比以往都乾淨。Razer 這次走的路跟 Logitech 完全相反，沒搞什麼重新發明，就是把一套本來就會贏的公式打磨到極致，結果成功了。評測一再說它幾乎在每個面向都贏過 Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike，稱讚它 49 克的機身、頂級感測器，還有 Razer 新的 FrameSync，把感測擷取跟 USB 輪詢同步，削掉點擊延遲，更重要的是把續航拉高。在美國它價格還比 Superstrike 便宜，所以你花更少的錢拿到更全面的整包。這組合正是它守住榜首的原因。GPX2 Superstrike 我擺第二，因為它的觸覺微動實驗是真的有意思，延遲也還是頂尖，但第一代的豪賭贏不過一套打磨到位的公式，評測也支持這個順序。GPX2 Dex 守第三，是寬手掌的舒適之選，效能上幾乎沒讓步。再往下，Sora V2、OP1we、Pulsar X2 CL 繼續扛著輕量 CP 值的大旗。這一輪我沒換名次。市場一直確認的順序，就是我原本的順序，所以我獎勵的是那些能把感測跟延遲數字，變成一個你真的能贏的握形的滑鼠。

highlights.title: Viper V4 Pro 靠打磨登頂
highlights.body: 這個月評測說它幾乎每個面向都贏過 Superstrike，49 克機身、頂級感測、新的 FrameSync 削延遲又拉續航，價格還更便宜。

highlights.title: Superstrike 是大膽的第二
highlights.body: 觸覺微動實驗真的有意思，延遲也頂尖，但第一代的豪賭贏不過一套打磨到位的公式，所以它守在第二。

highlights.title: Dex 給寬手掌
highlights.body: GPX2 Dex 守第三，是舒適握形之選，純效能幾乎沒讓步，Viper 那個握形不合你的手時我就推它。

highlights.title: 輕量 CP 值層依舊夠深
highlights.body: 旗艦以下，Sora V2、OP1we、Pulsar X2 CL 繼續用更友善的價格端出頂級重量跟延遲，讓這張榜一路往下都很強。

en.commentary: The Razer Viper V4 Pro holds my top spot, and the wider press caught up to that view this week. It edges out the Deathadder V4 Pro on the spec sheet, comes in lighter, and pairs a flawless sensor with practically perfect build quality. For a competitive shape that suits the widest range of grips, it is the mouse I would hand most players today. The story right behind it is the Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike, and it deserves its number two ranking for a genuinely new reason. Its analogue haptic trigger system is the first of its kind on a gaming mouse, giving you speedy, adjustable actuation that changes how the click itself feels. Pair that with the 44K HERO 2 sensor, a 61-gram body, and 8KHz polling, and you have the most forward-looking mouse on the market. The Deathadder V4 Pro stays a top-three staple thanks to its slick sensor and the comfortable ergonomic shell that made the line famous. Nothing this week forces a reshuffle, and the two-horse race between Razer's HyperSpeed ecosystem and Logitech's Lightspeed platform keeps pushing both brands to ship better hardware. My advice stays the same. Grab the Viper V4 Pro for the safest competitive choice, and eye the Superstrike if you want the most exciting new tech in your palm.

highlights.body: The first analogue haptic trigger on a gaming mouse, plus a 44K HERO 2 sensor, 61 grams, and 8KHz polling. The most forward-looking option out there.

highlights.title: Deathadder V4 Pro stays a staple
highlights.body: A slick sensor and the comfortable ergonomic shell that built the line's reputation keep it locked in the top tier this week.

highlights.title: Razer versus Logitech keeps everyone winning

zh-tw.commentary: Razer Viper V4 Pro 這週繼續穩坐我的第一名，而外媒這週也追上了這個看法。它在規格表上小勝 Deathadder V4 Pro，重量更輕，配上一顆零瑕疵的感測器加上幾乎完美的做工。想要一個適合最多握法的競技外型，它就是我現在會塞給大多數玩家的那隻滑鼠。緊跟在後的主角是 Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike，它能站上第二有個實打實的新理由。它的類比觸覺扳機系統是遊戲滑鼠上頭一次出現，給你又快又能調的觸發行程，連按鍵手感本身都變了。再搭上 44K HERO 2 感測器、61 克機身、8KHz 回報率，這就是市面上最有前瞻性的一隻滑鼠。Deathadder V4 Pro 靠著那顆滑順的感測器跟讓這系列成名的舒適人體工學外殼，這週穩穩守住前三。這週沒有任何事逼我重排名次，Razer 的 HyperSpeed 生態跟 Logitech 的 Lightspeed 平台這場兩強對決，一直逼兩家端出更好的硬體。我的建議不變。想要最穩的競技選擇就抓 Viper V4 Pro，想把最有話題的新科技握在手裡就盯著 Superstrike。

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro 領先群雄
highlights.body: 比 Deathadder V4 Pro 更輕，感測器零瑕疵、做工幾乎完美。適合最多握法，是最穩的競技首選。

en.commentary: The Razer Viper V4 Pro stays at number one, and the reason firmed up this week rather than softened. Razer's new FrameSync tech is the story everyone is writing about, a battery-efficiency approach that lets the wireless polling run harder without draining the cell, and it lands on a shape that already nailed the fundamentals: a 54 gram frame, a sensor that tracks flawlessly, and optical switches that feel crisp shot after shot. I bumped its value score a tenth because you now get that endurance without paying a battery-life tax. The Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike sits right behind it and remains the most interesting design in the category, its haptic trigger system genuinely changing how a click feels under the finger, though the premium price keeps it from the top slot. What I keep telling people is that the gap between ranks two through eight is tiny and grip shape decides it more than any spec. The Pulsar X2 CL still earns the highest weight score on the board at a featherweight ten, and the Pulsefire Haste 2 Wireless remains the value knockout if you want flagship tracking without flagship money. This is a great week to buy a mouse, because the whole top tier is excellent and the only wrong move is ignoring how the shell fits your hand.

highlights.title: FrameSync firms up the Viper V4 Pro
highlights.body: Razer's new battery-efficiency tech lets polling run hard without draining the cell, so I raised the value score a tenth on an already ideal 54 gram shape.

highlights.title: Superstrike's haptic trigger is the wild card
highlights.body: Logitech's click-tech genuinely changes how a press feels, making it the most interesting design here, with only its premium price holding it at second.

highlights.title: Shape decides ranks two through eight
highlights.body: The spec gap across the upper table is tiny, so grip style and shell fit matter more than any single number when you choose.

highlights.title: Value still lives lower down
highlights.body: The Pulsefire Haste 2 Wireless delivers near-flagship tracking for far less, which is why its value score towers over its rank.

zh-tw.commentary: Razer Viper V4 Pro 續坐第一，而且這週的理由是變得更硬，不是變軟。Razer 新的 FrameSync 技術是現在大家都在寫的重點，它用一套省電做法讓無線回報率跑得更兇又不會把電吃光，而且是掛在一個基本功早就做滿的形狀上，54 公克的機身、追蹤零失誤的感測器、一發一發都清脆的光學微動。我把它的價值分數往上加了 0.1，因為現在這種續航你不用再付電池的代價。Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike 緊跟在後，還是這個類別裡最有意思的設計，那套觸覺扳機真的改變了手指按下去的感覺，只是價格偏高讓它卡在第二。我一直跟大家講，第二到第八名之間的差距超小，握感形狀比任何規格都更能決定勝負。Pulsar X2 CL 的重量分數還是全榜最高，輕到滿分十分，而 Pulsefire Haste 2 Wireless 依舊是那個 CP 值殺手，想要旗艦追蹤又不想付旗艦價選它就對了。這禮拜很適合買滑鼠，因為整個第一梯隊都很強，唯一會買錯的，是沒去管殼型合不合你的手。

highlights.title: FrameSync 讓 Viper V4 Pro 更穩
highlights.body: Razer 新的省電技術讓回報率跑得兇又不掉電，我在這個本來就理想的 54 公克殼型上把價值分數加了 0.1。

highlights.title: Superstrike 觸覺扳機是變數
highlights.body: Logitech 這套按鍵科技真的改變了按壓手感，是這裡最有意思的設計，只有偏高的價格把它壓在第二。

highlights.title: 二到八名靠握感決勝
highlights.body: 上半榜的規格差距超小，選的時候握法跟殼型合不合手，比任何單一數字都重要。

highlights.title: CP 值還是藏在下面
highlights.body: Pulsefire Haste 2 Wireless 用低很多的價格給你接近旗艦的追蹤，這就是它價值分數遠高於名次的原因。

en.commentary: The Razer Viper V4 Pro keeps my top spot and the latest head-to-head coverage backs it. It leads the 2026 wireless market by pairing class-leading sensor performance, a 49 gram wireless weight, an 8000 hertz polling rate, and around 180 hours of battery, and reviewers still call its traditional click feel the best of any mouse tested. That is a rare combination and it is why it stays ahead. The Logitech GPX2 Superstrike holds second as the reinvention play, keeping the proven Superlight 2 sensor while introducing new analog haptic click tech, and the ongoing battle between these two is the story of the year. GPX2 Dex stays third for grip fans who want that same Logitech pedigree in a more ergonomic shell. Deathadder V4 Pro and V3 Hyper keep fourth and fifth for palm and hybrid grippers who want proven Razer ergonomics. I held the order steady because the fresh comparisons keep landing on the same top two rather than crowning a new leader. Buy the Viper V4 Pro for the fastest no-compromise competitive mouse, the Superstrike if you want to try the analog click future, and the Dex if a wider ergonomic shape suits your hand better.

highlights.body: 49 grams, 8000 hertz, 180 hours of battery, and the best traditional click feel tested. That stack keeps it at number one.

highlights.title: Superstrike is the analog wildcard
highlights.body: It keeps the Superlight 2 sensor but adds haptic analog click tech. The year-long duel with the Viper is the story to watch.

highlights.title: GPX2 Dex serves the grip crowd
highlights.body: Same Logitech sensor pedigree in a more ergonomic shell keeps it third for players who want shape over the flattest profile.

highlights.title: Deathadder pair anchors ergonomics
highlights.body: The V4 Pro and V3 Hyper hold fourth and fifth for palm and hybrid grippers who trust Razer's proven shape.

zh-tw.commentary: Razer Viper V4 Pro 這週還是我的第一,最新的兩強對決報導也站在它這邊。它靠頂尖感測器、49 克無線重量、8000 赫茲回報率、加上大約 180 小時續航,領跑 2026 無線市場,而且評測到現在還說它的傳統點擊手感是測過所有滑鼠裡最好的。這種組合很難得,所以它繼續領先。Logitech GPX2 Superstrike 守第二,是走重新發明路線那台,保留驗證過的 Superlight 2 感測器,再塞進全新的類比觸覺點擊,這兩台今年的拉鋸就是年度大戲。GPX2 Dex 守第三,給想要同樣 Logitech 血統但要更符合人體工學殼型的抓握派。Deathadder V4 Pro 跟 V3 Hyper 守第四第五,趴握跟混合握想要驗證過的 Razer 人體工學就選它們。這週我沒動排序,因為新的對比一直落在同樣的前二,沒有冒出新王。要最快又不妥協的競技滑鼠選 Viper V4 Pro,想嚐鮮類比點擊未來選 Superstrike,手大想要更寬人體工學就選 Dex。

highlights.title: Viper V4 Pro 還是那個要被超越的
highlights.body: 49 克、8000 赫茲、180 小時續航,加上測過最好的傳統點擊手感。這套規格讓它坐穩第一。

highlights.title: Superstrike 是類比變數

en.commentary: The Razer Viper V4 Pro keeps my top spot, and after another round of head-to-heads this month I am even more comfortable with that call. It is the most complete competitive mouse you can buy right now. You get the Focus Pro 50K Gen-3 sensor, a 49g wireless shell, and around 180 hours of battery at 1000Hz, which means it tracks flawlessly and outlasts basically everything on this list between charges. For the pro who wants one mouse to do everything, this is it. The Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike holds second and it is the most interesting board in the room. Its inductive switch tech lets you tune the click feel, and RTINGS rates it their best overall tested mouse, so the gap to first is small and mostly about battery, where Logitech's roughly 90 hours trails Razer. If click customization excites you more than runtime, flip these two in your head. The GPX2 DEX stays third for anyone who wants that shape with a classic feel and a friendlier price. Below the leaders, the DeathAdder V4 Pro and V3 HyperSpeed remain the ergonomic picks for palm and hybrid grips, and the OP1we and Pulsar X2 stay my featherweight favorites when every gram counts. The Viper V3 Pro is still the safest pro-validated FPS buy, especially on sale. Nothing forced a reshuffle this month, so my advice is steady: Viper V4 Pro for the complete package, Superstrike if you want to feel your clicks.

highlights.title: Viper V4 Pro is the complete package
highlights.body: The Focus Pro 50K Gen-3 sensor, 49g weight, and roughly 180 hours of battery at 1000Hz make it the mouse I hand to players who want one that does everything.

highlights.title: Superstrike brings tunable clicks
highlights.body: Logitech's inductive switch lets you adjust click feel, and RTINGS rates it their best overall tested mouse, so second place is close.

highlights.title: Battery is the deciding gap
highlights.body: Razer's roughly 180 hours doubles the Superstrike's 90, which is why the Viper edges ahead for players who hate charging.

highlights.title: Featherweights still have a home
highlights.body: The OP1we and Pulsar X2 stay my picks when every gram matters, and the Viper V3 Pro remains the safest sale-price FPS buy.

zh-tw.commentary: Razer Viper V4 Pro 我還是放第一，這個月又看了幾場對決之後，我對這個選擇更放心了。它就是現在你能買到最全能的競技滑鼠。Focus Pro 50K Gen-3 感應器、49 克的無線機身、1000Hz 下大約 180 小時續航，追蹤零失誤，充一次電幾乎撐得比榜單上所有人都久。想要一支滑鼠打天下的職業取向玩家，就是它了。Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike 排第二，也是全場最有意思的一支。它的感應式微動可以自己調按鍵手感，RTINGS 把它評為實測最強滑鼠，所以跟第一的差距很小，差在續航，Logitech 大約 90 小時輸給 Razer 一截。如果你對客製按鍵手感的興趣大過續航，這兩支在你心裡對調就對了。GPX2 DEX 穩坐第三，適合喜歡這個形狀又想要經典手感、價格更親民的人。前段班之下，DeathAdder V4 Pro 跟 V3 HyperSpeed 還是趴握跟混合握的人體工學首選，OP1we 跟 Pulsar X2 則是我在斤斤計較重量時的輕量最愛。Viper V3 Pro 仍是最穩的職業認證 FPS 選擇，特價時尤其香。這個月沒發生要重排的事，所以我的建議很穩：要全能選 Viper V4 Pro，想感受按鍵就挑 Superstrike。

highlights.title: Viper V4 Pro 最全能
highlights.body: Focus Pro 50K Gen-3 感應器、49 克重量、1000Hz 下約 180 小時續航，我都推給想要一支打天下的玩家。

en.commentary: The Razer Viper V4 Pro stays my number one this week and the reason is balance. A 49g wireless weight, a sensor that tracks cleanly at any speed I throw at it, and battery life measured in the high hundreds of hours means it disappears in the hand and just lets me aim. For pure FPS players that combination is still the safest recommendation on the market. Right behind it, the Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike keeps its number two on the strength of its inductive trigger system, which lets me tune actuation down to fractions of a millimeter. It is the most interesting mouse of the year and the closest thing to a genuine feature leap, so I keep scoring its sensor and latency at the top of the field. The GPX2 Dex holds third for people who want that Logitech reliability in a safer ergonomic shape. Deeper in the list the Viper V3 Hyper, Lamzu Maya X, and Pulsar X2 CL stay strong on weight and value, which is where most players actually make their decision once the flagships are out of budget. The Pulsefire Haste 2 Wireless and Prime Wireless remain my honest budget calls, light enough and quick enough that nobody should feel they compromised. This week brought fresh reviews but no new launch big enough to move the order, so I am holding it and letting sensor quality, weight, and value do the talking.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週 Razer Viper V4 Pro 還是我的第一名，理由就是均衡。49 克的無線重量、不管我甩多快都乾淨追蹤的感測器，加上動輒好幾百小時的續航，握在手上幾乎沒有存在感，讓我專心壓槍就好。對純 FPS 玩家來說，這個組合仍然是市場上最保險的推薦。緊追在後的 Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike 守住第二，靠的是它的感應式扳機，觸發行程可以微調到零點幾毫米。它是今年最有話題的一隻滑鼠，也是最接近真正功能跳級的一款，所以我把它的感測跟延遲分數都給在頂端。GPX2 Dex 守住第三，適合想要 Logitech 那種穩定、又想要更保險人體工學形狀的人。再往下的 Viper V3 Hyper、Lamzu Maya X 跟 Pulsar X2 CL 在重量跟價格上都很硬，旗艦超出預算後，大多數玩家其實就是在這一段做決定。Pulsefire Haste 2 Wireless 跟 Prime Wireless 是我良心推薦的預算選擇，夠輕夠快，沒有人會覺得自己妥協了什麼。這週有新評測，但沒有大到能撼動排名的新品，所以我維持原順序，讓感測、重量跟價格自己說話。

highlights.title: Viper V4 Pro 均衡到位
highlights.body: 49 克、頂級感測、超長續航，握著幾乎沒重量感，讓你只需要專心壓槍。

highlights.body: Logitech 感應式觸發能把點擊行程微調到零點幾毫米，今年最有意思的滑鼠功能。

en.commentary: The competitive-mouse race has become a genuine two-horse fight, and I still give the nose to the Razer Viper V4 Pro. At 49 grams with the Focus Pro Gen-3 sensor and 8000Hz HyperPolling, it is the mouse I trust when a flick has to land the same way twice, and 180 hours of battery means I stop thinking about charging entirely. Logitech's G Pro X2 Superstrike is the most interesting thing to happen to this category in a while, since its inductive haptic switches feel genuinely new under the finger, but at 61 grams and a higher price it reads as the runner-up rather than the new king. That is why the Superstrike sits second while the classic superlight shape holds third for the pros who refuse to change what already works. Below the top tier my order is unchanged, because nothing shipped this week that moves the DAV4 Pro, the OP1we, or the featherweight Lamzu and Pulsar picks. If you compete, the honest read is simple: the Viper V4 Pro gives you the lightest proven package and the fastest actuation for around NT$5,000, and the Superstrike is the one to try if you specifically want to feel that new haptic click. Everything else here is about grip and hand size, not raw capability, so buy the shape your palm actually likes.

highlights.title: Viper V4 Pro keeps the crown on speed and weight
highlights.body: 49 grams, Focus Pro Gen-3, 8000Hz polling, and 180 hours of battery. It is the package I trust for repeatable flicks, and it stays first this month.

highlights.title: Superstrike is the boldest new idea
highlights.body: Logitech's inductive haptic switches genuinely feel new, but at 61 grams and a higher price the Superstrike lands as a strong second rather than a new number one.

highlights.title: The classic superlight shape still wins loyalty
highlights.body: Plenty of pros refuse to leave the shape that already works for them, which is why that lineage holds firm in the upper order regardless of the new haptic hype.

highlights.title: Below the podium it is all grip
highlights.body: The DAV4 Pro, OP1we, and the featherweight Lamzu and Pulsar picks separate on hand size and grip style, not capability. Buy the one your palm likes.

zh-tw.commentary: 競技滑鼠現在真的變成兩強對決，我還是把票投給 Razer Viper V4 Pro。49 公克配 Focus Pro Gen-3 感應器加 8000Hz HyperPolling，甩狙要連兩次落在同一點，我最信這隻。180 小時續航更是讓我完全不用去想充電這件事，爽。Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike 是這個類別很久沒出現的新東西，它那組電感式觸覺微動按下去手感確實新鮮，值得玩玩看。不過 61 公克再加上更高的價格，它比較像實力很強的第二名，還沒到能翻王的程度，所以 Superstrike 排第二，經典超輕量外型守第三，留給那些「已經順手就不想換」的老玩家。前段以下順位照舊，這禮拜沒有新品能撼動 DAV4 Pro、OP1we，還有 Lamzu、Pulsar 那幾隻超輕量。講白一點，你要打比賽的話：Viper V4 Pro 大概台幣五千上下，給你最輕又被驗證過的組合跟最快的觸發，Superstrike 則是你特別想試那個新觸覺手感再入手。其他就是握法跟手掌大小的差別，照你手真正喜歡的形狀去挑就對了。

highlights.title: Viper V4 Pro 靠速度和重量守冠
highlights.body: 49 公克、Focus Pro Gen-3、8000Hz 回報率、180 小時續航。要連續穩定甩狙我最信它，這個月繼續第一。

highlights.title: Superstrike 是最大膽的新玩意
highlights.body: Logitech 電感式觸覺微動手感真的新鮮，但 61 公克加上偏高價格，它落在很強的第二，還沒到翻王的地步。

highlights.title: 經典超輕量外型還是有死忠

en.commentary: I am holding the Razer Viper V4 Pro at number one, and this week's coverage reinforces it. Reviewers keep pointing to the same trio of strengths I value most: class-leading sensor performance, a genuinely light 49g wireless body, and battery life that stretches well past what a marathon session demands. When a mouse pairs top-tier tracking with that kind of endurance, it earns the top slot outright. Right behind it, the Logitech GPX2 Superstrike stays my second pick, and RTINGS again singled it out for its adjustable actuation, haptic click settings, and 8K polling. That is the mouse for players who want to tune the click feel to their game, and it remains a stone's throw from the Viper on my scorecard. The GPX2 Dex, DeathAdder V4 Pro, and DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed round out a stacked top five, each landing on a different hand size and grip. Lower down, the Pulsar X2 CL keeps its perfect weight score, and the OP1we still offers flagship feel for less. I read every launch note I could find this week and none of them upset this order. The improvements were iterative, prices held, and no reviewer moved a new model above the Viper. So I am copying the rankings forward with confidence. This is a fiercely competitive field where the gaps at the top are razor-thin, which makes it tempting to reshuffle for drama. I would rather be accurate: the current leaders are still the leaders, and the right pick for you comes down to grip style and hand size more than any single point of score.

zh-tw.commentary: 我讓 Razer Viper V4 Pro 續坐第一，這週的報導也在幫它站台。評測一直點出我最看重的那三個強項：頂尖的感測器表現、真正輕的 49 克無線機身，還有遠遠撐過馬拉松場次的續航。一隻滑鼠把頂級追蹤跟這種耐力兜在一起，第一名它拿得理所當然。緊追在後的 Logitech GPX2 Superstrike 還是我的第二，RTINGS 又特別點名它的可調觸發、震動點擊手感跟 8K 回報率。這是給想把點擊手感依遊戲微調的玩家用的，在我的評分表上它跟 Viper 就差那麼一點點。GPX2 Dex、DeathAdder V4 Pro、DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed 湊成一個火力全開的前五，各自對應不同手型跟握法。往下看，Pulsar X2 CL 守住它滿分的重量分數，OP1we 依然用更少的錢給你旗艦手感。這週我能找到的上市消息都翻過了，沒有一個動搖這個順序。改進都是漸進式的，價格也沒動，沒有哪個評測把新機排到 Viper 之上。所以我很有信心把名次沿用下來。這是個競爭超激烈的領域，頂端差距薄得像刀刃，正因如此才更容易讓人想為了戲劇效果亂調。我寧可準確：現在領先的還是領先的，適合你的那隻，看握法跟手型比看任何單一分數都重要。

en.commentary: The Razer Viper V4 Pro stays my number one, and this month's reviews only harden the case. Its Focus Pro 50K Gen-3 sensor, 8000Hz wireless polling, and a superlight 50g frame make it one of the most responsive mice I have ever used, and up to 180 hours of battery removes the usual wireless anxiety. PC Gamer and Trusted Reviews both crown it the competitive pick, which matches exactly what my hands tell me. The Logitech GPX2 Superstrike holds a very close second, keeping the flagship sensor of the Superlight lineage while adding new switch tech, and its 9.8 latency score is the best on my board. The GPX2 Dex takes third for players who want that same Logitech reliability in a shape built for larger hands. Razer's DeathAdder V4 Pro stays fourth as the ergonomic pick for palm grippers who want a bigger, contoured body without losing speed. The DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed and OP1 8K round out a strong mid-pack. The most interesting nuance from this month's coverage is DPI headroom: the Viper's 50,000 DPI sensor doubles the Logitech's 25,600, though in practice almost nobody games above a few thousand, so I do not over-weight it. For most competitive players the honest verdict is that the Viper V4 Pro and GPX2 twins are all elite, and grip shape should decide your pick more than the spec sheet. The rankings hold because these are the mice pros actually use.

highlights.title: Viper V4 Pro stays on top
highlights.body: A Focus Pro 50K sensor, 8000Hz polling, a 50g frame, and up to 180 hours of battery keep it my most responsive pick, crowned the competitive choice by fresh reviews.

highlights.title: GPX2 Superstrike is razor close
highlights.body: It keeps the Superlight's flagship sensor while adding new switch tech, and its 9.8 latency score is the best on my board. It holds a tight second.

highlights.title: DeathAdder V4 Pro for palm grip
highlights.body: For players who want a bigger, contoured body without losing speed, the ergonomic DeathAdder V4 Pro stays a dependable fourth.

highlights.title: Grip shape over spec sheet
highlights.body: The Viper's 50,000 DPI doubles Logitech's number, but almost nobody games that high. Let grip shape decide, since all the leaders are elite.

zh-tw.commentary: Razer Viper V4 Pro 守住我的第一，這個月的評測只是把理由鎖得更緊。它的 Focus Pro 50K Gen-3 感應器、8000Hz 無線回報率，加上超輕的 50g 機身，讓它成為我用過反應最快的滑鼠之一，最長 180 小時續航也把無線常見的焦慮拿掉了。PC Gamer 和 Trusted Reviews 都把它捧為競技之選，這跟我手感講的完全一致。Logitech GPX2 Superstrike 緊咬第二，保留 Superlight 血統的旗艦感應器又加了新的微動技術，它 9.8 的延遲分數是我榜上最好的。GPX2 Dex 拿第三，給想要同樣 Logitech 可靠度、又想要適合大手形狀的人。Razer DeathAdder V4 Pro 守第四，是給趴握玩家的人體工學之選，機身更大更貼合又不犧牲速度。DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed 和 OP1 8K 撐起強悍的中段班。這個月報導最有意思的細節是 DPI 餘裕，Viper 的 50,000 DPI 是 Logitech 25,600 的兩倍，不過實際上幾乎沒人開到幾千以上打遊戲，所以我不會過度加權。給多數競技玩家的老實結論是，Viper V4 Pro 和 GPX2 兩兄弟全都是頂尖，決定你選哪支的應該是握形而不是規格表。排名維持不變，因為這些就是職業選手真的在用的滑鼠。

highlights.title: Viper V4 Pro 續坐龍頭
highlights.body: Focus Pro 50K 感應器、8000Hz 回報、50g 機身加最長 180 小時續航，讓它成為我反應最快的選擇，新評測也捧為競技之選。

highlights.title: GPX2 Superstrike 緊咬
highlights.body: 保留 Superlight 旗艦感應器又加新微動技術，9.8 的延遲分數是我榜上最好，穩守第二。

highlights.title: 趴握選 DeathAdder V4 Pro
highlights.body: 想要更大、更貼合機身又不犧牲速度的玩家，人體工學的 DeathAdder V4 Pro 守住可靠的第四。

highlights.title: 握形比規格重要
highlights.body: Viper 的 50,000 DPI 是 Logitech 的兩倍，但幾乎沒人開那麼高。領先者全是頂尖，讓握形決定你的選擇。

references.title: Best gaming mouse in 2026: We've tested the very best mice and these are the top picks
The Best Gaming Mouse of 2026: Mice Reviews
Best Gaming Mouse 2026: Our Tested Picks for Every Gamer and Grip Style

en.commentary: The Razer Viper V4 Pro stays my number one this week, and the reviews that landed over the past few days keep reinforcing why. At a 49g wireless weight with 180 hours of battery at 1000Hz, it hits the rare combination of feather-light handling and a sensor that pro players trust in tournament conditions. When I glide it across a control-cloth pad, the tracking stays locked at speeds where lesser mice start to smear. That is what earns the top score. The Logitech G PRO X2 Superstrike sits right behind it, and its Haptic Inductive Trigger System is the most interesting hardware idea in the category right now. Adjustable click actuation plus rapid-trigger buttons genuinely help in tactical shooters where a faster follow-up shot changes the round. It is a mouse I recommend to players who live in Valorant and CS2. Further down, the DeathAdder V4 Pro remains the pick for anyone with larger hands who wants an ergonomic shell without giving up flagship sensor performance. For buyers watching their wallet, the value cluster still holds: the OP1we, the Pulsefire Haste 2 Wireless, and the Prime Wireless all deliver competition-grade tracking for a fraction of flagship money. My advice this week mirrors what every serious reviewer keeps repeating, the right mouse comes down to your grip style, your main game, and your budget far more than any single spec sheet. Pick the shape that fits your hand, and the performance at this tier will follow.

highlights.title: Viper V4 Pro holds the crown
highlights.body: A 49g wireless weight and 180 hours of battery at 1000Hz keep it my top pick, with sensor tracking that stays locked even at high flick speeds.

highlights.title: Superstrike's trigger tech is real
highlights.body: The Haptic Inductive Trigger System brings adjustable actuation and rapid-trigger clicks, a genuine advantage for Valorant and CS2 players chasing faster follow-up shots.

highlights.title: DeathAdder V4 Pro for bigger hands
highlights.body: The ergonomic flagship shell suits palm and larger-hand grippers who want top sensor performance without cramping on a smaller body.

highlights.title: Budget tier stays strong
highlights.body: The OP1we, Pulsefire Haste 2 Wireless, and Prime Wireless all deliver competition-grade tracking at a fraction of flagship pricing.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週 Razer Viper V4 Pro 繼續穩坐我心中第一，過去幾天陸續出來的評測也一直在幫它背書。49 克的無線重量，1000Hz 下續航 180 小時，這種輕到誇張又能讓職業選手在比賽場上信任感測器的組合，說真的很難得。我把它在控制型滑鼠墊上快速甩動，追蹤依然咬得死死的，換成次一級的滑鼠早就開始飄了。這就是它拿最高分的理由。Logitech G PRO X2 Superstrike 緊跟在後，它的觸發式感應按鍵是目前這個類別最有意思的硬體點子。可調的觸發行程加上快速觸發按鍵，在戰術射擊裡真的有感，補槍快一點整個回合就不一樣。我很推薦給整天泡在 Valorant 跟 CS2 的玩家。再往下，DeathAdder V4 Pro 依然是大手玩家的首選，人體工學握感做得好，旗艦感測器一樣不打折。預算有限的話，中價位這一群還是很能打，OP1we、Pulsefire Haste 2 Wireless、Prime Wireless 這幾隻用不到旗艦一半的價錢就給你比賽等級的追蹤。老話一句，滑鼠選對不選貴，握法、你主打哪款遊戲、加上預算，這三件事比任何一張規格表都重要。手型合了，這個等級的性能自然就到位。

highlights.title: Viper V4 Pro 續坐王座
highlights.body: 49 克無線重量搭配 1000Hz 下 180 小時續航，快速甩動時感測器追蹤依然咬得死死，這隻繼續是我的第一。

highlights.title: Superstrike 的觸發技術是玩真的
highlights.body: 觸發式感應按鍵帶來可調行程與快速觸發點擊，對追求補槍速度的 Valorant 跟 CS2 玩家是實打實的優勢。

highlights.title: DeathAdder V4 Pro 給大手玩家
highlights.body: 人體工學旗艦殼型適合手掌大或趴握的人，旗艦感測器一樣頂，不會因為殼小而握到抽筋。

highlights.title: 平價這一群很能打
highlights.body: OP1we、Pulsefire Haste 2 Wireless 跟 Prime Wireless 用不到旗艦一半的價錢，就給你比賽等級的追蹤表現。
